# Resonance Dream Sandbox — prototype index

This is the single page Karel opens each morning. It mirrors the live
index at `/dream/` (the Vercel preview URL). Click a route to play
with the prototype; click the design notes link to read the agent's
thinking.

Status legend: `skeleton` (route exists, not yet interactive) ·
`wip` (partial) · `demoable` (works, rough) · `polished` (refined).

---

## ⭐ Newest (Cycle 605 — **adult** psychedelic build · DEEP, 2 Canvas2D substrates of one concept · the fully-verifiable antidote to the 3-deep WebGPU-unseen streak · cosmic-ambient pole)

[/dream/1060-piano-current](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1060-piano-current) — **"Piano Current": STIR a luminous river of ~3,200 particles flowing through a divergence-free curl-noise field with your hand — and where the flow pools, accelerates and braids, it re-voices KAREL'S OWN PIANO into a cosmic drift. The river isn't decorated by the music; the river IS the instrument.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check all green, **0 issues from the 1060 folder** — `grep -c "1060" build-log = 0`; full `npm run build` blocked only by the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; Canvas2D + felt-piano fallback ARE the headless paths so this is the most-verifiable psych ship in weeks — NOT yet ear-verified on real piano) · Cycle 605 (adult, **DEEP** fire — winner of 2 Canvas2D substrates attacking ONE concept "a guaranteed-runs, fully-verifiable Canvas2D instrument you PLAY that re-voices Karel's real piano": this curl-noise river vs `1061-piano-chladni` a played cymatic-plate [de-selected, banked IDEAS §605 — lost because cymatics is doubly lab-prior at `19-cymatics`/`165-cymatics`]). **Cashes the queued ⭐RESURRECT-FIRST** (IDEAS §604) and **breaks the 3-deep green-but-GPU-unseen streak** (1052/1053/1059) with a substrate the build box can fully verify, while still discharging **JURY 2026-06-29 #1** (an instrument you PLAY, not a field you watch) **+ #2** (Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano as the carrier wave). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / **pointer/touch-STIR INPUT** (active, played, non-mic — dodges the jury-banned passive-mic) + Karel's real piano grain corpus + audio-file drag-drop / **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (deliberately NOT WebGL/WebGPU/a fragment shader — additive `lighter` violet→cyan→gold streaks over a per-frame indigo wash, ghost trails, never pure black) / cosmic meditative-drift palette. **The technique:** ~3,200 particles advected through a 2D velocity field that is the **curl of a stream function** `v=(∂ψ/∂y,−∂ψ/∂x)` so `∇·v=0` *exactly* (divergence-free → swirls/braids/pools, no visible sources or sinks; ψ from 2 octaves of dependency-free seeded Perlin noise + a slowly-drifting 3rd axis = alive-when-idle; toroidal wrap; a decaying pointer **vortex** term whose rotation sign follows your gesture). The flow's emergent stats — mean speed, directional **coherence**, near-cursor **vorticity**, **pool** density, energy centroid, a **confluence** flag — ARE the navigation policy over a **CataRT-style grain corpus** carved from the real piano (each ~220 ms grain tagged by autocorrelation pitch + RMS + ZCR brightness): coherent current → focused 7-limit-JI grains; turbulence → bright detuned shimmer cloud; forming pool → a sustained pad; sudden stir → onset burst; two merging vortices → a deliberate harmonic **fifth**; idle → sparse twinkle. Grains play through a raised-cosine env + stereo panner (panned to on-screen energy) → DynamicsCompressor limiter; an **audio-RMS→flow feedback loop** lets the river breathe with its own sound. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Robert Bridson et al. *Curl-Noise for Procedural Fluid Flow* (SIGGRAPH 2007); Diemo Schwarz CataRT / corpus-based concatenative synthesis, with "The Concatenator" (arXiv 2411.04366) + MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023) framing concatenative synthesis as *an agent navigating a corpus* — here the river's stats ARE that agent (RESEARCH §605). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ≥3 subsystems (real-piano source + grain-corpus analysis + curl-noise flow sim + granular re-synth + stir input + compressor master = 6) · #3 named references (Bridson / Schwarz·CataRT / Concatenator / MACataRT) · #5 RESEARCH §605. #1 NOT claimed (curl-noise + granular both lab-prior; the fresh axis is *emergent-flow-stats AS the corpus-navigation agent over Karel's real piano on a fully-verifiable Canvas2D substrate*, grep-0×). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-OUTPUT, the log-polar-kaleidoscope groove]` · `picked=[pointer-STIR INPUT, Canvas2D-curl-noise-particle-river OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch; not WebGPU), flow-stats→CataRT-granular-of-real-piano TECHNIQUE, cosmic-ambient VIBE]` — clears all bans. Honest note: CataRT-of-real-piano is now 3× in the window (1052/1059/1060) — under the ≥4 ban line, and deliberately so (the resurrect-first was queued for exactly this streak-break), but flagged so a 4th doesn't sneak in; cosmic-ambient pole 2× running (1059/1060) so a **warm** pick is now slightly preferred next. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe — continuous smooth advection + additive glow only; Stop tears down rAF + audio + AudioContext. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; reads only the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` GET — no side effects, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). **Winner of an adult DEEP 2-substrate fire**; banked **`1061-piano-chladni`** (the played Chladni cymatic-plate sibling — tune the driving frequency, sand migrates to the nodal lines, geometry re-voices the piano; de-selected because `19-cymatics`/`165-cymatics` make the technique doubly lab-prior, IDEAS §605). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1060-piano-current/README.md`

## (Cycle 604 — **adult** psychedelic build · DEEP, 2 substrates of one concept · brings WebGPU **compute** back as the resonating body + Karel's real piano as carrier · cosmic-ambient pole)

[/dream/1059-piano-flock](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1059-piano-flock) — **"Piano Flock": conduct a luminous GPU particle flock with your hand, and the flock's living emergent shape — how tight, how aligned, how fast, where its centre sits — re-voices KAREL'S OWN PIANO into a cosmic, drifting psychedelic instrument. The flock isn't decorated by the audio; the flock IS the instrument.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check all green, **0 issues from the 1059 folder** — `grep -c "1059" build-log = 0`; full `npm run build` blocked only by the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; revived 1052/1053, sustained here) **+ #2** (Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano as the carrier wave). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / **pointer/touch-CONDUCT INPUT** (active, played, non-mic — dodges the jury-banned passive-mic) + Karel's real piano grain corpus / **WebGPU-compute-boids OUTPUT** (WGSL `@workgroup_size(64)` cohesion/alignment/separation + pointer attractor over ping-pong storage buffers, additive glow sprites, ~14k boids) **with a genuinely-good Canvas2D CPU-flock fallback** (spatial-hash neighbours, ~2.4k boids, same three rules + the SAME audio mapping, additive `lighter` trails + warm→cool cosmic hue drift) so it demos on any device / cosmic psilocybin-drift palette. **The technique:** the flock's four emergent statistics — centroid (→register + stereo), order/alignment (→ a 7-limit just-intonation *lock*: tight herd = focused consonant notes, scattered = freely-detuned cloud), dispersion (→ grain density/width/shimmer), speed (→ grain rate/brightness), and *sudden contraction* (→ an onset burst) — ARE the navigation policy over a **CataRT-style grain corpus** carved from the real piano (each ~220 ms grain tagged by autocorrelation pitch + RMS + ZCR brightness); selected grains retune by playback rate toward the JI target, play through a raised-cosine env + stereo panner → cosmic convolution reverb → DynamicsCompressor limiter. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Craig Reynolds *Boids* (1987); Diemo Schwarz CataRT / corpus-based concatenative synthesis, with "The Concatenator" (arXiv 2411.04366) + MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023) framing concatenative synthesis as *an agent navigating a corpus* — here the flock's stats ARE that agent; the WebGPU canonical "Compute Boids" sample (RESEARCH §604). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ≥3 subsystems (real-piano source + grain-corpus analysis + WebGPU/CPU flock sim + granular re-synth + reverb/limiter master = 5) · #3 named references (Reynolds / Schwarz·CataRT / WebGPU Compute Boids) · #5 RESEARCH §604. #1 NOT claimed (boids + WebGPU compute both lab-prior; the fresh axis is *emergent-flock-stats AS the corpus-navigation agent over Karel's real piano*, grep-0×). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-OUTPUT, the forming log-polar-kaleidoscope groove (1053/1056/1057)]` · `picked=[pointer-CONDUCT INPUT, WebGPU-compute-boids+Canvas2D-fallback OUTPUT, flock-stats→CataRT-granular-of-real-piano TECHNIQUE, cosmic-ambient VIBE]` — clears both bans + the log-polar groove (log-polar left as an optional next-cycle bloom hook). **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe — continuous smooth motion + additive glow only; Stop tears down rAF + audio + GPU. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; reads only the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` GET — no side effects, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio in the box — the Canvas2D fallback + felt-piano are what run headlessly; ## (Cycle 595 — **adult** psychedelic build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal altered-states explorers · the lab's FIRST gated safe-flicker / Ganzfeld engine · cosmic-ambient pole)

[/dream/1043-dreamachine](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1043-dreamachine) — **"Dreamachine": dim your lights, soft-focus the center, and let your OWN visual cortex bloom the spirals, tunnels, and honeycombs — the screen never draws the hallucination; it only supplies the uniform field + a safe slow pulse, the way Brion Gysin's 1959 Dreamachine and modern Ganzflicker do.** `demoable` (compile-mode `next build` = full TS + ESLint + production bundle, **fully green, 0 warnings/errors from the 1043 folder**; not GPU/ear-verified) · Cycle 595 (adult, **WIDE** fire — winner of 3 altered-states explorers: this jhāna/hypnagogia Ganzfeld+safe-flicker vs `1044-hyperbolic-bloom` the DMT Poincaré-disk hyperbolic tiling [intense] vs `1045-k-hole` the ketamine dissociative parallax-void [cosmic-ambient]). **The lab's FIRST gated safe-photic / Ganzfeld engine** — the core shared infra PSYCHEDELIC.md §Cluster-3 names but no prior cycle built (grep-0×: `dreamachine`/`gysin`/`jhāna`). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / **self-clocked INPUT** (no pointer — the jury-banned reflex avoided; the field plays itself on a ~5.5-min arc) / **WebGL2 Ganzfeld fragment-shader OUTPUT** (uniform warm field, imperceptibly-slow value-noise color drift, soft vignette, blue-noise visual-snow, faint breathing form-constant scaffold) / soft-white-boundless meditative palette. **The technique (lab-first):** a uniform unstructured field (*Ganzfeld* — the brain amplifies its own neural noise into imagery) + a whole-field luminance **pulse** (*Ganzflicker*) that lets the viewer's visual cortex manufacture the Klüver form constants on its own. **THE HEADLINE = the safety engine (`flicker.ts`):** flicker in 3–30 Hz can trigger photosensitive-epilepsy seizures (peak risk 15–20 Hz), so the engine is gated in code — `clampRate()` is a single hard gate at **`MAX_HZ=3.0`** that the UI slider's `max` reads from (the danger band is literally unreachable), modulation is a continuous **soft sine** (never a square strobe) with depth capped at **`MAX_DEPTH=0.45`** (eases ~55%↔100% brightness, never full black↔white), the **default mode is non-flicker `drift`** (~0.18 Hz luminance sine), a **photosensitive-epilepsy warning + explicit opt-in gate** runs before anything, and an **always-visible instant Stop** eases to a calm steady field + hushes the drone. One shared clock (the `AudioContext` sample clock when audio's up, `performance.now()` fallback) phase-locks light and sound. **The ~5.5-min arc (`arc.ts`):** Onset (still, faint) → Come-up (drift begins, pulse fades in) → Plateau (gentle ≤3 Hz pulse + drone swell) → Return (pulse slows, settles to calm) — smoothstep-eased, never abrupt. **Always audio-visual:** a meditative **drone bank (`audio.ts`)** — detuned sustained sine partials (root/fifth/octave/twelfth + a faint filtered saw) with slow per-voice detune LFOs, a low-pass that **breathes** at ~0.092 Hz (≈5.5/min breath pace), a feedback-delay "void" tail, and a master amplitude **phase-locked to the exact per-frame luminance** the shader uses, so light and sound rise and fall together. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Brion Gysin & Ian Sommerville's **Dreamachine** (1959); Collective Act's **Dreamachine** (London 2022); the **2026 Oxford *Neuroscience of Consciousness* Ganzflicker study** (`niag016`; RESEARCH §595); **Heinrich Klüver** (the four form constants); **Bressloff & Cowan** (retina→V1 complex-log map); **W. Grey Walter** (flicker/EEG). README evokes phenomenology only — no medical/entrainment claims, and notes we deliberately stay far below the 8–12 Hz alpha band for safety. **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 **never-used technique** (gated safe-flicker + Ganzfeld engine — grep-0×) · #2 ≥3 subsystems (Ganzfeld shader + safe-flicker engine + phase-locked drone bank + form-constant scaffold = 4) · #3 named references (Gysin/Klüver/Bressloff–Cowan) · #5 **RESEARCH §595** (the 2026 Oxford Ganzflicker dive → this build, dated this cycle). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-input (JURY 2026-06-28 7×), raymarch (lane 2×: 1041/1042)]` · `picked=[self-clocked INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2-Ganzfeld OUTPUT, safe-flicker+Ganzfeld TECHNIQUE (lab-first), soft-white cosmic-ambient VIBE]` — clears every ban and rebalances the lane's 2× intense toward the cosmic-ambient pole. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** this IS the safety build — see the engine above; ≤3 Hz hard cap, soft sine, warning gate, instant kill. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Validation:** `npm ci --ignore-scripts` (sharp's libvips binary is blocked by the egress proxy; not needed to compile), then `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` → **fully green** (TS + ESLint + production bundle), zero issues from the 1043 folder. Full `npm run build` is blocked by the **standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (4096 hard cap, unraiseable via ulimit/prlimit even as uid 0; the lab now has 1000+ routes) — **proven infra-not-code:** clean HEAD (cycle 594, currently live) fails with the identical EMFILE at the same `next-font-manifest.json` open; Vercel's high-fd environment deploys fine (every cycle since ~472). **NOT seen/heard on a real GPU** (no WebGL2/audio in the box — unverified: whether the field *subjectively* evokes form constants on a real display in a dim room, the felt entrainment of the phase-locked drone, real-device framerate). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1044-hyperbolic-bloom`** ⭐ (the intense Poincaré-disk hyperbolic {7,3} tiling — Möbius nav + fundamental-domain folding in a fragment shader + ping-pong feedback trails + jeweled iridescence; QRI "Hyperbolic Geometry of DMT" / Escher Circle Limit — resurrect on an intense-pole cycle, fix the exact Schwarz-triangle circle first) + **`1045-k-hole`** (the ketamine dissociative void — sparse luminous parallax point-field + exp fog + global `timeScale` time-dilation + convolution-reverb void + body-melt vertex warp + gyro untethered float; Frontiers 2017 ego-dissolution — resurrect when the lane is light on void pieces, or fold `timeScale`/convolution-void into shared infra). Both built complete + builder-audited, removed un-committed per the non-winner rule; seeds → IDEAS §595. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1043-dreamachine/README.md`

## (Cycle 594 — **adult** psychedelic build · WIDE, 3 untapped altered-states explorers · the lab's FIRST 4D / hyperdimensional raymarch)

[/dream/1042-hyperspace-bloom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1042-hyperspace-bloom) — **"Hyperspace Bloom": fall, drug-free, toward the DMT "breakthrough" — a 4-dimensional polytope rotating through planes that don't exist in our space, its glowing neon-jeweled edges ballooning and turning inside-out the way the eye reads "more axes than reality allows."** `demoable` (tsc 0 errors project-wide + ESLint **1042 folder 0/0**; compile clean; not GPU-verified) · Cycle 594 (adult, **WIDE** fire — winner of 3 altered-states explorers across the spectrum: this DMT-breakthrough 4D-raymarch vs `1043-clear-light` the jhāna soft-white boundless-dissolution vs `1044-mycelial-bloom` the psilocybin warm-organic voice-bloom). **The lab's FIRST 4D / hyperdimensional raymarch** (grep-0×: no prior `4D`/`tesseract`/`polytope`/`hyperbolic-tiling` anywhere in 593 cycles). **For**: adult / **intense** pole / **device-tilt + auto-journey INPUT** (the ~75s descent plays itself; optional gyro nudge, iOS-permission-gated in the start tap; **non-pointer** — the jury-banned reflex avoided) / **WebGL2 raymarched-SDF OUTPUT** (a glowing capsule-union over the projected edges, not a flat warp-plane like 1038 nor a wormhole bore like 1041) / neon-iridescent jeweled DMT palette. **The technique (lab-first):** a regular **24-cell** (24 vertices, 96 edges) is rotated on the CPU by **all six 4D rotation planes** each frame — the three **w-planes (`xw, yw, zw`)** are the "hyper" rotations that continuously change the 3D slice — then **stereographically projected** 4D→3D (near-pole edges balloon toward infinity, the classic hyperdimensional look); the 192 projected endpoints upload as a uniform array and the fragment shader **raymarches a smooth `smin` union of capsules** (88-step cap, early bail, thin-film iridescence via an IQ cosine palette, a volumetric neon halo so the structure glows off-surface, chromatic aberration toward the rim, soft filmic tone + vignette). A `timeline.ts` runs a ~75s breakthrough envelope (speed/glow/sat/bloom/peak rise to a peak then settle, then loops). **Always audio-visual:** a synthesized detuned-oscillator **breakthrough drone** (resonant filter sweep + shimmer bus, compressor/limiter master) **FFT-analyses its own output** and feeds bass→rotation/flow, highs→saturation, loudness→neon gain (the neural-gain finding made visible). Degrades: no WebGL2 → rose notice + a Canvas2D rotating-24-cell wireframe that still morphs + plays audio; no DeviceOrientation → auto-journey drives everything. **NAMED REFERENCES:** the **"hyperbolic geometry of DMT"** thesis (QRI / Andrés Gómez-Emilsson); **Bressloff–Cowan** cortical form-constants; the classic **4D-rotation + stereographic-projection raymarch** lineage (Shadertoy/hypercube). README frames it as *phenomenology*, no medical claims. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 **never-used technique** (4D polytope rotation+projection raymarch — grep-0×) · #2 ≥3 subsystems (4D geometry engine + raymarch renderer + journey-envelope timeline + FFT-driven synth = 4) · #3 named references (QRI/Bressloff–Cowan) · #5 RESEARCH §594 (the 4D-raymarch ecosystem dive → this build, dated this cycle). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-adult-input (JURY 7×), "a-sim-IS-the-body" default (JURY 7×), Gray-Scott RD, cathedral/spatial-walk]` · `picked=[device-tilt+auto-journey INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2-raymarched-SDF OUTPUT, 4D-rotation+stereographic-projection TECHNIQUE (lab-first), neon-iridescent intense VIBE]` — clears every ban, and orthogonal to both prior psychedelic builds (1038 2D log-polar warp / 1041 3D wormhole bore → this is true 4D). **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing — continuous smooth 4D rotation + slow luminance drift only, no full-screen flash; Pause instantly freezes + silences. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Verification:** `npx tsc --noEmit` exit 0 (zero TS errors project-wide); `npx next lint` on the 1042 folder → **0 warnings / 0 errors**; full `npm run build` compiled + linted clean, static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** fd-ceiling (infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT seen/heard on a real GPU** (no WebGL2/audio in the box — unverified: whether the 4D morph *subjectively* reads as hyperdimensional, real-device framerate at 96 capsules×88 steps, the audio→geometry coupling strength). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1043-clear-light`** ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (the cosmic-ambient soft-white boundless-dissolution counterweight the lane still lacks — breath-paced ~0.1 Hz particle dissolution-to-white, drone bank + procedural cathedral-IR convolution; Lutz & Davidson PNAS 2004 / Oceanic Boundlessness / Young·Oliveros·Eno) + **`1044-mycelial-bloom`** (the warm-organic serotonergic pole — your voice [analysis-only] drives fBm two-level domain-warp + kaleidoscope blooms; entropic-brain/REBUS, Klüver/Bressloff–Cowan). Both built complete + builder-audited tsc/eslint-clean, removed un-committed per the non-winner rule; seeds → IDEAS §594. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1042-hyperspace-bloom/README.md`

## (Cycle 593 — **adult** psychedelic build · ships the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole to balance 592's intense 1038)

[/dream/1041-nde-tunnel](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1041-nde-tunnel) — **"NDE Tunnel": drift, drug-free, down a wormhole toward a growing being of light — the near-death / ketamine void, with the audio deliberately lagging the visuals so the two senses come gently apart.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **1041 folder eslint 0/0**; not seen/heard on real GPU) · Cycle 593 (adult, psychedelic). **The COSMIC-AMBIENT counterweight** to cycle 592's intense `1038-form-constant` — so the new altered-states direction now ships **both poles** the same morning (PSYCHEDELIC.md: "cover the whole spectrum, don't camp on one pole"). It is the documented ⭐ resurrect-first the 592 fire banked as `1039-light-tunnel` ("the natural next ship to balance 1038's intensity"), built this fire and shipped at a fresh number. **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / **non-pointer auto-drift INPUT** (the ~2-min descent plays itself; optional subtle gyro/pointer camera nudge — zero permission friction) / **WebGL2 raymarched-wormhole-SDF OUTPUT** (a 3D bore you fall through, deliberately distinct from 1038's flat warp-plane) / dark-void-luminous palette (deep indigo/black → gold/white light). **NAMED REFERENCE:** **Raymond Moody** *Life After Life* (the NDE tunnel / being-of-light arc); **Borjigin et al.** (PNAS 2013 rat / 2023 human, the end-of-life **gamma surge** → the "hyper-lucid clarity snap"); the **hypoxic tunnel-vision** mechanism; **ketamine NMDA-antagonist** thalamocortical disconnection → the **audio-visual desync**; **Pauline Oliveros** *Deep Listening* (convolution-void vastness). **The mechanic:** a WebGL2 fragment shader **raymarches a curving cylindrical wormhole** — the ray's world position is bent by a sin/cos spine before a `length(p.xy)-radius` tunnel SDF (~72 steps, exponential depth fog, sparse drifting luminous structures for parallax) — flying endlessly toward a **center-out being-of-light bloom** (additive glow that swells on approach). Layered: an animated **hypoxic vignette** constricting the field toward the bright center at the peak; a one-time **gamma clarity-snap** (~2–3s of impossibly sharp high-contrast coherence before the return — a smooth ramp, **not** a strobe); iridescent wall sheen + slow chromatic aberration. A single **time-dilated clock** drives a ~120s arc: onset → leaving-the-body → the tunnel → the light/clarity-snap → return (never abrupt). Audio: a 4-voice detuned **drone bank** → low-pass that **opens toward the light** + a synthetic `ConvolverNode` IR (~4.5s decaying filtered noise) for the void; the audio envelope is deliberately **lagged behind** the visual motion (the ketamine NMDA-antagonist **dissociation desync** — gently decoupling the two streams the brain normally binds); master ≈0.15, smooth fades, full teardown. **Honesty (in README):** endogenous-tryptamine/DMT theories of NDE are speculative — this evokes the *phenomenology*, it claims no mechanism. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing — slow cosmic motion + a smoothly-ramped light bloom only, no full-screen flash; Stop instantly freezes motion + silences audio. **Ambition (honest 2–3/5):** #2 ≥3 subsystems (raymarch wormhole + convolution-void drone + hypoxic-vignette/bloom + dissociation-desync engine = 4) · #3 named references (Moody; Borjigin PNAS; ketamine NMDA desync; Oliveros) · #5 RESEARCH §593. **diversity:** `picked=[non-pointer auto-drift INPUT, raymarched-wormhole-SDF OUTPUT (3D bore, not a flat warp-plane), tunnel-to-light + audio-visual-desync TECHNIQUE, dark-void-luminous cosmic-ambient VIBE]` — the deliberate orthogonal complement to 1038 (intense/mic/WebGL2-warp/neon); clears every jury ban (no pointer-as-instrument, no read-back physics sim, no Gray-Scott, no cathedral-walk). **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 41s`**; **1041 folder `npx eslint` exit 0**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling — infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT seen/heard on a real device** (no GPU/audio in the box — unverified: whether the wormhole *subjectively* reads as a tunnel-toward-light on a real GPU, the desync's felt dissociation, the convolution-void depth). No headless unit test (a continuous shader/synth, not a discretizable pure core). **Context — a parallel-run collision resolved into a both-poles win:** this fire independently ran the same WIDE 3-explorer psychedelic plan as the 592 fire and reached the same form-constant winner; the 592 fire won the push, so rather than ship a duplicate intense engine, I deferred to it and shipped the banked cosmic-ambient counterweight (see STATE §593). Remaining banked from 592: **`1040-ganzfeld-bloom`** ⭐ (the meditative pole + the safe-flicker engine). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1041-nde-tunnel/README.md`

## (Cycle 592 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 altered-states explorers across the whole spectrum, shipped 1)

[/dream/1038-form-constant](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1038-form-constant) — **"Form Constant": play your music (or just speak) into the mic and watch your visual cortex's own hallucinated geometry bloom — tunnels, spirals, funnels, honeycomb — generated the way the brain actually makes them.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; not GPU/ear-verified) · Cycle 592 (adult, **WIDE** fire — winner of 3 altered-states explorers spanning the spectrum: this intense DMT/LSD form-constant engine vs `1039-light-tunnel` the NDE wormhole-to-light vs `1040-ganzfeld-bloom` the meditative Ganzfeld+safe-flicker). **The lab's FIRST psychedelic / altered-states build** — the opening move of Karel's 2026-06-28 steer (`PSYCHEDELIC.md`), and it deliberately ships **the single most load-bearing finding** of that whole direction: the **log-polar / form-constant engine**. **For**: adult / **intense** pole / **mic INPUT** (non-pointer — FFT bands drive the geometry: bass→flow/warp, mids→form-constant morph & kaleidoscope fold, highs→fine detail/grain, loudness→saturation/neural-gain) / **WebGL2 fullscreen fragment-shader OUTPUT** / neon-iridescent jeweled DMT palette. **The technique (grep-verified lab-first, 0× prior):** all psychedelic geometry is ONE periodic pattern seen through a **log-polar warp**, because the retina→V1 cortical map is a complex logarithm (**Bressloff & Cowan**, building on **Klüver's four form constants**). The shader takes screen UV, computes cortical coords `(lr=log r, θ=atan)`, synthesizes plane-wave stripes + a 3-wave hex lattice *in cortical space*, and the **orientation** of those waves selects the form constant: stripes along θ → concentric rings/**tunnel**, diagonal → **spiral**, stripes along lr → radial spokes/**funnel**, hex → **honeycomb** — with a `formMix` uniform sweeping continuously through all four, N-fold kaleidoscope folding to bloom a chrysanthemum, an IQ cosine palette, chromatic aberration, and blue-noise visual-snow grain. **The journey arc (minute-5 ≠ minute-1):** a JS `arc.ts` entropy controller runs a ~5-min Onset→Come-up→Peak/breakthrough→Plateau→Return, smoothstep-blended, ramping noise octaves / flow / saturation and loosening symmetry at peak — the Carhart-Harris **entropic-brain / REBUS** parameterization made visible; everything lerped so transitions are never abrupt. **Always audio-visual:** mic is primary, but if denied it falls back to a self-playing **Shepard–Risset drone** (octave-spaced detuned sines under a Gaussian window) routed through the same analyser, so the piece always sounds and reacts. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Klüver's form constants; **Bressloff & Cowan** cortical model ("Uncoiling the spiral", plus.maths); **ENTHEA** (github.com/elder-plinius, 2026 — a recent open-source real-time GPU form-constant synthesizer using the same retina→V1 transform, found in this cycle's RESEARCH §592 dive); Carhart-Harris entropic-brain/REBUS. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 never-used-here technique (log-polar/form-constant warp — grep-0×) · #2 ≥3 subsystems (mic FFT analyser + log-polar form-constant shader + entropy/journey-arc controller + Shepard-Risset fallback synth = 4) · #3 named references (above) · #5 RESEARCH §592 (the ENTHEA find → this build, dated this cycle). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-adult-input (JURY 2026-06-28 7×), the "a-sim-IS-the-instrument-body" default adult move (JURY 7×), Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion (JURY 2×-running), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes harmony]` · `picked=[mic/audio-reactive INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT, log-polar form-constant warp TECHNIQUE, neon-iridescent intense-psychedelic VIBE]` — clears every ban (no pointer, no read-back physics sim, no Gray-Scott). **SAFETY:** intense visuals but **no strobe** — the motion is continuous warp + slow luminance drift, not flicker; the gated photic-pulse engine lives in the banked `1040` sibling, not here. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **One fix during validation:** a `createMediaStreamAudioSource`→`createMediaStreamSource` typo in `audio.ts` (the single allowed fix; build then `✓ Compiled successfully`). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 87s`** → lint/type passed; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling — infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container — unverified: whether the four form constants read as convincingly *psychedelic* on a real GPU, the perceptual strength of the audio→geometry coupling, real-device framerate). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1039-light-tunnel`** ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (raymarched infinite NDE wormhole toward a growing being-of-light, hypoxic vignette + one-time gamma "clarity snap", convolution-void drone + `timeScale` time-dilation, gyro/scroll/autonomous — the cosmic-ambient pole; Moody/Borjigin) + **`1040-ganzfeld-bloom`** ⭐ (Canvas2D Ganzfeld field + breath-paced ~0.1 Hz mandala + particle dissolution-to-light + Shepard ascent, and **the safe-flicker engine** [`safeFlicker.ts`: opt-in, ≤3 Hz hard-capped, depth ≤0.22 soft-sine, instant-kill] the whole direction needs — meditative-boundless pole; Gysin Dreamachine/Ganzflicker). [/dream/1035-living-album](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1035-living-album) — **"Living Album": you are not a player but a *gardener* — drop a few seeds into a self-evolving piece of music that REMEMBERS, and the motifs alive at minute 6 are literal descendants of the ones you planted at minute 1.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; climate buttons nudge the whole population's evolutionary pressure over ~a minute — **NOT** note-on-tap, **NOT** continuous pointer-as-instrument [the jury's banned 7× reflex]; zero permission friction) / **Canvas2D organic-lineage OUTPUT** (agent bodies + parent→child threads + note blooms over an aurora field; NOT WebGL2-flat-raster) / living-garden ambient palette. **NAMED REFERENCE:** **Brian Eno's generative *Reflection*** (an infinite, never-repeating stream) + **arXiv:2506.05104** "Survey on the Evaluation of Generative Models in Music" (RESEARCH §591) + artificial-life heredity. **The mechanic:** a pure `evolve.ts` (no DOM/audio/canvas) holds a seeded RNG, a small **genome** per agent (register, rhythmic density, timbre brightness, a short interval-motif, a lifespan), **mutation + crossover** (a child inherits a bounded mutated *blend* of two parents), agent birth/aging/death, a **functional diatonic** progression over a climate-modulated tonic, and `pickPitch` voice-leading that always returns a chord-consonant diatonic pitch. `step(world)` advances one tick → note events. Because reproduction always blends *currently-living* genomes, the pool drifts continuously and minute-6 motifs are gen>0 descendants of minute-1 founders — **that lineage is the audible memory** (drawn on screen as child→parent threads). **Long-form / minute-5≠minute-1** by construction: the population never resets, no fixed loop. Always-sounding (auto-demo population on load; gesture-gated AudioContext; per-note filtered voices; full teardown). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ≥3 subsystems (heredity engine + functional-harmony model + agent lifecycle + Canvas2D lineage render = 4) · #3 named reference (Eno *Reflection*; arXiv:2506.05104) · #5 RESEARCH §591. #1 NOT over-claimed (generative music has priors — the fresh axis is the *gardener relationship* + genuinely stateful heredity). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-as-instrument-primary (JURY 7×), sim-as-body-as-default (JURY 7×), Gray-Scott-RD, WebGL2-flat-over-rep (~9×), cathedral/spatial-walk (on-the-clock — 1029 was the 4th)]` · `picked=[sparse-perturbation/tap-to-seed INPUT, Canvas2D-organic-lineage OUTPUT, generative-agent-heredity+functional-harmony TECHNIQUE, living-garden-ambient VIBE]` — clears every ban (tap-to-seed is consequential-over-time; the population *evolves*, it is not a read-back physics sim). **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data`; ## Cycle 588 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1027-kids-chaos-aurora](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1027-kids-chaos-aurora) — **"Chaos Aurora": a 4-year-old flicks a glowing double pendulum and it dances a never-the-same-twice aurora ribbon that sings a real chord progression that never exactly repeats.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **headless self-test 5/5 PASS — machine-verified**; not ear-verified) · Cycle 588 (kids, **WIDE** fire — winner of 3 orthogonal kids explorers: this double-pendulum-chaos vs `1026-kids-marble-bells` tilt-gravity-marbles×modal-bells vs `1028-kids-star-weaver` constellation-graph-traversal-sequencer). **The lab's FIRST use of chaotic double-pendulum dynamics** (grep-0× across all 587 prior prototypes' READMEs + INDEX — the lab already owns Lenia/sandpile/pendulum-harp/orbit/particle-life/RD, so this is the rare genuinely-new engine). **For**: kids (4+) / calm bedtime-aurora / **tap-flick INPUT** (every flick = visible energy + immediate chime <50ms; optional tilt bends gravity; **zero permission friction** — no mic/camera, ideal for a 06:30 phone glance) / **Canvas2D additive-glow OUTPUT** (two glowing rods + bobs + a long fading teal→violet→gold aurora trail; NOT a flat full-screen fragment raster, the jury's 9× over-represented output) / hypnotic dark-aurora palette. **NAMED REFERENCE:** the *double pendulum* / *deterministic chaos* — Lagrangian mechanics + sensitive dependence on initial conditions; a nod to artificial-life "open-ended novelty from simple deterministic rules" (RESEARCH §588: ALIFE/ALICE 2026). **The mechanic (jury's 1015 recipe, on the kids lane):** `physics.ts` integrates the two-segment double-pendulum **Lagrangian EOM** with a fixed-step **RK4** integrator + light damping (settles, then the auto-demo re-flicks). The chaotic lower-bob path is the generative engine — **the sim IS the resonating body** (jury-sanctioned for kids). A genuine diatonic **I–vi–IV–V** progression in C major advances every ~4s; the bob's height is **snapped to a chord-tone of the LIVE chord** (always consonant, never looping — explicitly **NOT pentatonic "no-wrong-notes"**: V really contains the leading-tone B, which the test asserts). New notes trigger on the bob's swing **zero-crossings** (clean musical onsets, not per-frame spam). Warm soft-mallet/glass chimes (sine + detuned partials, ≥10ms attack) over an always-on drone pad so it is never silent. **Long-form / minute-5≠minute-1** by construction: a chaotic trajectory literally never repeats. **Kids-safe chain (exact):** `masterGain(~0.26) → lowpass(~6500Hz) → DynamicsCompressor(−10/20:1) → analyser → destination` (analyser taps master only; nothing hits destination directly). ≥72px Start gesture-gates AudioContext + iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` in the same tap; ~2s-idle auto-demo so a hands-free glance both sees + hears within ~1s; full teardown (rAF cancel + listener removal + `audioCtx.close()`). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 **never-used technique** (chaotic double-pendulum Lagrangian RK4 — grep-0×) · #2 ≥3 subsystems (chaotic physics + functional-harmony synth + additive-glow Canvas2D = 3) · #3 named reference (double pendulum / deterministic chaos). #5 chains to RESEARCH §588 dated this fire. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-ADULT-input (JURY 7× — kids exempt), "a-sim-IS-the-body" as ADULT default (JURY — kids exempt, jury told kids to copy 1015's sim-as-body), Gray-Scott RD (JURY 2× running — NOT used here), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY BANNED — used REAL I–vi–IV–V instead), full-screen WebGL2-flat-raster (JURY ~9× — used Canvas2D)]` · `picked=[tap-flick INPUT (zero-permission), Canvas2D-additive-glow OUTPUT, chaotic-double-pendulum TECHNIQUE (lab-first), bedtime-aurora VIBE, real-functional-harmony, long-form-never-repeats]` — clears every ban. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `✓ Compiled successfully in 48s`; lint/type ran with only pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other-prototype warnings — **1027 folder grep-clean, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling — infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **HEADLESS-VERIFIED (the rare win):** `chaos.test.ts` 5/5 PASS (ran ad-hoc under vitest w/ a temp root config overriding the `src/lib/**`-scoped include + a postcss override) — RK4 bounded/finite over 7,200 damped steps, undamped energy conserved <2%, `snapToChord` always in the live chord's tone set across all 4 chords. **NOT ear-verified** (no audio in the box — unverified: chime balance, the aurora feel, iOS orientation flow; ## Cycle 587 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal live-data explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1024-wiki-bells](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1024-wiki-bells) — **"Wiki Bells": every Wikipedia edit on Earth, right now, struck as a bell — the planet's collective thinking-out-loud heard as a slow, drifting carillon.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **not** ear-verified) · Cycle 587 (adult, **WIDE** fire — winner of 3 orthogonal **live-real-world-data** sonifications: this Wikimedia-edit-stream×inharmonic-bells vs `1023-airspace-organ` OpenSky-aircraft×additive-glissando-radar vs `1025-isobar-winds` METAR-weather×wind-organ-isobars). **The lab's 2nd genuine data-sonification** (after `1002-sun-organ`/NOAA — directly answers JURY 2026-06-28 #5: "build a second real-world-data piece"; the data-driven-composition category was wide open). **For**: adult / contemplative-observatory / **live-data INPUT** (Wikimedia **EventStreams** SSE — keyless, CORS-open, no server route, no pointer) / **Canvas2D bloom OUTPUT** (one expanding ring/glyph per event — deliberately NOT a full-screen WebGL2 fragment raster, the jury's 9× over-represented output) / luminous gold-ivory bells + violet new-article chimes + mint new-user sparkles on near-black. **NAMED REFERENCE:** a Resonance-flavored, harmonically-richer descendant of **Hatnote's *"Listen to Wikipedia"*** (Stephen LaPorte & Mahmoud Hashemi, 2013), credited in README + in-app Design notes. **The mapping (legible):** each `recentchange` event → an **inharmonic bell** (detuned partials at metallic ratios, exponential decay); signed **byte-delta → pitch/weight** (big edits = low, weighty bells; small copyedits = high tinkles), **edit type → timbre + color** (edit / new-article warm chime / new-user rising sparkle / bot = quieter+woodier, mutable), **wiki language → stereo pan**. Pitches snap to a **drifting modal lattice** (pentatonic/Dorian family that re-seeds every ~30s) so the carillon is consonant but minute 5 ≠ minute 1 — a long-form, **self-evolving** texture, not a loop. **Varies the human↔sound relationship (the jury's #1 ask):** a **non-pointer instrument** — the world's edit stream plays itself; the visitor only *shapes the listening* (language filter, bot mute, density), never aims or strikes. Voice-capped (~12) → soft delay tail → compressor so a busy day never clips or becomes noise; significant-event selection when flooded. **Degrades to always-sound:** if `EventSource` is missing / errors / sends nothing within 6s, a built-in **Poisson-ish synthetic edit generator** (exponential inter-arrivals, varied deltas, ~6% new-users / ~12% new-articles / ~45% bots) plays an **identical-sounding** stream with a `text-amber-300/95` "simulated edit stream — live feed unavailable" notice; AudioContext created + resumed on the first click ("Listen to the world edit"). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 ≥3 subsystems (SSE ingest/filter/throttle + inharmonic bell synth + drifting-modal-scale state + Canvas2D bloom viz = 4) · #3 **named reference** (Hatnote) · #1 varies-relationship via non-pointer world-as-instrument. (#1-never-used NOT claimed — EventStreams data + bell synth both exist elsewhere; #4 single-cycle; #5 paired to *this* fire's RESEARCH §587 dive, not a 14-day-old entry.) **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-adult-input (JURY 7×), "a-simulation-IS-the-instrument-body" as adult default (JURY 7×), Gray-Scott RD (JURY, used 2× running), full-screen WebGL2-flat-raster (JURY ~9×), ritual/cathedral spatial-walk (JURY on-the-clock)]` · `picked=[**live-data-stream INPUT** (non-pointer; world-as-instrument), **Canvas2D-bloom OUTPUT** (under-represented, jury-collapsed to 1×), **inharmonic-bell-carillon TECHNIQUE**, **observatory-of-attention VIBE**, **drifting-modal long-form** (minute-5≠minute-1)]` — clears every ban. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; EventStreams is keyless + CORS-open; zero new npm deps; zero AI/cost surface). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: webpack compile + lint [only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings] + type-check PASS; **static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** — `next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio in the box — unverified: bell balance, the live SSE feel, flood-throttle on a busy day; the synthetic generator + gesture-resume are the always-sounding net). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`airspace-organ`** (OpenSky aircraft overhead → just-intonation additive glissando chord on a phosphor ATC radar; lost on data-source CORS/auth fragility → more often synthetic than `1024`'s reliably-live EventStreams) + **`isobar-winds`** (continental METAR weather → filtered-noise wind-organ on a Canvas2D isobar field; lost on being the third just-intonation-drone of the set, least surprising). Both built complete, removed un-committed per the non-winner rule; seeds → IDEAS §587. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1024-wiki-bells/README.md`

## (Cycle 585 — **adult** build · DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to ONE concept, shipped 1)

[/dream/1019-echo-halls-tonnetz](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1019-echo-halls-tonnetz) — **"Echo Halls — Tonnetz": walk your body across the neo-Riemannian lattice of triads — every threshold you step over is a real P/L/R voice-leading move (C→Em→Am…) — while a GPU reaction-diffusion field blooms under the active chord and the whole spatialized ensemble re-pans around you in HRTF.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **not** ear/GPU-verified) · Cycle 585 (adult, **DEEP** fire — winner of 3 approaches to *Echo Halls*: this Tonnetz×WebGPU-compute-RD vs `1018-echo-halls-walk` first-person-full-sphere-find-by-ear vs `1017-echo-halls-flock` top-down-WebGPU-compute-flock). **The DEEP extension of the jury's only 5/5, `977-echo-room-gpu`** (JURY 2026-06-27 #2: "extend 977 into a multi-cycle spatial instrument — a *room* you physically walk between harmonic zones"; #3: "make the sim the resonating body"). **For**: adult / gallery-installation / **body-pose INPUT** (MediaPipe Pose torso-centroid via CDN dynamic `import()`; pointer fallback; ~1.5s P–L–R auto-demo, zero permissions) / **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (Gray-Scott RD on ping-pong `array<vec2<f32>>` storage buffers, `@workgroup_size(8,8)`; →WebGL2 RGBA16F float-target→CPU fallback) + Canvas2D Tonnetz overlay / luminous lattice. **The harmony model (the headline):** a real **triangular neo-Riemannian Tonnetz** — right axis +7 (fifths), up axis +4 (major thirds); each triangle a triad (up=major, down=minor); **every shared edge is a genuine P (parallel, flip 3rd), L (leading-tone, root↓ semitone), or R (relative, 5th↑ tone) single-voice transform** — so crossing any threshold is one common-tone-rich voice-leading step, and the HUD prints the move (`L → Em`). **Machine-verified** (the jury's #4 verification-debt template, à la 983): a standalone pass confirmed all shared edges resolve to a real P/L/R move of the cell's actual triad — **P:16 / L:24 / R:18 directed edges, zero mismatches**. Live triad = 3 oscillators that **glide** (`setTargetAtTime`) so voice-leading is *audible*, not just labelled — **real harmony, not the banned pentatonic safety scale**. **The resonating body:** the GPU RD field is seeded (`splat`) by the live marker + every ghost where harmony is happening; ~10Hz it's read back (`copyBufferToBuffer`→`mapAsync`) to **coverage** (opens a shimmer partial + breathes the master lowpass) + **edge energy** (sweeps a bandpass) — **the sim IS the instrument's body, not a backdrop**. **HRTF + ghost loops (kept from 977):** listener = performer; live triad + each ghost own an HRTF `PannerNode` at its lattice position, re-panning around you; "Start a loop" records a 7s lattice path → a permanent ghost re-walking + re-triggering its transforms forever (cap 6, oldest drops, "Clear all"); bus `~1/√(n+1)`→lowpass→compressor. **Degrades to always-sound:** no WebGPU→WebGL2 float RD→CPU RD (HUD shows `sim webgpu-compute / webgl2 / cpu`); no camera→pointer (`text-rose-300` notice); full teardown (rAF + AudioContext + GPU buffers/GL programs + MediaPipe + camera tracks + resize). **Ambition 5/5** — #1 NEVER-used (lab's first **neo-Riemannian Tonnetz** engine — grep-clean; + first WebGPU-**compute** RD as a resonating *body*, vs 977's GPU-render-only) · #2 ≥3 subsystems (pose + WebGPU-compute RD + per-source HRTF + Tonnetz harmony state = 4) · #3 named refs (**Euler/Riemann/Cohn** Tonnetz; **Spatial Orchestra** arXiv:2510.23848; **Cardiff, *Forty Part Motet***) · #4 multi-cycle (cycle 1 of the Echo Halls thread) · #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH §585** (arXiv:2606.24367, 24 Jun 2026, full-sphere human localisation). **diversity:** `banned=[raw-WebGL2-as-primary-output (≥5×/10), keyboard/MIDI-adult-input (JURY), Canvas2D+flat-fragment-only (JURY), explainable-inverse move (JURY), ink-on-parchment vibe (JURY)]` · `picked=[**body-pose INPUT** (scarce 1× recent), **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (jury-encouraged, 6×→1×), **Tonnetz+Gray-Scott-RD-body TECHNIQUE**, **gallery/installation VIBE**, **HRTF walkable harmony**]` — clears every ban. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; MediaPipe is a runtime CDN `import()`, not a dep; zero new npm deps). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: webpack compile + lint + type-check PASS, grep-clean of `1019`/`echo-halls`, reached `Collecting page data`); **static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code — every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT ear/GPU-verified** (no audio/WebGPU/camera in the box — unverified: the compute RD bind-group/ping-pong + `mapAsync` cadence on real GPU, the HRTF re-pan feel, the MediaPipe load; the WebGL2/CPU-RD + pointer + auto-demo paths are the always-sounding net). **Winner of an adult DEEP 3-approach fire**; banked **`1018-echo-halls-walk` ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** — first-person, full-sphere, find-the-chord-BY-EAR (rooms at varied azimuth+elevation; listener position AND orientation update so HRTF re-pans as you look; the directest take on §585's full-sphere localisation), lost ONLY on rendering WebGL2 (over-represented output tag) with no GPU-compute → resurrect with a compute body. Plus **`1017-echo-halls-flock`** — top-down plan; **WebGPU-compute curl-noise flock** (~120k particles) pools in your room, **atomic-reduction `mapAsync` readback** drives filter/shimmer (cleanest "compute *drives* the sound" loop, curl-noise fresher than RD), lost on the top-down form being closest to 977. Both `cp`'d to scratchpad `dream-losers-585/` then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build (NOT committed); seeds → IDEAS §585. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1019-echo-halls-tonnetz/README.md`

## (Cycle 584 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1)

[/dream/1015-kids-ink-garden](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1015-kids-ink-garden) — **"Ink Garden": drop a fingertip of magic ink and watch living Turing-pattern spots GROW and spread across the screen by themselves — and the more the pattern blooms, the fuller the music gets.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean + **13 headless `sim.test.ts` tests pass**; not ear/GPU-verified) · Cycle 584 (kids, **WIDE** fire — winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this touch×GPU-reaction-diffusion vs `1014-kids-breath-flute` mic-breath×waveguide-flute vs `1016-kids-scarf-choir` camera-optical-flow×choir). **For**: kids (4+) / bioluminescent inky / **touch** seeding input (tap+drag anywhere; 4 big color-orbs pick hue; ~2s-idle auto-demo seeds itself) / **GPU reaction-diffusion FIELD** output (WebGL2 ping-pong float-texture Gray-Scott fragment shader, 256×256, 14 steps/frame; Canvas2D CPU-RD fallback) / glowing cyan/violet/rose/lime ink on dark water. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27 #3** ("WebGPU compute collapsed 6×→1× … force a real GPU-compute path; make the sim the resonating BODY, not a 2D plot you read a pitch off of") — the **simulation itself is the instrument**: a real GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion field grows, splits, and blooms, and its shape is the sound (echoing the lab's friction/plate physical-instrument lineage on the kids lane). **How it works:** two invisible "chemicals" update on the GPU each frame by the Gray-Scott rule (`A' = A + (Da∇²A − A·B² + f(1−A))·dt`, `B' = B + (Db∇²B + A·B² − (k+f)B)·dt`; 9-point Laplacian; tuning `dA=1.0/dB=0.5/f=0.0367/k=0.0649` in the "coral/mitosis" Pearson zone so seeded spots grow and split). A fingertip is a splat pass painting `B≈0.9`. **Sonification (the field IS the instrument):** `readPixels` stalls the GPU, so ~10×/sec a GPU blit downsamples the 256×256 field to a tiny **32×32** float texture read once; pure `summarizeField()` turns 1024 values into coverage/activity/centroid/per-region-growth → coverage drives chord-bed gain + voice-count (sparse=root+fifth, full bloom=4-note voicing), spread-rate brightens a lowpass (700–3900 Hz), centroid soft-pans, new-spot regions fire soft consonant bells (≤2 at once). **The harmony is real, not pentatonic:** an always-on ambient pad + a moving functional **I–vi–IV–V loop in C** (each chord ~7.5s, crossfaded), bells from a C-major scale chosen to stay consonant over the loop. **Kids-safe chain:** `master 0.26 → lowpass 6500Hz → DynamicsCompressor(−10/20:1) → destination`; soft 20ms attacks; always-on pad so it's never silent; every touch = visible ink + soft blip <50ms. **Degrades to always-sound:** no `EXT_color_buffer_float` → amber notice + Canvas2D CPU Gray-Scott on a 96×96 grid running the *same* `stepCell` rule (still grows real Turing patterns, still reads back, still sings); WebGL context-loss caught; full unmount teardown (rAF + readback timer + GL programs/textures/FBOs + `loseContext()` + AudioContext close). **Imperative ref-driven render loop** (no per-frame setState — avoids the 60-re-renders/sec antipattern; React state only for mode/started/error). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [touch-seeding + GPU RD sim + readback-sonification + audio synth + display shader = 5] · #3 named refs [**Alan Turing, *The Chemical Basis of Morphogenesis*, 1952**; **John Pearson**, Gray-Scott regime catalogue, 1993; **Karl Sims' Reaction-Diffusion Tutorial** — the 9-point Laplacian weights + A/B feed-kill formulation are his]; #5 in-README dated RESEARCH §584). #1 NOT claimed (RD appears 6× in the lab — though never as a sonified GPU-compute kids body); #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-as-primary-output (audit 6×/10), mic-pitch-detection (969/972 redundant per JURY), tilt-ball-physics (974/995), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (JURY kids-side), MediaPipe-hand-tracking+WebGPU-particle-cloud (1008 just shipped)]` · `picked=[**touch-seeding INPUT** (common, but the technique+output carry the diversity), **GPU-reaction-diffusion-FIELD OUTPUT** (anti-Canvas2D, the scarce jury-encouraged compute surface), **Gray-Scott-RD-sonified-as-it-grows TECHNIQUE**, **bioluminescent-ink VIBE** (off garden/meadow/cosmic), **real I–vi–IV–V harmony** not pentatonic]` — clears every ban. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; zero network/AI/mic/camera/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 54s`** → Linting + type-check PASS → reached `Collecting page data`; grep-clean — no `1015`/`ink-garden` warning or error); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **Headless-VERIFIED** (the rare win): 13 `sim.test.ts` tests pass on the pure Gray-Scott + sonification math (`stepCell`, `summarizeField`, coverage/activity/centroid/bell mappings). **NOT ear/GPU-verified** (no audio/WebGL2 device in the box — unverified: audible bed/bell balance, the live float-texture RD bloom on a real GPU, `readPixels` float-readback on iPad Safari; the Canvas2D CPU-RD fallback + always-on pad + 2s-idle auto-demo are the always-sounding net). **Winner of a kids WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1014-kids-breath-flute` ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** — the lab's FIRST **jet-drive digital-waveguide flute** (Cook/Smith STK; grep ≈0× wind/jet model): blow/hum into the mic (breath RMS envelope, NOT pitch-detection) to play a glowing aurora air-column, tap big recorder-holes for G-Mixolydian pitch, harder breath = brighter/overblow; shipped with a **passing headless `selfTest()`** (7 notes oscillate, bounded, ±57¢, no octave errors) + AudioWorklet/ScriptProcessor/tap-puff/auto-demo fallbacks — lost only on mic-permission 06:30 friction. Plus **`1016-kids-scarf-choir`** — wave a scarf/hands in front of the camera and **optical-flow motion-energy** (Lucas-Kanade-style, NOT silhouette/landmarks) conducts an I–vi–IV–V choir on WebGL aurora ribbons (finger-wave pointer fallback + auto-demo; frames processed locally). Both `cp`'d to scratchpad `dream-losers-584/` then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed); seeds → IDEAS §584. ## Cycle 583 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 divergent pure-timbre explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1011-fm-aurora](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1011-fm-aurora) — **"FM Aurora": tilt your phone through a 2-D timbre-space and sculpt a 6-operator FM synthesizer live — a soft D-Lydian arpeggio plays itself while a luminous chrome spectral ridge sprouts more and more sidebands as you move.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean + **11 headless `fm.ts` tests pass**; not ear/GPU-verified) · Cycle 583 (adult, **WIDE** fire — winner of 3 orthogonal pure-timbre explorers: this FM×tilt vs `1012-fold-tide` wavefolder×mic vs `1013-mantra-glass` ring-mod×his-piano). **For**: adult / bright DX7-chrome / **device-orientation TILT** input (gamma→modulator:carrier ratio {0.5,1,1.5,2,3,3.5,7}, beta→modulation index 0→12; pointer-drag + ~2s-idle auto-demo fallbacks) / hand-written **WebGL2** spectral-ridge + orbiting-operator-graph (Canvas2D fallback) / cyan-magenta chrome aurora. **The lab's FIRST FM (frequency-modulation) synthesis engine** — grep-0× as a core technique across 1000+ prototypes (only the ancient `10-strange` ever touched FM; Chowning never credited). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-27 #1** ("retire the explainable-inverse formula for a week — do *pure timbre*, noise, rhythm, or spatial presence; the 4–5/5 builds LEAD WITH A NOVEL TECHNIQUE") and **#4 / verification-debt** (the jury's #1 standing liability — this is the only candidate of the fire shipped with a passing headless test suite). **The engine:** `fm.ts` is pure, DOM/audio-free, unit-tested math — the tilt→timbre mapping, ratio snapping, the **analytic FM spectrum via Bessel functions `J_k(I)`** (sidebands at `fc ± k·fm`), a spectral-centroid readout, the DX7-style algorithm table, and the arpeggio note set. **Three operator algorithms (DX7-style routings):** `2-OP` (`M→C`), `3-STACK` (`M2→M1→C`, cascaded → clangier), `PARALLEL` (three modulated carriers voiced as a chord). **Audio:** Web Audio FM voices (`OscillatorNode` modulator → `GainNode(=index·modFreq)` → carrier `.frequency`), per-note ADSR, master → `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; the arpeggio auto-plays so it always sounds. **Render:** a hand-written WebGL2 aurora wash + spectral ridge (`AnalyserNode.getFloatFrequencyData`, energy visibly spreads into higher partials as the index rises) + operator graph (carriers glow cyan-white, modulators magenta, links pulse with the index); Canvas2D fallback with a `text-rose-300` notice. **Degrades to always-sound:** no gyroscope / iOS permission denied → pointer-drag over the canvas through the same 2-D space; do nothing → a ~2s-idle LFO auto-sweep morphs the timbre on its own (a guaranteed sounding+morphing 06:30 phone glance). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [first FM-synthesis-as-core in the lab; grep-0× / Chowning-0×] · #2 ≥3 subsystems [device-orientation input + 6-op FM synth engine + Bessel spectral analysis/centroid + WebGL2 spectrum-and-operator-graph render = 4] · #3 named refs [**John Chowning, "The Synthesis of Complex Audio Spectra by Means of Frequency Modulation," JAES 21(7), 1973**; the **Yamaha DX7** (1983) 6-operator/32-algorithm UI]; #5 in-README dated RESEARCH §583). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). **diversity:** `banned=[physics-simulation-as-resonating-body (audit 5×/10: 988/995/1005/1006/1008), pointer/touch-as-primary-input (audit ~4×), computer-keyboard/MIDI-as-primary-adult-input (JURY), the "explainable-inverse-of-an-opaque-neural-frontier" conceptual move (JURY), engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment + dark-forge adult vibe (JURY/audit)]` · `picked=[**device-orientation TILT INPUT** (non-pointer, non-keyboard, phone-native), **WebGL2 spectral/operator-graph OUTPUT** (rich geometry, not a flat full-screen noise shader), **FM-synthesis pure-timbre TECHNIQUE** (NOT a physics sim, NOT a harmony/theory explainer), **DX7-chrome cyan-magenta VIBE** (off forge/parchment/cosmic/meadow)]` — clears every ban. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; zero network/AI/mic/camera/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 43s`** → Linting + type-check PASS → reached static-gen; grep-clean — no `1011`/`fm-aurora` warning or error in the build log, `"use client"` line 1, back-link present); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; ## Cycle 582 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1008-kids-hand-cloud](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1008-kids-hand-cloud) — **"Hand Cloud": wave your bare hands in front of the webcam to conduct a glowing, singing cloud of light — no touching the screen. Open your hand and the cloud blooms; pinch (thumb + index) and the particles gather into a bright chiming star.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean; not GPU/camera/CDN-verified) · Cycle 582 (kids, **WIDE** fire — winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this camera×WebGPU-particles vs `1009-kids-balloon-breath` mic×SVG×verlet vs `1010-kids-tide-pool` tilt×WebGPU-shallow-water). **For**: kids (4+) / bright aurora cloud / **camera HAND-TRACKING** input (MediaPipe `HandLandmarker`, runtime CDN `import()`, no package.json change — breaks the lab's touch reflex; 0× in the last-10 window) / **WebGPU `@compute` particle field** output (Canvas2D CPU fallback) / luminous violet-cyan. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27 #3** ("WebGPU compute collapsed 6×→1× … force a real GPU-compute path; make the sim the resonating BODY") rebuilt on the **kids** lane, and the freshest *input* of the window (camera-hands, off the 4× pointer/touch reflex). **How it works:** MediaPipe reads up to 2 hands × 21 3D landmarks over the webcam → per hand we derive attractor points (wrist + 5 fingertips), an **openness** value (fingertip spread / palm width) and a **pinch** value (thumb-tip↔index-tip / palm width). **GPU path (the swing):** a real WGSL `@compute @workgroup_size(64)` kernel advects **120k particles** in a storage buffer — curl-noise flow + pull/swirl toward the nearest hand attractor (pinch → a single strong gather point) — then an instanced additive render pipeline draws them; open palm raises pull+swirl (bloom), pinch raises swirl hard (gather→star). **Fallback (first-class):** no WebGPU → a **~3.2k-particle CPU integrator with the same forces** drives an additive (`lighter`) Canvas2D trail; no camera / CDN model / permission → **ghost-hand Lissajous auto-demo** (~2s) drifts invisible hands so the cloud always lives and sings; no audio → `text-rose-300` notice, visuals still animate. **Audio (no wrong notes):** field features map to a **C-major-pentatonic** voice pool over a soft C2+G2 drone — cloud centroid height → pitch, swirl-energy EMA → brightness/density, a pinch rings a bright bell an octave up; kids-safe `masterGain ≤0.22 → lowpass ≤6500Hz → DynamicsCompressor(−10/20)`, ramped, silent at rest. **Imperative ref-driven render loop** (no per-frame setState — avoids the 60-re-renders/sec antipattern). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [first MediaPipe-hand-tracking → WebGPU-`@compute` particle field in the lab; **Bridson curl-noise** (SIGGRAPH 2007); **Memo Akten** particle-flow]; #5 also arguably hit — RESEARCH §582 today). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-input (4×), computer-keyboard/MIDI (JURY), raw-WebGL2-as-primary-output (6×), Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-only (JURY)]` · `picked=[**camera-hand-tracking INPUT** (fresh 0×/10, breaks the touch reflex), **WebGPU-compute particle-field OUTPUT** (the scarce jury-encouraged compute surface — rebuilds the 6×→1× collapse, NOT raw-WebGL2), **curl-noise GPU particle-advection TECHNIQUE**, **bright-aurora-cloud kids VIBE**]` — clears every ban. **Love-aligned:** the loved camera/hand-kids cluster (`234-kids-hand-creature`❤️/`104-kids-mirror-draw`❤️/`101-camera-song`❤️/`217-dance-avatar`❤️) + the loved GPU-particle-cloud cluster (`130-tsl-particle-compute`❤️/`236-particle-life-song`❤️/`262-aurora-particle`❤️). **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; ## Cycle 581 — **adult** build · DEEP, 2 engine approaches [WebGPU-compute vs deterministic-modal], shipped 1

[/dream/1006-modal-anvil](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1006-modal-anvil) — **"Modal Anvil": strike a row of glowing metal plates in a dark forge — the sound you hear is the LITERAL motion of a GPU-simulated vibrating plate, read back at a pickup point; a hard strike blooms sharp then glides DOWN in pitch as it rings, the way real bronze does.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean; not GPU/ear-verified) · Cycle 581 (adult, **DEEP** fire — winner of 2 engine approaches: this genuine WebGPU-`@compute` finite-difference plate w/ GPU→audio readback vs. `1007-modal-anvil-modal` the deterministic non-linear modal bank + Chladni viz). **For**: adult / dark industrial forge ritual / **pointer/touch STRIKE** input (velocity = strike force; ~2s-idle ghost-hammer auto-demo) / raw **WebGL2** lit-metal heightfield (Canvas2D fallback) / molten-metal charcoal→white-hot. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27 #3** ("WebGPU compute collapsed 6×→1× … force a real GPU-compute path; make the sim the instrument's resonating BODY") and the praised **"sound IS physics" lane (960-cristal-friction / 970-tension-gong)** — and the **deepening §579's banked `1001-modal-anvil` explicitly promised** ("cycle-2 = close the GPU→audio readback loop"). Deliberately retires the jury-banned adult formula (NOT a music-theory explainer, NOT keyboard input, NOT ink-on-parchment, NOT flat-Canvas2D-only). **The PDE:** a damped stiff Kirchhoff–Love thin plate `u_tt = -κ²·∇⁴u − 2σ₀·u_t + σ₁·∇²u_t + excitation` (biharmonic ∇⁴ = discrete Laplacian twice → the inharmonic *metal* spectrum; σ₀ overall ring, σ₁ frequency-dependent so bright modes decay first). **The non-linear pitch-bloom (genuinely emergent, no scripted envelope):** the stiffness/tension coefficient is scaled by `(1 + β·E)` where E is the plate's running normalised vibrational energy — a hard strike → high E → higher effective κ² → sharper pitch at impact, gliding down as energy decays (von Kármán tension modulation); stability via `E`-clamp + a hard in-shader `k2 ≤ 0.052` clamp. **GPU path (the swing):** a real WGSL `@compute` shader (9 GPU markers grep-verified — `@compute`/`@workgroup_size`/`createComputePipeline`/`requestAdapter`/`mapAsync`) runs the FD update over a 96×96 grid in **ping-ponged prev/curr/next storage buffers**, **800 substeps/frame** (~48k pickup samples/s ≈ audio rate), the shader appending one real per-substep pickup sample via an atomic slot counter; **the GPU→audio loop:** each frame async-`mapAsync` reads that block of real simulated pickup samples (one frame behind, non-blocking), sums the 4 plates, and posts it to an **AudioWorklet** ring-buffer that resamples it to the hardware rate — so the speaker cone literally follows the simulated plate (honest compromise, documented: per-frame-block delivery, not per-sample round-trips). **Fallback (the verification-debt mitigant — first-class, not degraded):** no WebGPU → a **full per-sample CPU finite-difference plate runs inside the AudioWorklet** (34×34 grid, same PDE + same non-linear tension term + same k2 clamp), so the audio is STILL real plate physics that self-oscillates + decays, driving the same render — selected automatically by feature detection; no WebGL2 → Canvas2D field; no Web Audio → `text-rose-300` notice, visuals still animate. **Audio safety:** readback DC-blocked + soft-clipped in the worklet, `gain 0.28 → lowpass ~7kHz → DynamicsCompressor(−12dB/16:1) → destination`; silent at rest. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [a genuine WebGPU `@compute` FD acoustic plate as the resonating BODY with a GPU→audio readback loop — grep-0× in the lab; prior compute pieces 988/992 were particle sims, never an FD plate read back to audio] · #2 ≥4 subsystems [pointer-strike input + WebGPU-compute FD plate sim + GPU→audio worklet readback + WebGL2 lit-metal render] · #3 named refs [**Stefan Bilbao, _Numerical Sound Synthesis_** (Wiley 2009, FD plate scheme); Kirchhoff–Love / von Kármán non-linear plate; **arXiv:2603.10240** "nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis" Mar 2026; **arXiv:2505.05940** Diaz & Sandler, "Fast Differentiable Modal Simulation of Non-linear … Plates", DAFx 2025] · #5 in-README dated RESEARCH §581 citation). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship; multi-cycle deepening seeded). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH §581 (this week's cs.SD frontier is *entirely* neural — TTS/codecs/music-gen, zero physical wave-propagation synthesis — so a transparent GPU-physics plate is the contrarian on-mandate build) + the §579 nlm anchor → JURY 2026-06-27 #3 (GPU-compute scarcity) → this adult **DEEP** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[computer-keyboard/MIDI-as-primary-adult-input (JURY), Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-ONLY → force GPU-compute/3D (JURY), explainable-inverse-of-opaque-neural conceptual move (JURY), engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment adult vibe (JURY)]` · `picked=[**pointer/touch-STRIKE INPUT** (not keyboard), **WebGPU-compute FD plate + GPU→audio readback OUTPUT** (the scarce jury-encouraged compute surface, rebuilding the 6×→1× collapse — NOT flat-Canvas2D/fragment-only), **non-linear FD-plate physical-modeling TECHNIQUE** (pure timbre/percussion, NOT a music-theory explainer), **dark-industrial molten-forge VIBE** (NOT parchment/cosmic/meadow)]` — clears every ban. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; no network/AI/mic/camera/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2 + WebGPU only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 2.4min`** → Linting + type-check PASS → reached **`Collecting page data`**; ## (Cycle 579 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 explorers [touch / live-data / mic], shipped 1)

[/dream/1002-sun-organ](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1002-sun-organ) — **"Sun Organ": Resonance plays the Sun — an endless, non-looping ambient drone + aurora composed in real time from LIVE NOAA space-weather data, so the music is literally different every minute because it tracks the actual solar wind and Earth's magnetic field right now.** `demoable` · Cycle 579 (adult, WIDE fire — winner of 3 explorers; chosen on the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt — the only build with a core claim verified in-box, and the cleanest 06:30 artifact: it auto-plays with zero permission and no GPU-compile risk). **For**: adult / **live external data** input (NOAA SWPC + synthetic fallback; no kbd / mic / camera / pointer) / **raw WebGL2 aurora curtain** (Canvas2D fallback) / luminous calm, grounded in real data. **Real-world-data sonification + long-form-with-memory — two thin lab categories at once, and the freshest concept in months (breaks the spatial-rooms + struck-string groove).** On Start (or ~2s idle auto-start) it fetches three CORS-open, key-less NOAA SWPC JSON feeds — solar-wind **plasma** (speed/density), **mag** (Bz), **planetary K-index** (Kp) — and polls every 60s (**live fetch verified end-to-end in-environment: 505.2 km/s, Bz +0.35 nT, Kp 2 on 2026-06-28**; defensive parsing handles both the array-of-arrays plasma/mag shape and the array-of-objects Kp shape). **Mapping** (calm, no wrong notes): solar-wind speed → texture agitation + aurora brightness; **Bz southward → tension** (low drone opens, detuned beating); density → number of audible voices; Kp → a rising high-shimmer swell + aurora height. **Long-form memory:** a wandering tonal centre that drifts slowly + a slow "breath" LFO mean the harmonic state keeps evolving even when the data is steady — it never loops, different at minute 5 than minute 1; voices are an open just-intoned Dorian-ish field (`1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 16/9, 2, 9/4`) over a feedback-delay smear. **Degrades** to a synthetic solar-wind generator (summed sines + bounded random walks) with an `text-amber-300/95` notice if the feed is unreachable — audio + visual run with zero network. Refs: Helioradar AV (live NOAA → infinite ambient, 2026); NASA SVS "Helio Big Year" sonifications; DATASONICA (2026 Data Sonification Award). Research-chained to RESEARCH §579. Files: `page.tsx` (809 lines), `README.md`. **Two siblings explored + banked (IDEAS §579):** `1001-modal-anvil` ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST adult (strike a GPU-compute non-linear-modal metal plate — real `@compute` WGSL finite-difference plate sim as the resonating body, partials bend pitch with strike force; the directest answer to jury #3) + `1003-voice-nebula` (sing → your voice scattered into a 24k-particle granular nebula + self-harmonized choir).

## (Cycle 578 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 explorers [mic / camera / touch], shipped 1)

[/dream/1000-kids-bubble-harp](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1000-kids-bubble-harp) — **"Bubble Harp": a calm underwater aquarium of glowing bubbles, each a REAL plucked string — tap one and it rings + wobbles + blooms; drag across several to strum a glissando harp.** `demoable` · Cycle 578 (kids, WIDE fire — winner of 3 explorers; chosen on verification debt — the only no-permission, instantly-verifiable one). **For**: kids (4+) / **touch tap + drag** input / **raw WebGL2** (Canvas2D fallback) / calm teal→amber aquarium. **The "sound is real physics" lane (960/970) ported to a 4-year-old:** every bubble is a genuine **Karplus-Strong** plucked string — an AudioWorklet (loaded self-contained via Blob URL) runs the real 1983 delay-line + averaging-filter feedback algorithm excited by a soft noise burst (an offline-buffer fallback uses the same loop when the worklet is unavailable), NOT a sampled or oscillator pluck. **Mapping:** 16 bubbles tuned to **D-major pentatonic** across 3 octaves (size ↔ pitch, big = low/long, no wrong notes); tap → pluck + soft-body squash-and-stretch wobble + glow bloom; drag → per-bubble glissando strum (re-pluck lockout); light soft-body collisions (squash, never a violent pop), off-top respawn for infinite calm play; always-on drone + filtered-noise water pad so it's never silent. **Kids-safe:** `gain 0.26 → lowpass 6500 → comp(−10/20:1)`, √-voice normalization so mashing taps stays safe, 72px Start gesture-gates the AudioContext + worklet synchronously (iOS). After ~1.8s idle a ghost-finger auto-demo taps + strums through the identical pipeline. Ref: Karplus & Strong, "Digital Synthesis of Plucked-String and Drum Timbres" (Computer Music Journal, 1983). Files: `page.tsx` (852 lines, inline KS worklet), `README.md`. **Two siblings explored + banked (IDEAS §578):** `998-kids-firefly-hum` ⭐ (hum → WebGPU-compute firefly flock, the flock's coordination IS the chord — research-chained to arXiv:2606.24958) + `999-kids-shadow-zoo` (your camera shadow becomes a singing creature, dependency-free frame-diff silhouette).

## (Cycle 576 — **kids** build · DEEP, 2 engine approaches, shipped 1)

[/dream/995-kids-moon-trampoline](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/995-kids-moon-trampoline) — **"Moon Trampoline": tilt a tablet like a tray and roll a glowing moon-ball across a springy TRAMPOLINE OF STARS — the stretching cloth itself rings like a soft drum, because the sheet's own simulated vibration modes ARE the sound.** `demoable` · Cycle 576 (kids, DEEP fire — winner of 2 engine approaches; resurrects the §574 ⭐ `989-kids-star-cloth` seed). **For**: kids (4+) / **device-tilt** input / **hand-written TRUE-3D WebGL2** (the lab's FIRST true-3D scene-graph build — jury 2026-06-27: "true 3D scene-graph work is 0×") / calm indigo starry-night bedtime. **The most literal "the physical simulation IS the resonating body"** — the 960-cristal-friction "timbre is physics" standard ported to a 4-year-old toy. **Physics:** a 24×24 Provot mass-spring cloth (structural + shear + bend springs, Verlet + PBD relaxation passes + Provot's over-elongation cap, four corners pinned) on the CPU/main thread — **no WebGPU dependency, so it runs on any phone or laptop browser** (the verification-safe twin of the banked WebGPU sibling). A moon-ball rolls under tilt and dents the sheet (sphere-vs-cloth push-out). **Render:** own `perspective`/`lookAt` matrices (no three.js), a camera that gently orbits so the sheet visibly stretches toward/away in depth — reads as a real 3D scene, gold/white star-glints at the nodes over a deep-indigo starfield, a soft additive moon-ball. **Audio (Eb-major lullaby, no wrong notes):** membrane-mode synthesis — **dent depth bends the low fundamental DOWN** (real tension-modulation physics: partials shift at large membrane amplitude, per Avanzini & Marogna), **ripple energy** opens higher drum-skin modes (partials ≈1/1.59/2.14/2.30/2.65), **settle** = a sustained warm chord, **bounce** = a soft bloom; always-on Eb+Bb drone (never silent), kids-safe `gain ≤0.26 → lowpass 6500 → comp(−10/20:1)`, ≥30ms attacks, ~12-min goodnight fade. **Input chain:** `DeviceOrientationEvent` (iOS `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap) → pointer-drag → arrow keys/space → ~2s-idle auto-demo (moon drifts a slow circle so it's always moving + singing). Refs: Provot (1995) mass-spring cloth; Avanzini & Marogna membrane-percussion synthesis; arXiv:2507.11794 (WebGPU cloth feasibility). Files: `page.tsx`, `cloth.ts`, `renderer.ts`, `gl-math.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`.

CPU 1-D mass-spring chain integrated with the discrete wave equation `a_i = (k/m)·(u_{i+1}−2u_i+u_{i−1}) − damping·v_i`, fixed–fixed boundaries → clean integer harmonic series `f_n = n·c/2L` (inherently consonant); a flick injects a Gaussian compression pulse that propagates, reflects off both pinned ends, and relaxes into stationary nodes/antinodes. **Audio = the physics:** the displacement field is projected onto the fixed–fixed mode shapes `sin(nπi/N)` (n=1..8) driving an additive harmonic-series oscillator bank that swells when excited and decays as the wave damps — the fundamental literally IS the spring's resonance; grab-point snaps the fundamental to **D major pentatonic** (no wrong notes), always-on breathing drone (never silent), mandatory kids-safe chain `gain ≤0.26 → lowpass ~6500 Hz → DynamicsCompressor(−10/20:1)`, soft attacks, per-voice normalization. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**longitudinal compression-wave standing modes** — grep-0× as a lab technique;
