## (Cycle 527 — **adult** build · DEEP, 2 renderer approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/877-biosphere-score](/dream/877-biosphere-score)** — *"Biosphere Score": every bird, mammal, insect and fungus just observed on Earth becomes an orchestra — the live **GBIF** biodiversity feed decides which taxonomic **section** plays when. Each observation brings its section's voice in; pitch is **always** a scale-degree quantized to that section's register band against a slowly-modulating modal scale, so it stays harmonic by construction — the data shapes the **ensemble and the form, never the detuned pitch of a note.*** A deliberately **structural** sonification (the jury's standing #3 ask: stop mapping a feed to "roughness fouls the harmony" — sonify who-plays-when/form instead); a sibling lab piece (`233-earth-pulse`) already does note-per-datum, so this is different *in kind*. Taxonomic class → orchestra section in its own **acoustic-niche register band** (birds→bright flute/high, mammals→cello/low-mid, insects→pizzicato ticks, plants→sustained pad, fungi→sub-drone, herps→mid pluck, fish→watery bell) — **Bernie Krause's acoustic-niche hypothesis as orchestration**; temporal **clustering**→rhythmic density; cumulative taxonomic **richness**→a long-form arc (fuller/brighter over minutes — minute 5 ≠ minute 1); longitude→stereo pan; scale modulates ~every 36s. INPUT external-data (GBIF, keyless + CORS-open) + pointer-to-solo-a-section · OUTPUT **Canvas2D** (0× in the last 10 ships + **jury-re-legitimized** this window — the freshest legit surface; raw-WebGL2 was jury-HARD-banned as the new 6-of-15 monoculture) · TECHNIQUE data→musical-FORM/who-plays-when structural sonification · PALETTE living-biosphere / soundscape-ecology / aurora-dark. Safety `master 0.22 → lowpass → comp(−10,20:1)`, always-on ambient pad (never silent), ≥30ms attacks, analyser off master, iOS gesture-gated Start. Degrades: live fetch fails/offline → seamless curated 40-occurrence fallback + hands-free auto-demo sees+hears within ~1s; no Web Audio → visuals only. Full teardown. Refs: **Bernie Krause (*Great Animal Orchestra*) · Andrea Polli · *Data Melodification FM* (arXiv 2510.00222)** — the last **cited in the README itself** (criterion #5, the jury's 0-for-15 provocation, finally landed). Ambition 3/5 (#2 ≥3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 dated-research-in-README). **Status: demoable** (compile/type/lint-clean; not device/ear-verified — container has no audio; review device runs the labeled offline auto-demo). · *1 more explored — the **WebGPU** globe twin `878-biosphere-globe` (WGSL @compute particle globe, same structure engine) banked to IDEAS §527 as the WebGPU resurrect-first; de-selected on Canvas2D-diversity + robustness, not quality.*

## ⭐ (Cycle 526 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/874-kids-frost-garden](/dream/874-kids-frost-garden)** — *"Frost Garden": a 4-year-old TOUCHES the dark screen to plant glowing seeds, and a luminous magic coral/frost-tree grows outward **on its own** — every newly-frozen sparkle-tip ringing a soft pentatonic chime, the garden swelling a warm drone as it fills. A calm, endless bedtime garden of light.* The branching is a **genuine diffusion-limited-aggregation sim** (Witten & Sander, 1981 — the physics of frost-on-glass, coral, lightning): ~420 random-walking "walker" particles stick irreversibly on contact with the aggregate, so the dendritic structure *emerges* from the local rule, never hand-drawn. Tap/drag plants seeds + pulls nearby walkers toward your finger (branches reach for you); multiple colonies grow and merge. **Lab-first technique** (DLA grep-0× across 481 prototypes) and the first **DLA-as-instrument** anywhere in 2026 (verified unexplored). INPUT touch (0× in last 10 shipped — the starved input) · OUTPUT hand-written **WebGL2 / GLSL ES 3.00** additive `gl.POINTS` glow (deep-dusk gradient + indigo→teal→gold height palette + fresh-stick flash; NOT three.js — three.js was 4×-banned this cycle) · TECHNIQUE diffusion-limited aggregation · PALETTE calm bedtime / bioluminescent. Kids-safe `master 0.26 → lowpass 6000 → comp(−10,20:1)`, height-mapped C-pentatonic chimes (≤8/s token-bucket, no wrong notes), always-on swelling C2+G2+C3 drone, analyser off master. iOS gesture-gated Start (≥72px). Degrades: untouched ~1.5s → auto-seeds + chimes hands-free within ~1s; no WebGL2 → `text-rose-300` notice, audio survives. Full teardown. Ref: **Witten & Sander (1981)**. Ambition 3/5 (#1 DLA never-used + #2 ≥3 subsystems + #3 named ref + touches #5 RESEARCH §526). **Status: demoable** (compile/type/lint-clean; not device-verified — container has no GPU/audio/touch). · *2 more explored — Gielis-superformula `875-kids-shell-creature` + WebGL2 `876-kids-shadow-zoo` — banked in IDEAS §526.*

## (Cycle 525 — **adult** build · DEEP, 1 concept × 2 GPU approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/872-living-topology](/dream/872-living-topology)** — Living Topology 🌀🔊. `demoable` · Cycle 525 (adult / feedback-instrument / long-form generative). **For**: adults · **pointer + sliders INPUT** (no camera/mic — the dynamical system *is* the content; dodges the jury's touch+mic-only over-rep) · **three.js OUTPUT** (2×/10 — the freshest GPU surface; shipping it kept WebGPU off a 4th-night monoculture; Canvas2D stays HARD-banned, raw-WebGL2 at the 4× audit-ban) · **chaotic-attractor-driven self-rewiring coupling topology** technique (lab-first) · **adult dynamical-system / feedback-instrument vibe**. **What if a feedback instrument's coupling topology REWIRED ITSELF over minutes, steered by a chaotic attractor — so the network reorganizes and the sound never repeats?** **Cycle 3 of the `820-feedback-ecology` thread** and the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** ("develop what you have instead of always opening a new tab — ship 820's cycle-2 [Lorenz-drifting coupling weights so the topology evolves] or push 837 deeper"). 11 high-Q `BiquadFilter` bandpass resonators tuned to the **overtone series on A1** (~55 Hz), each in a `filter → delay → feedbackGain → filter` loop, cross-coupled through a small-world adjacency matrix (ring backbone always present + chaos-gated shortcuts). In 820 that matrix was **STATIC**; here a **Lorenz attractor** (σ=10, ρ=28, β=8/3, dt=0.005) is integrated each frame and its evolving (x,y,z) state continuously rewires the coupling: **z→global density, x→a rotating active-arc over the shortcut chords, y→backbone/shortcut weighting** — connections strengthen and fade, node-pairs trade dominance, and the emergent drone reorganizes and **never repeats** (long-form generative; minute 5 ≠ minute 1). Because the chaotic drift runs on its own, the piece **evolves with zero input**. The signature visual makes the driver legible: 11 glowing nodes on a Fibonacci sphere, an orbiting camera, additive edges whose brightness/pulses track **live weight × energy**, and a faint **gold Lorenz ghost-curve + live bead** drifting at center that the topology visibly tracks. **Ear-safety:** every path ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (−8 dB, 20:1) → master gain (default 0.22) → destination; self-feedback ramp-clamped to 0.78 (below divergence); 2 s startup ramp (no blast); panic mute + always-safe master volume always live. **Controls:** coupling density · chaos-drift speed · master volume; "seed network" perturbs all nodes. iOS gesture-gated (AudioContext created/resumed inside the ≥44px "Awaken the Topology" tap). **Degrades fully:** no audio/WebGL → `text-rose-300` notice (no throw). **Auto-demo:** on Start with no interaction, seeded impulses + the Lorenz drift make it sound + animate within ~1 s, so an unattended 06:30 glance SEES and HEARS it evolve hands-free. Full teardown (rAF cancel + dispose geometries/materials + `renderer.dispose()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route → no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (three.js is already a project dep). Ambition honest **3/5** (#4 multi-cycle [820 thread cycle-3] · #1 never-used technique [chaotic-attractor-driven self-rewiring topology — 820's matrix was static; grep-0× prior] · #3 named refs [**Edward Lorenz, "Deterministic Nonperiodic Flow" 1963** · the **2026** *Chaos, Solitons & Fractals* paper on synchronization of coupled Lorenz oscillators on **Watts-Strogatz small-world networks** (pii S0577907326001188) · **David Tudor *Rainforest*** / **Toshimaru Nakamura** no-input mixing as feedback-instrument lineage]). **Source:** §525 dive (the 2026 Watts-Strogatz/Lorenz-sync paper → invert it: let a Lorenz system *drive* the small-world coupling graph) → AGENT.md paths (a) implement the dive hook + (b) develop the 820 multi-cycle thread → adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit, last 10 = 849,853,856,859,862,864,866,868,869)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D (HARD) · OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 (4×/10 audit-ban) · INPUT touch+mic-only · recently-used camera/MediaPipe inputs]` · `picked (winner 872)=[pointer+sliders INPUT (no camera/mic) · three.js OUTPUT (2×/10, freshest GPU; keeps WebGPU off a 4-night monoculture) · chaotic-attractor self-rewiring-topology TECH (lab-first) · adult feedback-instrument vibe]` — clears every active ban. **DEEP fork (banked, IDEAS §525):** **`873-living-topology-gpu`** ⭐ (the SAME concept on **WebGPU** — a WGSL `@compute` pass swirls a 40k-particle field + integrates the Lorenz driver GPU-resident; instanced additive nodes/edges/ghost-cloud; Canvas2D fallback; **TOP adult RESURRECT-FIRST for the next adult night when WebGPU is scarce** — de-selected on renderer-diversity [would be a 4th WebGPU night] + the Canvas2D fallback path, NOT quality) — built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full brief in IDEAS §525. ⚠️ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully` → Linting and checking validity of types PASS → reached `Collecting page data`**; 872 folder grep-clean of the build log; `npx eslint src/app/dream/872-living-topology/` → 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** — the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the live three.js render, whether the topology rewiring is *audible* (not just visible), and the loudness balance as connections swell; the 2 s ramp + always-on backbone + hands-free auto-demo guarantee a sounding, animating, evolving glance with zero hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/872-living-topology/README.md`

## (Cycle 524 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/868-kids-monster-keys](/dream/868-kids-monster-keys)** — Monster Keys 👹🎹. `demoable` · Cycle 524 (kids / freedom-to-be-wrong / raw WebGL2). **For**: kids (4+) · **on-screen creature-keys + Web MIDI INPUT** (12 big toggle-to-stack keys as the always-available primary; native `requestMIDIAccess` as an optional bonus — MIDI is the scarce stage input, off the jury's touch+mic-only ban) · **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (hand-written additive GLSL ES 3.00 glow-creatures — the SCARCEST GPU surface, 2×/10; shipping it kept three.js [867] off the 4× audit-ban AND avoided a 4th-WebGPU-in-4-cycles monoculture [870]; NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D) · **interval-clash scoring → spawn-a-wobble-monster → resolve-by-consonance** technique · **warm playful friendly-monster vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old had the freedom to play a genuinely WRONG (dissonant) note — and dissonance was a friendly wobbly MONSTER they could CALM by resolving it, instead of a forbidden mistake?** **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-22 #3** — the #1 unfilled kids ask ("give a kid the freedom to be WRONG — dissonance reachable AND resolvable, a real harmonic decision with a consequence; 841 only *gestures* at this, commit to it fully"). **Every one of the 12 chromatic notes always plays** — no pentatonic gating, no lockout, no "wrong note." Tap a glowing creature-key to toggle its note on; tap again to remove — stacking 2–3 builds a chord with no precise multi-touch-hold. When the sounding set contains a **clearly-beating clash** (minor-2nd / major-7th / tritone — `harmony.ts` flags only the LARGE, unmistakable interval classes, per the developmental finding **PMC11336827** that a 4yo perceives consonance preference only with a *large* dissonant contrast), the offending creature grows shivering soft spikes (WebGL) + a **~+6-cent beating partner partial + a 3.2 Hz shimmer LFO** (Web Audio) — the wobble/beating is the **ONLY** change, **never louder, never harsher, never higher**. `suggestResolution` computes the one consonant note (a 3rd / 5th / octave) that removes the clash and that key gently **pulses as a glowing invitation**; adding it settles the monster into a round steady happy creature with a soft bloom reward + a warm resolved chord. Real tension→release, **zero fail state, zero scolding sound**. Kids-safe chain `osc → voiceGain → masterGain(0.26) → BiquadFilter lowpass(6.5kHz) → DynamicsCompressor(−10,20:1) → destination`, ≥40 ms attacks, always-on warm ambient pad (never silent), `AnalyserNode` taps master but never routes to output. iOS gesture-gated: AudioContext + `requestMIDIAccess` both inside the first ≥72px "Play" tap. **Degrades fully:** no AudioContext → `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL2 (or renderer init throws) → `text-rose-300` notice, audio + auto-demo keep playing (keys still sound); no Web MIDI → "tap the keys" status, on-screen keys remain primary (connected/none = "🎹 connected" / "🎹 plug in a keyboard — optional"). **Auto-demo:** untouched ~1.5 s → the page loops the full arc hands-free (sound two clashing notes → a visible+audible wobble-monster spawns → add the resolving 5th → it settles + blooms), so an unattended 06:30 glance SEES and HEARS the spawn-then-calm story within ~1 s with zero hardware. Full teardown (rAF cancel + osc stop + delete GL programs/buffers/VAO/texture + `WEBGL_lose_context.loseContext()` + remove MIDI listeners + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route → no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2; native WebMIDI DOM types — a redundant local shim was deleted). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [on-screen keys + Web MIDI + interval-clash/resolve harmony engine + raw-WebGL2 glow-creatures + ambient pad = 5] · #3 named refs [consonance→dissonance **"tension and release" pedagogy** · **Toca Band** relational-character model · **PMC11336827 (2024)** large-contrast developmental finding]). **Source:** §524 dive (PMC11336827 — 4yos need a LARGE dissonant contrast → tunes the wobble; WebGPU now device-real on iPadOS) → AGENT.md path (c) resurrect the §522 banked `868-kids-monster-keys` re-skinned to raw-WebGL2 per the §522 note → kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit, last 10 = 869,866,864,862,859,856,853,849,847,846)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D (HARD) · always-consonant-morph kids template · touch+mic as ONLY inputs]` · `picked (winner 868)=[keys+Web MIDI INPUT (MIDI scarce, dodges touch-only) · raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarcest GPU, 2×/10) · interval-clash-resolve TECH (genuine dissonance — NOT the banned always-consonant-morph) · playful-monster vibe]` — clears every active ban. **WIDE fork (banked, IDEAS §524):** **`867-kids-shadow-zoo`** ⭐ (whole-body camera frame-diff motion → three.js glowing creature zoo, Myron Krueger *Videoplace*; **TOP kids RESURRECT-FIRST** — de-selected on three.js → 4× audit-ban + freeform-pentatonic register + camera-dependence, love-aligned 104❤️/234❤️, NOT quality) + **`870-kids-ripple-pond`** (tap → WebGPU `@compute` 2D wave height-field whose edge-reflections re-ring chimes; calm bedtime — de-selected because calm was JUST shipped 866 + WebGPU would be 4-in-4 monoculture, NOT quality) — both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS §524. ⚠️ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 2.1min` → Linting and checking validity of types PASS → reached `Collecting page data`**; 868 log-clean of errors — only two non-fatal `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` warnings [stable consts; lint passed *past* them], every other warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** — the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear/hand: the live raw-WebGL2 creature render + the wobble-monster's beating + shivering-spike feel, the MIDI path, and whether a real 4yo reads "calm the wobbly monster" unaided; the always-on pad + the full spawn-then-calm auto-demo guarantee a sounding, animating, story-telling glance with zero hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/868-kids-monster-keys/README.md`

## (Cycle 523 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/869-spatial-grove](/dream/869-spatial-grove)** — Spatial Grove 🌲🎧. `demoable` · Cycle 523 (adult / spatial-installation / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults · **whole-body MediaPipe-Pose INPUT** (torso-x → lateral pan, shoulder-width depth-proxy → walk deeper; the COLD embodied input the jury keeps asking for — body 1×/depth 0× in the window, off the touch+mic 8× over-rep) · **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (a WGSL `@compute` canopy field — the SCARCEST GPU surface, 2× in last 10; clears the HARD Canvas2D ban AND the raw-WebGL2 4× audit-ban) · **HRTF binaural navigation of a fixed field of long-form-evolving generative voices** technique · **installation / forest-at-dusk vibe**. **What if you could physically WALK through a living grove of generative song-trees — your body's lateral position panning you across it and your distance to the camera walking you deeper in — each tree a spatialized, slowly-evolving voice you wander among, never the same twice?** **Answers JURY 2026-06-22 #2** — the loudest standing OPEN adult ask ("build the embodied/spatial prototype the lab keeps deferring — a pose-driven *spatial-audio room*; depth-camera 0×, the whole spatial/installation menu is cold") — with a FRESH concept (not a second motet room): **16 fixed "song-trees"** at static world positions around an `AudioListener` at the origin, each a warm bell/marimba or drone on a soft mode (Lydian/pentatonic) routed through its own **`PannerNode` `panningModel="HRTF"`**; the trees never move — only `listener.positionX/Z` glides via `setTargetAtTime` as your body walks, blooming the nearest tree in your ears. **Long-form evolution:** each tree drifts on a ~25–70 s timer (transpose a scale step / change rhythm density / swap timbre brightness + canopy hue) so the grove at minute 5 differs from minute 1 — never the same twice. **Output = a WGSL `@compute` pass** swirling ~42k particles (2,600/tree) into glowing canopies pulled toward each tree's live bloom, additive point-quads, dusk indigo→violet→warm-gold, nearest tree brightest. iOS gesture-gated: AudioContext resume + `getUserMedia` + MediaPipe init all inside the ≥44px Start tap. **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU → `text-rose-300` notice + a hand-written **WebGL2** grove on the SAME mapping (audio keeps playing); neither → notice, audio still plays; no camera / permission denied / MediaPipe load-fail → notice + an **auto-demo** (a synthetic listener walks a slow figure-8 so voices bloom within ~1s, zero hardware) + pointer-drag manual steering. Full teardown (rAF cancel + camera `track.stop()` + PoseLandmarker close + `GPUDevice.destroy()`/`WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route → no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WGSL + WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D; MediaPipe is a CDN `webpackIgnore` runtime import). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [MediaPipe Pose whole-body tracking + HRTF spatial-audio field of fixed voices + WGSL `@compute`+render canopies + per-tree long-form generative evolution = 4] · #3 named refs [**Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller, *The Forty Part Motet* (2001)** — *inverted*: there the choir is fixed and you walk among it, here the field is fixed and the listener walks · **AudioMiXR** arXiv 2502.02929 + **MoXaRt** arXiv 2603.10465 — 2026 6DoF spatial-audio-object work · **Brian Eno** generative ambient drift]). **#1 NOT claimed (honest):** WebGPU is not lab-first — its value here is being the scarcest surface in the window + the jury's GPU-only target. **Source:** §523 dive (AudioMiXR/MoXaRt spatial-audio-object 6DoF, MotionBeat embodied music) → AGENT.md path (a) implement the dive hook + jury #2 (pose-driven spatial-audio room) → adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit, last 10 = 866,864,862,859,856,853,849,847,846,842)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7×/15 (HARD) · OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 4×/10 (audit-ban threshold) · INPUT touch+mic-only 8×]` · `picked (winner 869)=[whole-body MediaPipe-Pose INPUT (cold — body 1×/depth 0×) · WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (scarcest GPU, 2×/10) · HRTF spatial-navigation TECH · installation vibe]` — clears every active ban. **WIDE fork (banked, IDEAS §523):** **`870-live-accompanist`** ⭐ (Web MIDI + tempo/chord detection → a generative jazz trio that FOLLOWS you — walking bass + comping that track your tempo and chord; three.js club scene; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** — de-selected on three.js → 4× audit-ban + mic over-rep, NOT quality; the directest "live-performance fitness / jazz-responsive arc" answer) + **`871-solar-wind-aurora`** (live NOAA SWPC solar-wind/Kp data → a sonified aurora drone-scape where geomagnetic storms intensify it; WebGPU compute curtains — de-selected to avoid back-to-back data-sonification right after 864, NOT quality) — both built complete + verified clean (eslint 0 / tsc 0), removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS §523. ⚠️ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 34s` → Linting and checking validity of types PASS → reached `Collecting page data`**; 869 folder grep-clean of the build log — zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/869-spatial-grove/` → 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** — the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at static-gen blocks page-data collection (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the HRTF audibility of the pan on headphones, the WGSL canopy bloom on a real GPU, and the shoulder-width→Z depth-proxy range (likeliest tuning need vs a live camera); the auto-demo + pointer fallback + WebGL2 path + always-sounding voices guarantee a sounding, moving glance with zero hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/869-spatial-grove/README.md`

## (Cycle 522 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/866-kids-rainstick-sky](/dream/866-kids-rainstick-sky)** — Rainstick Sky 🌧️✨. `demoable` · Cycle 522 (kids / calm bedtime / WebGPU compute). **For**: kids (4+) · **accelerometer-SHAKE INPUT** (DeviceMotion *jerk* = high-passed change-in-acceleration → shake-energy, explicitly NOT device-orientation tilt — the coldest input in the window, off the jury's touch+mic 8× over-rep, off the recently-used hands/gamepad/tilt) · **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (a WGSL `@compute` rain field — the SCARCEST GPU surface, 1×→2× in last 10, the jury's explicit "make next builds GPU-only, WebGPU 0×" target; clears the HARD Canvas2D ban AND the WebGL2 4× audit-ban threshold) · **shake-bounded density-only granular rain scheduler (auditable safe-envelope)** technique · **calm night-blue bedtime vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could make a calm rainstorm of music by gently SHAKING the tablet like a rainstick — and stillness settles it into a sleepy drone of glowing stars?** **Answers JURY 2026-06-22 #4** (the regressed ask: "bring back a CALM kids piece — 7 of 8 kids builds are bright/warm-active, only 805 is calm") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned → a GPU surface, here the scarcest one). Shake-energy drives **only rain density** (`densityToRate` ~1.2→14 droplets/sec, hard-capped) + drift — **never loudness, never harshness**: a hard shake just makes *more soft drops*, which IS the "auditable safe envelope" (arXiv 2602.22813, Feb 2026). Warm C-pentatonic marimba/bell droplets (≥40ms attacks, no wrong notes) over an always-on C2+G2+C3 drone, all through the fixed kids-safe chain `masterGain(0.26) → BiquadFilter lowpass(6kHz) → DynamicsCompressor(−10,20:1) → destination`; analyser tapped off master, never routed to output. Visual = a **WGSL `@compute` pass integrating 60k falling raindrop/star particles** (gravity + gentle curl wind + wrap-around) → additive glowing point-quads, indigo→violet→warm-gold (stars brighter when calm). iOS gesture-gated: AudioContext + `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` both inside the ≥72px Start-cloud tap. **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU → a hand-written ~3k-particle **WebGL2** version on the SAME shake→density mapping (audio keeps playing); no WebGL2 → `text-rose-300` notice, audio still runs; no motion sensor / desktop → pointer drag-to-"shake" + an **auto-demo** that rains + chimes + drifts on its own within ~1s (a hands-free 06:30 glance both SEES and HEARS it). Full teardown (rAF cancel + remove devicemotion listener + stop drones + `GPUDevice.destroy()`/`WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). No API route → no guard; zero new npm deps (hand-written WGSL + GLSL, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). **Ambition 2/5:** #2 (≥3 subsystems: shake-detection + density chime scheduler + WGSL compute field + WebGL2 fallback = 4) + #3 (named refs: Exploratorium Chilean rainstick · arXiv 2602.22813 I-E-O auditable safe-envelope · Brian Eno generative ambient). **WIDE fire — 2 more explored, banked to IDEAS §522:** `867-kids-shadow-zoo` ⭐ (whole-body camera motion-energy → three.js creatures, Myron Krueger *Videoplace*) + `868-kids-monster-keys` (MIDI/keys → three.js; genuine freedom-to-be-wrong, jury #3).

## Cycle 521 — **adult** build · DEEP, 2 GPU-surface approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/864-marine-gamelan](/dream/864-marine-gamelan)** — Marine Gamelan 🌊🔔. `demoable` · Cycle 521 (adult / live-data sonification / WebGL2). **For**: adults · **live-external-API INPUT** (keyless Open-Meteo Marine wave data, 4 ocean presets — a starved input, only 842 in the last 10; clears the jury's touch+mic 8× over-rep) · **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (a GPU surface — clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban; 3×/10, under the audit-ban threshold) · **modal physical-modeling bronze gamelan + wave-data sonification with audible consequence** technique · **oceanic/Ikeda data-sonification vibe**. **What if the real, live state of the world's oceans played a bronze gamelan — and rough seas audibly DETUNED the metal into a beating clang while calm seas stayed sparse and sweet?** **Resurrects the ⭐ TOP adult RESURRECT-FIRST `860-marine-gamelan` (IDEAS §519)** — answering **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** (the loudest standing adult ask: "stop the banked build from ghosting / develop what you have, don't open a new tab") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned → a GPU surface), and landing the **842-air-veil jury-standout register** (real-world data where rising severity *fouls* the harmony — here rough seas detune the bronze). A keyless, CORS-enabled **Open-Meteo Marine API** fetch (client-side, **no api route, no guard**) pulls live `wave_height/period/direction/swell` for four contrasting presets — **Oahu North Shore · Bay of Biscay · Drake Passage (big seas) · Maldives (calm)** — re-polling every 5 min. One normalized `seaToDrive()` signal feeds BOTH a **modal physical-modeling bronze engine** (each key = a filtered noise exciter → a bank of **high-Q BiquadFilter bandpass resonators** at inharmonic partial ratios `[1, 2.76, 5.4, 8.93]`, slendro/pelög) AND a hand-written **WebGL2 GLSL-ES-3.00 caustic water-light shader** (domain-warped value-noise interference, ridged veins, foam crests, violet strike-bloom) — so sound and image never disagree. **The consequence is the point and it's audible:** a single `roughness` (clamp `wave_height/6`) simultaneously **(a)** densifies strike rate (~0.8→~7/s), **(b)** drops register, **(c)** collapses resonator **Q** (~38 *sings* → ~6 *clangs*), and **(d)** detunes each bronze partial up to **±35¢** — heavy seas beat into a detuned clang, calm seas stay sparse/high/sweet; `period`→tempo+wave-speed, `direction`→pan+shader-drift, `swell`→drone+undulation. **Deepening 1:** a **groove-quantize toggle** snaps strikes to a tempo grid derived from `wave_period` (the swell becomes a GROOVE; off = free Poisson-ish ocean pings). **Deepening 2:** a **dual-sea equal-power crossfade** + its own B-location picker — hear **Drake Passage's storm beating against the Maldives' calm**, each sea driving its own strike stream + roughness. **Ear-safety:** master compressor → brick-wall limiter, 2s fade-in, panic mute, gesture-gated AudioContext in the Start tap (iOS), analyser taps the master for the bloom (never routes to output). **Degrades fully:** fetch fails/blocked → a **synthetic evolving sea** per preset (Drake stays stormy, Maldives stay calm) keeps it sounding + animating within ~1s + a `text-rose-300` "(live feed unavailable — simulated sea)" badge; no WebGL2 → notice, audio keeps playing; no Web Audio → notice, visuals keep running. Full teardown (rAF cancel + abort both fetches + clear intervals + delete GL program/buffers/VAO + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `ctx.close()`). **No API route → no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D — the only `getContext` is `webgl2`, so the main viz is genuinely GPU). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [live fetch + preset state-machine + synthetic fallback · modal bronze synth w/ groove-quantize scheduler · dual-sea crossfade routing · WebGL2 caustic shader = 4–5] · #3 named refs [**gamelan slendro/pelög tuning** · **Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*** data-as-music stance · **Bob Sturm — *Music from the Ocean*** wave-undulation→music data-mappings]; #4 soft — cycle-2 of the 860 thread, the two README-queued deepenings). **Source:** §521 dive (Sturm *Music from the Ocean* / Plymouth wave-tank / WHOI-OOI ocean-sonification lineage) → AGENT.md path (c) IDEAS §519's ⭐ 860 + path (b) continue the 860 thread → adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7× (HARD) · INPUT touch+mic-only 8× · kids vibe (N/A adult)]` · `picked (winner 864)=[live-external-API INPUT (1×/10) · raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (3×/10, under threshold) · wave-data sonification w/ consequence TECH · oceanic/Ikeda vibe]` — clears every active ban. **DEEP fork (banked, IDEAS §521):** **`865-tide-gamelan`** ⭐ (the SAME concept as a **three.js** 3D scene — a CPU-displaced sum-of-sines ocean mesh with a floating emissive bronze gong-field that bobs/tilts/blooms, additive halos, drag-orbit; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** — de-selected on runtime risk [80×80 CPU vertex displacement may want a lower segment count / strike cap on weak mobile] + an approximate strike↔gong mapping, NOT quality) — built complete + eslint/tsc-clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full brief in IDEAS §521. ⚠️ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 111s` → Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS → reached `Collecting page data`**; 864 folder grep-clean — zero warnings, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route, no `getContext("2d")`); **NOT browser/device-verified** — the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by ear: the mix balance + resonator decay tails + the `lvl > 0.32` bloom threshold, and whether the live Open-Meteo schema is identical across all four presets (Oahu's `current` fields verified against a real response; the rest use the identical query shape); the synthetic-sea fallback + always-on limiter + 2s fade guarantee a sounding + animating glance with zero hardware/network.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/864-marine-gamelan/README.md`

## (Cycle 520 — **kids** build · DEEP, 2 rendering approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/862-kids-solfege-signs](/dream/862-kids-solfege-signs)** — Sing With Your Hand ✋🎶. `demoable` · Cycle 520 (kids 4+ / camera-hands / three.js / warm-wondrous). **For**: kids (4+) · **MediaPipe-hands INPUT** (off-glass embodied — the jury's "do something a touchscreen can't"; 1× in the last 10, dodges the touch+mic 8× over-rep) · **three.js OUTPUT** (the SCARCER GPU surface — 2× last 10 vs raw-WebGL2 4×; clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) · **solfège-hand-sign classification → scale-degree choir + call-response** technique (never used in the lab) · **warm-wondrous kids-choir vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could SING A MELODY with their bare hand — making the classic Curwen/Kodály solfège hand-signs in the air (✊ fist = do, ✋ flat hand = mi, 👎 thumb-down = fa, ☝️ point-up = ti …) — and a choir of glowing creature-orbs sang the matching scale degree back?** Real, named music pedagogy (the hand-signs teachers use with children worldwide), made playable by a toddler. **Resurrects the ⭐ TOP kids RESURRECT-FIRST `855-kids-solfege-signs` (IDEAS §518)** — answering **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** ("stop the banked 4/5 from ghosting / ship a banked sibling") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned → a GPU surface). A front-camera **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (CDN `webpackIgnore` runtime import, pinned `tasks-vision@0.10.14`, analysis-only, never bundled) → a geometric **7-sign classifier** (`classify.ts`: per-finger extended/curled booleans + coarse hand orientation → do/re/mi/fa/sol/la/ti) with a **~250 ms dwell** so only a HELD shape rings (flicker never triggers); **hand height** shifts octave + brightness; after **~2 s of stillness** the choir replays the last ~6 signed notes as a gentle tune (the **Kodály echo** call-and-response game). **three.js (v0.182)** choir: 7 **additive-halo glow orbs** in a warm rising arc, color-coded by a consistent pitch→hue palette, the signed orb blooms + lifts with hand height, a faint starfield breathes; a tiny **Canvas2D HUD** draws the live hand skeleton so the child feels "seen" (the ONLY 2D surface). Kids-safe `voices → masterGain(0.26) → BiquadFilter lowpass(6.5kHz) → DynamicsCompressor(−10,20:1) → destination`; always-on soft **open-fifth drone (C+G)** so it's never silent; gentle ≥40 ms attacks; analyser taps the master, never routes to output; **NO wrong notes possible**. **iOS:** AudioContext + getUserMedia both inside the ≥72px Start tap. **Degrades fully:** no camera / permission denied / MediaPipe load-fail → `text-rose-300` notice + a **ghost-hand auto-demo** (cycles a do-re-mi-sol-mi phrase through the IDENTICAL classifier→choir→scene pipeline, drawing a believable ghost skeleton in the HUD, so a hands-free 06:30 glance both SEES the orbs bloom and HEARS the tune within ~1 s) + a row of **≥72px press-and-hold tap-sign buttons** (emoji + color, no reading) driving the same pipeline (fully playable, zero camera); no WebGL → notice, choir keeps singing. Full teardown (rAF + camera tracks stop + landmarker close + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()` + osc stop + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route → no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (three present; MediaPipe is a CDN runtime import, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [MediaPipe hand-tracking + geometric 7-sign Curwen classifier + kids-safe choir synth w/ Kodály-echo scheduler + three.js additive-glow choir scene = 4] · #3 named refs [**John Curwen 1870** Tonic Sol-fa hand-signs · **Zoltán Kodály** method + echo game · **arXiv 2604.27957, April 2026** "Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures" — conducting as a musical sign-language recognized in real time]; soft lab-first — solfège-sign *classification* is grep-0× though MediaPipe-hands as input exists [853/731/444]). **Source:** §520 dive (conducting-as-recognized-sign-language, museum-robust) → AGENT.md path (c) IDEAS §518's ⭐ 855 + path (a) the dive hook → kids **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7×/15 (HARD) · OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 4×/10 (audit-ban threshold) · INPUT touch+mic-only 8× · kids always-consonant-morph 5×]` · `picked (winner 862)=[MediaPipe-hands INPUT (1×/10, off-glass) · three.js OUTPUT (scarcer GPU, 2×/10) · solfège-sign-classification TECH (never used) · warm-wondrous kids vibe]` — clears every ban AND dodges the raw-WebGL2 over-rep that decided the curation. **DEEP fork (banked, IDEAS §520):** **`863-kids-solfege-choir`** ⭐ (the SAME concept as a raw-WebGL2 GLSL **"ladder of light"** — 7 luminous rungs do→ti bottom→top that renders **Kodály's pitch-height innovation literally**; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** — de-selected purely because raw-WebGL2 is 4×/10, the audit-ban threshold, NOT quality) — built complete + clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full brief in IDEAS §520. ⚠️ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 118s` → Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS → reached `Collecting page data`**; 862 folder grep-clean — zero warnings, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route, the single `getContext("2d")` is the permitted skeleton HUD); **NOT browser/device-verified** — the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by hand/eye/ear: whether the 7-sign classifier reliably distinguishes the signs on a real child's hand across lighting/angles (`classify.ts` favours distinct shapes over clinical accuracy), and the choir balance + orb bloom feel; the always-on drone + ghost-hand auto-demo + press-and-hold tap fallback guarantee a sounding, blooming glance with zero hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/862-kids-solfege-signs/README.md`

## (Cycle 519 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom](/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom)** — Compute Bloom 🎹✨. `demoable` · Cycle 519 (adult / GPU-compute / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults · **audio-file INPUT** (drag-drop / file-picker your own piano recording — Karel's-music directive; built-in generative tape-piano default so it plays with zero interaction) · **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (the SCARCEST surface in the lab — **0× in the rolling 15-window**; clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban head-on) · **FFT-band-driven 500k-particle curl-noise GPU-compute sim with memory** technique · **cosmic/Anadol latent-flow vibe**. **What if a piano performance bloomed a living particle ecosystem computed entirely on the GPU — half a million points pushed by the music's spectral bands via a WGSL compute shader?** Directly answers **JURY 2026-06-22 #1** — the loudest standing directive ("Canvas2D back to 7-of-15; **WebGPU 0×**, WebGL2 1×, three.js 2× — make the next 3-4 builds GPU-only") — by landing the literal scarcest surface. An `AnalyserNode` 8-band FFT (sub-bass→air) packs a uniform read each frame by a WGSL **compute pass** that integrates **500,000** particles: sub-bass+bass swell the core outward, low-mid pulls a gentle gravity return (it breathes, not explodes), highs scatter sparkle at the rim, and every onset blooms the whole cloud then settles. **Memory:** velocity damping (`0.965 − energy·0.02`) keeps the cloud visibly expanded during a loud passage and settled inward during silence — different at minute 5 than minute 1. A WGSL **render pass** draws each particle as a 6-vertex additive glow quad, coloured deep-indigo → violet → magenta → warm-gold by speed; drag to orbit, scroll to zoom, live 8-band meter. **iOS:** AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start tap. **Degrades:** no WebGPU → `text-rose-300` "(WebGPU unavailable)" + a **WebGL2 ~6k-particle fallback** on the SAME band→force mapping (audio keeps playing, never a dead screen); no WebGL2 either → notice but audio plays. Full teardown (rAF cancel + buffer stop + `audioCtx.close()` + revoke object URL + destroy all GPUBuffers/GPUDevice or GL resources). **No API route → no `guard`** (built-in piece synthesised locally, user files via `decodeAudioData`, no external fetch); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WGSL + GLSL, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [audio decode/playback + drag-drop intake · OfflineAudioContext tape-piano · `AnalyserNode` 8-band FFT + onset · WGSL compute sim · WGSL additive render = **4–5**] · #3 named refs [**Refik Anadol** latent/particle-flow aesthetic *Machine Hallucinations* · **Robert Bridson, *Curl-Noise for Procedural Fluid Flow*, SIGGRAPH 2007** — divergence-free curl-of-noise field in WGSL]). **#1 NOT claimed (honest):** WebGPU is not lab-first (60× historically) — its novelty here is being **0× in the rolling window** (the diversity axis that matters now). **Source:** §519 dive (**WebGPU just became iOS-deployable** — Safari 26 / three.js r171, Sep 2025; compute-particles are the live June-2026 register) → jury #1 (WebGPU 0× / GPU-only) → adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22, last 15)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7× (HARD ban) · INPUT touch+mic-only 8× · kids always-consonant-morph 5× (N/A adult)]` · `picked (winner 859)=[audio-file/his-piano INPUT (dropped) · WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (scarcest, 0×) · FFT→curl-noise GPU-particle TECH · cosmic/Anadol VIBE]` — clears every active ban. **WIDE fork (banked, IDEAS §519):** **`860-marine-gamelan`** ⭐ (live **Open-Meteo wave data** → modal bronze-gamelan where rough seas audibly DETUNE the metal ±35¢; WebGL2 caustics; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** — lowest runtime risk, the jury-praised real-world-data-with-consequence register) + **`861-flow-veil`** (**webcam optical-flow** → advected dye veil + granular audio; WebGL2; needs a 1-line `OffscreenCanvas`→`ImageBitmap` texImage2D fix before resurrect) — both built complete, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS §519. ⚠️ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully` → Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS → reached `Collecting page data`**; the one type error found — `webgl-fallback.ts:191` `gl` possibly-null in a closure — was the single permitted fix, bind to `const gl: WebGL2RenderingContext`); **NOT browser/device-verified** — the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye: whether the WebGPU device actually initialised (the builder verified the WebGL2-fallback path's shape only) and the render's perspective point-size tuning; the fallback guarantees a sounding + living visual on any GPU.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom/README.md`

## (Cycle 518 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/856-kids-rumble-band](/dream/856-kids-rumble-band)** — Feel the Beat 🎮✨. `demoable` · Cycle 518 (kids 4+ / embodied off-screen input / cross-modal haptic / playful-calm). **For**: kids (4+) · **GAMEPAD input** (the starved, off-camera, off-glass embodied input — `navigator.getGamepads()`, 0× in the last 10; a Bluetooth controller pairs with iPads and most homes have one; on-screen virtual-stick + drum-button touch *fallback* + auto-demo) · **raw WebGL2 output** (the scarce GPU surface — clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) · **dual-analog-stick conducting of two pentatonic creature-voices + beat-synced controller RUMBLE (haptic "felt beat")** technique · **playful-but-calm warm/cool glow vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could play music with a GAME CONTROLLER they already hold — push the two thumbsticks to conduct two glowing creature-voices, mash the big colored buttons to drum — and the controller BUZZES in their hands on the beat, so they FEEL the music as well as hear it?** Directly serves **JURY 2026-06-22 #1** (force a GPU surface — raw WebGL2) + the standing **#-embodied/sensor** ask ("push embodied/sensor inputs… do something a touchscreen can't" — a controller that rumbles is literally that) and fills the lab's **coldest menu category: cross-modal / embedded-haptic** ("haptic-only experiments — test the screen bias"). Left stick → a warm melody creature (snapped C-major pentatonic, no wrong notes), right stick → a cool harmony creature a consonant interval away; **A/B/X/Y** → four warm tuned drums; bumpers/triggers → a sparkle. **Haptics:** `gamepad.vibrationActuator.playEffect("dual-rumble", …)` (feature-detected; minimal typed interface, no `any`) pulses gently on every beat, accents every 4th, and bumps on each drum — and the whole glow field visibly pulses on the beat so you SEE the felt beat even with no controller. Always-on soft groove + drone (never silent). **Kids-safety chain:** `voices → masterGain(0.26) → BiquadFilter lowpass(≤6.5kHz) → DynamicsCompressor(−10, 20:1) → destination`; soft ≥40ms attacks; no harsh transients. **iOS:** AudioContext created/resumed inside the first ≥72px Start tap. **Degrades:** no controller → ≥96px on-screen virtual sticks (drag) + ≥76px colored drum buttons + a friendly `text-white/75` hint ("Connect a game controller, or play with the buttons below") + an auto-demo (Lissajous sticks + downbeat drums) that sounds + animates + visibly pulses within ~0.6s; no WebGL2 → `text-rose-300` notice, audio keeps playing; no haptics → honest "(no rumble on this pad)" label. Full teardown (rAF + gamepad poll cancel + haptic `reset()` + delete WebGL programs/buffers + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route → no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network/samples); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [Gamepad polling/edge-detect + dual-stick→pentatonic harmony engine + beat-synced haptic scheduler + raw-WebGL2 additive glow render = 4] · #3 named refs [**Gamepad API + `GamepadHapticActuator.playEffect`** · **Émile Jaques-Dalcroze eurhythmics** — rhythm learned through the body / the felt beat, here delivered as touch]). **Source:** §518 dive (embodied music pedagogy — Dalcroze/Orff/Curwen-Kodály solfège-hand-signs, CHI "Music Corner" + the June-2026 WebGPU audio-reactive wave) → the jury's GPU-surface + embodied-input mandate + the cold cross-modal/haptic menu → kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 853,849,847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 4× (HARD jury ban) · INPUT touch+mic-only over-rep + recently-used MediaPipe-hands (853) and tilt (849)]` · `picked (winner 856)=[GAMEPAD INPUT (starved, 0× last 10, off camera) · raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarce GPU) · dual-stick-conduct + haptic-felt-beat TECH (cross-modal/haptic cold menu) · playful-calm glow VIBE]` — clears every ban and avoids the MediaPipe-hands streak (853 last cycle). **WIDE fork:** banked **`855-kids-solfege-signs`** ⭐ (make the Curwen/Kodály **solfège hand-signs** in the air → a choir sings the matching scale degree → build a melody by signing; MediaPipe HandLandmarker + three.js; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** — strong pedagogy, de-selected only to avoid a 4th MediaPipe-hands build right after 853) + **`857-kids-color-wand`** (wave any bright **colored toy/scarf** → camera color-blob tracking → a glowing comet that sings, hue=instrument/height=pitch; **WebGPU** compute particles + WebGL2 fallback — the freshest GPU surface) — both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS §518. ⚠️ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: compile → **Linting + type-check PASS → reached `Collecting page data`**; **856 folder grep-clean of the build log** — zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/856-kids-rumble-band/` → 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** — the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear/hand: the actual `playEffect` rumble on a physical controller (feature-detected + labeled when absent), the mix balance + glow intensity on real audio/GPU; the auto-demo + touch fallback + visible on-beat pulse guarantee a sounding, animating, pulsing glance with zero hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/856-kids-rumble-band/README.md`

## (Cycle 517 — **adult** build · DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/853-motet-room-reach](/dream/853-motet-room-reach)** — The Motet Room (Reach) 🎼🖐️. `demoable` · Cycle 517 (adult / spatial-installation / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults · **two-hand bare-hand-tracking INPUT** (MediaPipe HandLandmarker — the starved embodied input the jury demanded; NOT touch, NOT mic; pointer + auto-demo fallback) · **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the SCARCEST GPU surface, 1× in the last 15 — beats the over-represented three.js, clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) · **HRTF binaural spatialization + two-hand gestural conducting of a FIXED voice field with persistent re-sculpting** technique · **sacred-ambient installation vibe** (cool violet bed warming to conductor's gold). **What if you stood at the center of a fixed constellation of ~18 HRTF-spatialized choir voices and CONDUCTED it with your bare hands — reach toward a section to swell it, spread your arms to bloom the whole choir open, bring your hands together to collapse it to a tight resolved cluster, and pinch-and-fling a single voice across the room where it STAYS, permanently re-sculpting the field?** Answers **JURY 2026-06-22 #2** ("build the embodied/spatial prototype the lab keeps deferring — a pose-driven spatial-audio room"; body 1×/depth 0×, the coldest category) + **#1** (hard-ban Canvas2D, force a GPU surface). Each of ~18 voices = two detuned saws → bandpass **formant** (vowel) → lowpass brightness → its own `PannerNode` (`panningModel="HRTF"`) on a shell around a listener fixed at origin (looking −Z); hand "magnets" swell+lean the nearest voices, spread/together opens/collapses the whole field, **pinch** grabs the nearest voice and `setTargetAtTime`-glides it to its new home — you HEAR it fly around your head. Master: sum → `DynamicsCompressor` limiter → master ≤0.28. Raw WebGL2 additive billboarded glow point-sprites (hand-rolled perspective) + glowing hand cursors; **auto-demo** (two virtual hands gesture/spread/pinch on their own) + mouse fallback so it's fully demoable with **no webcam**; `text-rose-300` notice on camera/WebGL2 failure; full teardown (rAF + camera tracks + `AudioContext.close()` + GL buffers/programs/textures). **Differs from `677-presence-field`** (which attaches a voice to each body JOINT — sources follow your limbs): here voices are PINNED and the hands sculpt the fixed field. **No API route → no `guard`; zero new npm deps** (MediaPipe via CDN `webpackIgnore`, never bundled/in package.json). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [camera hand-tracking + HRTF spatial-audio field + raw-WebGL2 render + gesture-sculpting engine = 4] · #3 named refs [object-/scene-based spatial audio; **Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller, *The Forty Part Motet* (2001)** — 40-channel Tallis *Spem in Alium* you walk among, inverted here to a still listener moving the voices]). **Source:** JURY #2 → RESEARCH §517 (webcam-MediaPipe head/hand-tracked browser binaural — listener pose drives the WebAudio `AudioListener` over a fixed HRTF field) → adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 849,847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (HARD jury ban) · touch+mic-only INPUT · always-consonant-morph kids template]` · `picked (winner 853)=[bare-hand-tracking INPUT (body, starved) · raw WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarcest GPU) · HRTF spatial-sculpting TECH · adult installation VIBE]` — clears every ban. **DEEP siblings (banked, IDEAS §517):** `852-motet-room-walk` ⭐ (MediaPipe Pose — physically WALK the listener through the fixed oval; three.js; the literal Cardiff gallery walk; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST**) + `854-motet-room-lean` (MediaPipe FaceLandmarker head-tracking — turn your head, the field stays world-anchored; true head-tracked binaural; three.js) — both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS §517. ⚠️ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 98s` → Linting + type-check PASS → reached `Collecting page data`**; **853 folder grep-clean of the build log** — zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** — the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the live MediaPipe hand path + CDN model load, the raw-WebGL2 render, and whether HRTF localization reads convincingly on headphones (it collapses to L/R + level on laptop speakers); auto-demo + mouse guarantee a sounding, moving glance regardless.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/853-motet-room-reach/README.md`

## Cycle 516 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/849-kids-star-bowl](/dream/849-kids-star-bowl)** — Star Bowl ✨🥣. `demoable` · Cycle 516 (kids 4+ / freedom-to-be-wrong / calm bedtime / long-form-ish generative). **For**: kids (4+) · **device-orientation TILT input** (the starved embodied input the jury asked for — NOT touch, NOT mic; pointer-drag + auto-drift fallback) · **three.js GPU output** (the scarce GPU surface — breaks the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) · **tilt-gravity marble physics → position-in-bowl → consonance↔dissonance harmony with audible glide-resolution** technique · **calm night-blue bedtime vibe** (the regressed register — only 1 of the prior 8 kids builds was calm). **What if a 4-year-old could TILT a tablet like a bowl of glowing stars and discover that wandering out to the "spiky" rim makes a soft, safe dissonance they can then RESOLVE by tilting home — a real harmonic decision made with the body, not a steered always-consonant vibe?** This is the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-22 #3** ("give a kid the freedom to be WRONG — dissonance reachable AND resolvable, a real harmonic decision with a consequence, not a steer through a pre-vetted field") AND **#4** ("bring back a calm kids piece — 7 of 8 are bright/active"). ~48 glowing star-marbles roll inside a 3D bowl under simulated gravity driven by `DeviceOrientationEvent` (beta/gamma → gravity vector). The cluster's mean radius (0 center → 1 rim) drives the harmony: **center** = a warm fully-consonant chord over a low A2 drone (root+fifth+octave+tenth), stars round and gentle; **toward the rim** = two "tension voices" glide up toward a soft minor-2nd/tritone cluster with gentle beating partials + a slow shimmer-tremolo, and the star shader grows prickly shivering spikes (reads as "ooh, wobbly," never harsh); **tilt home** = the tension voices glide back to consonance via `setTargetAtTime`, shimmer fades, stars round out, and a soft consonant **bloom** rewards the return. Always-on Eno-style drone means it's never silent; auto-drift keeps an untouched device gently rolling + sounding within ~2s. **Kids-safety chain:** `sources → masterGain(0.24) → BiquadFilter lowpass(≤6.4kHz) → DynamicsCompressor(−10, 20:1) → destination`; soft ≥40ms attacks; tension voices peak at gain ~0.16; no analyser wired to output. **iOS:** AudioContext + `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` both inside the first ≥72px Start tap. **Degrades:** no orientation (desktop / denied) → pointer drag-to-tilt + auto-drift + `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL → `text-rose-300` notice, audio keeps running; no Web Audio → visuals alive + notice. Full teardown (rAF + listeners + dispose three.js geometries/materials + `renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route → no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network/samples); **zero new npm deps** (`three` v0.182 already present; NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [device-orientation physics/permission + tilt-gravity marble sim + position→consonance/dissonance harmony engine with glide-resolution + three.js additive-glow round↔spiky shader render = 4] · #3 named refs [the dissonance→consonance **"tension and release" pedagogy** — MasterClass 2026 *"Dissonance in Music"* + the *"Dissonance to Consonance"* family-learning lesson plan (mapflc.com): the resolve builds a child's confidence · the love-aligned tilt lineage **`83-kids-tilt-rain`**❤️ · **Brian Eno**-style calm bedtime ambient drone]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-22 #3 + #4 → RESEARCH §516 (tension→release is the named musical-growth lever; the toys deny it) → kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827,822)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 6× (HARD jury ban) · INPUT touch+mic-only 8× over 15 · the "drag-one-thing → always-consonant-morph" kids template 5×]` · `picked (winner 849)=[device-orientation TILT INPUT (starved, 1×) · three.js GPU OUTPUT (scarce) · tilt-gravity→reachable-resolvable-dissonance TECH (NOT always-consonant) · calm night-blue VIBE (regressed register)]` — clears every ban. **WIDE fork:** banked **`851-kids-hand-choir`** ⭐ (bare-hand MediaPipe conducting — spread=tension/together=resolve; raw WebGL2; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST**, the embodied build the jury most wants) + **`850-kids-monster-keys`** (every chromatic note plays — dissonance is a friendly wobble-monster you calm; Web MIDI + raw WebGL2) — both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS §516. ⚠️ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 35.9s` → Linting + type-check PASS → reached `Collecting page data`**; **849 folder grep-clean of the build log** — zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/849-kids-star-bowl/` → 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** — the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the toddler "feel" of the tilt-gravity tuning on real hardware (`TILT_FORCE`/`WELL_PULL`/damping may want a hands-on nudge), and whether the rim dissonance reads as "safely wobbly" vs flat (the always-on drone + auto-drift + drag fallback guarantee a sounding, rolling glance regardless).
