## ⭐ Earlier (Cycle 470 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 divergent explorers each on a SCARCE renderer)

- **[/dream/721-kids-piano-garden](/dream/721-kids-piano-garden)** — Papa's Piano Garden 🌱. `demoable` · Cycle 470. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic-breath/hum** (analysis-only) / **WebGPU compute-shader** particle field (Canvas2D fallback) / concatenative grains of Karel's REAL piano / tender-luminous, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old could grow a glowing garden of light by humming — and every petal is made from Karel's OWN recorded "Welcome Home" piano?** A near-dark field of luminous motes; breath ENERGY (RMS off an `AnalyserNode`) scatters more, brighter seeds + widens the bloom radius; voice PITCH (a cheap zero-crossing estimate) lifts blooms bright-and-high or settles them dark-and-low. Each bloom SOUNDS as **Hann-windowed concatenative grains of Karel's real recording**, selected by CataRT-style `selectNearest` over a (time × brightness) descriptor space — never a beat, never a loop, just a breathing texture. The literal fusion of **JURY 2026-06-18 #1** ("ban the 9× Canvas2D monoculture — port the WebGPU-compute stack *to a kids piece*; a kid deserves the scarce renderer too") **and #5** ("use Karel's real music — it's in only 1 of the last 15, all adult"). **mic-breath INPUT** (off banned touch-primary; serves KIDS.md's vocalization goal) · **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer, 1×; off banned Canvas2D-primary + warming three.js) · **concatenative-grain-resynthesis TECH** (CataRT — emphatically NOT a shared-clock loop/groove, the jury's banned "new pentatonic") · **tender/luminous VIBE** (off banned silly-comedy). **Ambition honest 3/5** (`#1 + #3 + #5`): **#1** first kids piece on Karel's real Paths recordings + first genuinely-iOS-shippable kids WebGPU-compute-primary (the iOS-Safari-26 WebGPU blocker just closed) · **#3** named refs (Diemo Schwarz *CataRT* · Refik Anadol · WebGPU-on-iOS-26, in README) · **#5** RESEARCH §470 same-day (iOS-WebGPU-now-shippable IS the enabler). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** real 8192-particle WGSL compute+render (buffer-usage bits hardcoded → zero `@webgpu/types` dep) with a first-class Canvas2D fallback reproducing the identical gather-and-bloom physics; ghost-breath auto-demo on mic-deny/idle; `grain bus → master → lowpass(7.5k) → DynamicsCompressor(−10/20:1) → destination`; always-on drone; the proven 720 loader copied verbatim with an offline-tone fallback so the corpus is never empty; AudioContext + getUserMedia inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown. **Only network is the public `/api/audio/:id` GET (read-only) → no api route, no `guard`** (rules #6/#8 clean); **no CDN dependency** at all. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`, EXIT 0, **508/508** static pages, `/dream/721-kids-piano-garden` static ○ 6.97 kB). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox — unverified: WGSL compute on a real iPad [Canvas2D fallback is the likely-reviewer path], whether grains read as *blooming from his piano* by ear, the ZCR pitch proxy, iOS mic unlock; the ghost demo + Canvas2D + offline-tone fallbacks guarantee a sounding glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (each on a scarce renderer); banked **`722-kids-star-scoop`** ⭐ (MediaPipe hands → three.js 3D starfield scoop, awe) + **`723-kids-aurora-sail`** (device-tilt → WebGL2 GLSL aurora, dreamy) as **IDEAS §470**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/721-kids-piano-garden/README.md`

## ⭐ Newest (Cycle 462 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 divergent laugh-first explorers)

- **[/dream/705-kids-silly-voice](/dream/705-kids-silly-voice)** — Silly Voice Monster 🎤. `demoable` · Cycle 462. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic** (record + RMS, NOT pitch) / Canvas2D googly monster / pure comedy, zero scale. **What if a kid talks into the phone and a googly monster repeats it back in the silliest possible voice?** Press the giant 🎤 to record ~1.8s of your own voice (`MediaRecorder`, auto-stops so kids never get stuck), then five big color-coded icon buttons replay it transformed: 🐿️ **chipmunk** (playbackRate 1.85) · 👹 **monster** (0.62) · 🔁 **backwards** (reversed Float32 buffer) · 🤖 **robot** (~30Hz square ring-mod via gain modulation) · 🌊 **wobble** (6.5Hz LFO on a DelayNode). The monster's **mouth lip-syncs** to a real-time RMS envelope tapped off the master `AnalyserNode`; eyes googly-wiggle on every press; instant chipmunk auto-preview right after recording gives immediate payoff. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #5 "MAKE A KID LAUGH"** + **#1** (comedy, never a harmonic event — the kids side's banned register): a pure pitch-free **voice-CHANGER**, a genuinely fresh kids register (179/244 sing *back in-key*; this snaps to no scale at all). **mic INPUT** (a wholly different *application* from the last-10's pitch-detection [669] + spectral [704]) · **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off banned WebGL2) · **buffer playback-rate + reverse + ring-mod sample-manipulation TECH** (NOT a harmonic event/voice-leading [banned 8×, kids]) · **silly/googly VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6×]). **Ambition honest 2–3/5** (`#2 + #3 + #5`): **#2** ≥3 subsystems (mic record-pipeline + 5-mode transform DSP engine + RMS analyser-driven lip-sync viz + ambient pad) · **#3** named refs (**Outfit7 "Talking Tom"**, **Toca Boca**, varispeed/granular nod, in README) · **#5** RESEARCH §462 same-day (2026 Toy Fair screen-free sound-toy register + ragdoll velocity-pitch comedy). **#1 NOT claimed** (varispeed buffer manipulation exists at 18-granular/172/227 — honest). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** master `gain 0.32 → lowpass 7500Hz → DynamicsCompressor → destination`; ambient pad loops so it's never silent; AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start gesture (iOS); mic-denied → friendly `text-rose-300` line + **5 pre-baked synth silly sounds** on the same big buttons so the toy still plays; no-canvas `text-rose-300` notice; full teardown (recorder/tracks/oscillators/rAF/AudioContext). **No network, no CDN, no camera, no API route → no guard** (rules #6/#8 clean) — works instantly for any reviewer with a mic. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`, EXIT 0, 500/500 static pages). **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox — unverified by ear: whether the transforms read as laugh-out-loud silly on a real device, lip-sync timing, and iOS mic unlock; the pre-baked fallback guarantees a sounding glance even with no mic). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`706-kids-tilt-bonk`** (tilt→bouncy-room bonkers, velocity-pitched SFX — the bulletproof no-permission sibling, ≈ already-banked 703-boing-zoo) + **`707-kids-mega-mouth`** ⭐ (MediaPipe face-puppet that eats falling snacks & burps — the most ambitious, most CDN-fragile) as **IDEAS §462**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/705-kids-silly-voice/README.md`

## ⭐ Earlier (Cycle 459 — **adult** build · DEEP, one live-data concept via 3 renderer/metaphor approaches)

- **[/dream/699-world-forge](/dream/699-world-forge)** — World Forge 🌍✨. `demoable` · Cycle 459. **For**: adult / **live external data** (the global GitHub public-events firehose) / three.js rotating globe / planetary-awe ambient. **What if you could hear and see the whole planet making things right now — every code push, star, and merge on Earth as a spark of light and a grain of sound, blooming at its place on a slowly turning globe?** Extends **JURY 2026-06-17 #4** ("683's WebSocket engine could sonify a *non-market* live stream — transit, seismic, language-usage — for free") into a fresh, keyless, free stream: the lab had sonified the market (683), wiki (437), sky (618), seismic (613/233) but **never the live worldwide act of *making***. **The instrument:** the browser polls `https://api.github.com/events` — an unauthenticated, keyless, CORS-open read-only GET (no api route, no guard, no secret) — at most once per ~78s (60 req/hr limit), then **meters** each batch of recent events (PushEvent / WatchEvent=star / PullRequest / Issue / Fork / Create) out gently across the window. Each event is one grain: its **type** picks a timbre (push = soft mallet/bell, star = bright shimmer, PR = warm swell, issue = muted tom, fork/create = low bloom), a stable **repo-hash** picks a pitch in a drifting **D-Dorian** mode (same repo → same note), and a rolling 12s **rate window** swells a generative drone's density/brightness + the planet's glow. A three.js auto-rotating dark Earth (procedural graticule + scattered land-ish dots, **no external textures**) blooms an additive light at each event's deterministic pseudo geo-location (hashed from repo+actor — texture, not GIS), panned by **longitude** via `StereoPannerNode`. **live-external-data INPUT** (off jury-banned touch-primary [5×]) · **three.js OUTPUT** (renderer-coolest of the 3 candidates: 2× in rolling-10; off banned WebGL2 [4×] + banned audio-first-SVG [5×], off just-used WebGPU [683] + Canvas2D-warming [3×→would-be-4×]) · **live-data sonification → generative ambient drone + per-event voices TECH** (a living texture, emphatically NOT a harmonic-event/voice-leading cadence [banned 8×]) · **planetary-awe VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6×]). **Ambition honest 2/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** ≥3 subsystems (live-feed + synthetic-fallback engine + rolling-aggregate state + generative drone/event synth + three.js globe = 4) + **#3** named refs (**Hatnote "Listen to Wikipedia"** — LaPorte & Hashemi, the canonical live collaborative-creation firehose sonification; **github.audio**; **Brian Foo** *Data-Driven DJ*; **Refik Anadol** planetary data-as-light — all in README); **#1 NOT claimed** (live-data sonification exists in the lab at 683/437/618 — honest). **Research-first chain (RESEARCH §459, same-day, path a):** the dive selected the GitHub firehose as the unbuilt free stream + confirmed the Hatnote/Foo lineage + verified the keyless-CORS feasibility that makes the fire free + unattended-safe. **Bulletproof glance (critical for unattended 06:30 review):** a **synthetic event generator** (weighted realistic distribution — pushes common, stars frequent, PRs/issues/forks rarer) starts the instant you press Begin with **zero network**, so the planet sparks and the drone breathes immediately; it upgrades to **live** on the first successful poll (emerald) and falls back to synthetic on **any** error — 403/rate-limit/CORS/offline — with a `text-amber-300/95` notice; **no WebGL/three.js → a Canvas2D starfield-with-blooms fallback** so the glance is never blank. **Ear-safe:** `event voices + drone → masterGain ≤0.34 → lowpass → DynamicsCompressor → destination`; iOS AudioContext created/resumed inside the Begin gesture. Full unmount teardown (feed stop, `renderer.dispose()`, audio close). **No API route → no guard** (pure client keyless public GET; no secret, no side effect — rules #6/#8 clean). No new npm deps (`three` already a dep, dynamic-imported). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox — unverified by eye/ear: whether WebGL renders the globe + blooms on Karel's device, whether GitHub's CORS behaves as documented at runtime, whether type→timbre/repo→pitch reads as "the planet making things" on real speakers, and iOS audio unlock; the synthetic-first feed + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a live, sounding glance regardless). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE live-firehose concept: banked **`701-living-coral`** ⭐ (the world's creation **accreting** onto a luminous DLA reef, *fuller at minute 5 than minute 1* — long-form memory made visible; WebGPU/WGSL + Canvas2D fallback — the directest "reach for the ceiling," echoes 689) + **`700-commit-rain`** (the **Ikeda** austere take — events as falling data-rain grains + monospace labels; Canvas2D) as **IDEAS §459**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/699-world-forge/README.md`

## (Cycle 458 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 divergent silly/groove/off-glass explorers)

- **[/dream/696-kids-mouth-band](/dream/696-kids-mouth-band)** — Mouth Band 🎤🥁. `demoable` · Cycle 458. **For**: kids (4+) / mic vocal-percussion (analysis-only) / Canvas2D goofy creature / silly-comedy groove. **What if a 4-year-old could build a silly drum beat just by making MOUTH NOISES — boom, tss, pop, brrr — and a goofy creature caught each one, looped it, and bopped to it?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #5** ("MAKE A KID LAUGH — the silly/funny pole is now 0×, the kids side has gone uniformly solemn") and **#1** ("groove, not a cadence — the harmonic-event/voice-leading technique is the new pentatonic, banned on the kids side for a week"). **The instrument:** the mic feeds an `AnalyserNode` (analysis only — never recorded/stored/sent); a per-frame **RMS energy-onset gate** (rise over recent average + noise floor + ~110ms refractory) catches each mouth-noise, then a **spectral-centroid + low/mid/high band-fraction** heuristic classifies it into 4 color-coded silly drum voices — **KICK/"boom"** (red), **SNARE/"pop"** (yellow, the safe catch-all), **HIHAT/"tss"** (cyan), **BRRR/raspberry** (purple). Each onset fires its punchy synth immediately (sub-35ms target) **and** quantizes into a 16-step loop replayed by a Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler at 100 BPM — so a few mouth noises become a repeating beat. A big cartoon mouth-creature opens wide, bugs its eyes, squashes/bounces and flashes the voice color on every hit; a bottom step-strip shows the loop with a moving playhead. **mic / vocal-percussion INPUT** (off the jury-banned touch-primary [5×]; serves KIDS.md's explicit *vocalization* goal) · **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (jury noted Canvas2D's ban "worked cleanly," 4×→2×, now a cold/safe renderer; off banned WebGL2 [4×] + banned audio-first-SVG [5×]) · **real-time vocal-percussion onset+spectral-classification → looping groove TECH** (a real groove, emphatically NOT a harmonic event / voice-leading [banned 8×, 6× on kids]) · **silly/comedy/bright-primary VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6×]; the *subject is a joke and a beat*, not a cadence). **Ambition honest 2/5** (`#2 + #3`, with a qualified #1): **#2** ≥3 subsystems (mic onset+centroid classifier + look-ahead loop/groove scheduler + comedy drum synth + Canvas2D creature = 4) + **#3** named refs (**Incredibox**; **Hazan & Stowell**, *Delayed Decision-making in Real-time Beatbox Percussion Classification*, JNMR 2010; the **AVP dataset**, Mehrabi et al., Audio Mostly 2019 — all in README); **#1 qualified** (first real-time vocal-percussion *classification into drum voices* in the lab — "spectral centroid" exists only in visualizers [246/285/19], not as a beatbox classifier). **Research-first chain (RESEARCH §458, same-day, path a):** the dive surfaced Incredibox + the beatbox-onset-classification literature → the recipe *is* this prototype's classifier. **Kid-safe chain:** `voices → masterGain(0.28) → lowpass(7.5kHz) → DynamicsCompressor(-10, 20:1, fast attack — brick-wall limiter) → destination`; always-on soft ambient bed so it never feels broken; the analyser is *not* wired to output (no echo of the child's voice). **Robustness (bulletproof 06:30 glance):** **mic denied/unavailable → a ghost auto-beatboxes a silly groove** into the loop on its own (still funny + grooving) with a `text-rose-300` notice; mic-on-but-idle >2.5s → an auto-demo lick; so a sensorless/silent glance is always alive and sounding. iOS AudioContext + getUserMedia both requested inside the START gesture (AGC/noise-suppression disabled to keep onsets crisp). Full unmount teardown (rAF cancel, scheduler timer cleared, mic tracks stopped, AudioContext closed). **No API route → no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; no network call, no secret, no side effect). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 43s, ✓ Generating static pages (495/495)** [494 from cycle 457 + 696 = 495, confirming non-winners 697/698 absent], `/dream/696-kids-mouth-band 4.65 kB / 111 kB` prerendered static ○). **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox — unverified by ear: whether the 4-bucket classifier reliably tells a child's "boom" from "brrr" and "pop" from "tss" on real device mics [mitigated: wide thresholds + mid-burst SNARE default so misclassification still sounds musical, never "wrong"], onset-gate sensitivity per device mic gain, and iOS unlock; the ghost auto-beatbox + ambient bed guarantee a live, sounding glance regardless). **Honest limit:** a heuristic spectral classifier on untrained 4-year-old mouth noises *will* misfire at the KICK/BRRR and SNARE/HIHAT boundaries — by design nothing reads as a failure (every hit is a drum, the beat keeps grooving). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three off-glass silly/groove machines, different embodied input × renderer × comedy mechanic): banked **`698-kids-dance-mirror`** ⭐ (dance in front of the webcam → a DOM/CSS character mirrors & exaggerates you + **freeze-dance comedy**; camera analysis-only — the directest "get off the glass," revives the jury-named abandoned 652 dance register, freshest DOM/CSS renderer) + **`697-kids-shake-circus`** (shake the tablet → a three.js jelly clown squashes/boings + confetti POP; Pixar squash-&-stretch) as **IDEAS §458**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/696-kids-mouth-band/README.md`

## (Cycle 457 — **adult** build · DEEP, one multi-user groove-room concept via 3 interaction models)

- **[/dream/694-pulse-ring](/dream/694-pulse-ring)** — Pulse Ring ⏱️🥁. `demoable` · Cycle 457. **For**: adult (any) / **multi-user** (shared rotating ring, open a 2nd tab) / Canvas2D / hypnotic dance-floor groove. **What if several people shared one spinning clock — each dropping rhythmic hits onto a common ring at their own subdivision — so a groove emerges that no single player authored?** The lab's return to the single most-starved register the **JURY 2026-06-17** named — **MULTI-USER (0× across the entire last-15 window, "the genuinely unbuilt register")** — and a direct answer to its plea for **groove/rhythm/play over another tension-resolution cadence** (the banned new monoculture). **The piece:** a glowing playhead hand sweeps a circular ring once per ~2s bar; each participant is a colored percussion voice (low tom / woodblock / high bell / rim / shaker) and **taps beads** onto the ring at angular positions — as the hand crosses a bead, that voice fires. Each player picks their own **subdivision (8 / 12 / 16)**, so independent patterns overlaid on the *same* rotating clock produce **emergent polyrhythm + phasing** (a 12-against-8 cross-rhythm, a 16-note shaker shimmer drifting against a 3-feel bell line). An optional low-A drone adds body — but the subject is rhythm, not harmony. **multi-participant/shared-ring INPUT** (breaks the standing solo monoculture 0×→1; off jury-banned touch-primary) · **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the jury noted Canvas2D's ban "worked cleanly," 4×→2×, now the cold/safe renderer; off banned WebGL2 [4×] + banned audio-first-SVG [5×]) · **shared-clock groove / emergent-polyrhythm TECH** (a real groove, emphatically NOT a harmonic event / voice-leading [banned 8×]) · **hypnotic dance-floor VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6×]). **Architecture (the 2026 collaborative-web-music principle, RESEARCH §457):** *networked control, not networked audio* — only lightweight events (presence hello/present/bye, a shared beat-zero **epoch** in `performance.now` space, conflict-free last-write-wins bead add/remove keyed by `(voice,slot,subdivision)`, full-state-on-join) cross `BroadcastChannel("resonance-pulse-ring-694")`; every client **synthesizes its own audio locally** with a ~25ms look-ahead scheduler phase-locked to the shared epoch, so all tabs hear the same combined ensemble. **Ambition 2/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** ≥3 subsystems (BroadcastChannel control-sync + shared-epoch look-ahead scheduler + multi-voice Web-Audio percussion engine + Canvas2D ring renderer = 4) + **#3** named refs (Steve Reich *Clapping Music*/*Drumming* phasing; West-African *gankogui*/clave timeline — the default ghost bell uses the classic 12/8 timeline; The Hub lineage — all in README); **#1 NOT claimed** (BroadcastChannel/multi-user already exists in 319/334/341 — honest). **Robustness (bulletproof 06:30 glance):** open alone → after ~3s two **ghost players** join with complementary subdivisions (a 12/8 bell timeline + 8-feel pulse + 16-note shaker) so a lone visitor hears a living polyrhythm; presence badge flips amber "playing solo · 🤖 ghost players" → emerald "👥 N players on the ring" the instant a real peer is heard (ghosts retire); **~2.5s idle auto-demo** evolves beads on a loop; no `BroadcastChannel` → fully solo-with-ghosts, never throws. **Ear-safe:** `gain (≤0.4) → lowpass(~9kHz) → DynamicsCompressor(-18dB,4:1) → destination`. iOS AudioContext created inside the Start gesture; one rAF loop mutating refs (React never re-renders per frame); full unmount teardown (rAF cancel, "bye" broadcast, channel close, AudioContext close, timers cleared). **No network call, no API route → no guard needed** (same-origin BroadcastChannel only; no secret, no side effect). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 35.5s, 494/494 static pages**, `/dream/694-pulse-ring 4.95 kB / 108 kB` prerendered static ○). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/multi-tab in sandbox — unverified: whether the cross-subdivision polyrhythm reads as a felt groove on real speakers, the two-tab presence flip + shared-epoch alignment, iOS unlock; the ghost players + breathing-ring auto-demo guarantee a live, sounding glance). **Honest limit:** `BroadcastChannel` is same-origin/same-browser (two tabs/windows) — true cross-device jamming would swap in WebRTC/WebSocket carrying the same control events. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE multi-user groove-room concept: banked **`693-ensemble-floor`** ⭐ (5-lane × 16-step collaborative drum-machine "band room"; Tenori-on — the most legible/crowd-pleasing) + **`695-trade-fours`** (rotating-spotlight "trading fours" relay; captured riffs accumulate into a shared arrangement; loop-station, love-aligned to `172`❤️) as **IDEAS §457**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/694-pulse-ring/README.md`

## (Cycle 456 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 divergent harmonic-event explorers, one off-glass)

- **[/dream/690-kids-weather-hands](/dream/690-kids-weather-hands)** — Weather in Your Hands ☀️⛈️. `demoable` · Cycle 456. **For**: kids (4+) / off-glass embodied (tilt + motion + mic energy) / audio-first / weather vibe. **What if a 4-year-old could change the *feeling* of music with their whole body — no touching the screen — and hear sunshine turn to storm and back?** The lab's directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-16 #2** ("get off the glass — 13 of 15 render to a screen; the 2 that aren't are the best things here") *and* **#1** ("a real harmonic event, not the pentatonic crutch") at once. **The piece:** hold the tablet like a tray, eyes off the glass; three input subsystems — `DeviceOrientation` tilt + `DeviceMotion` acceleration + mic RMS — fuse into ONE "energy" axis (calm=0 → wild=1). That axis drives a continuous **major↔minor mode-morph** in Web Audio: over a fixed root (A2) + perfect-fifth drone, the **third literally bends** (M3 +4 → m3 +3, an *audible moving pitch*) and the **sixth crossfades** (M6 +9 → m6 +8), a bright Lydian #11 sparkle fading out as a tense ♭7 + filtered rain/wind fade in. Calm = a sunny major world; sway/shake/hum = the harmony darkens into storm; settle = it glides back to sun. The whole screen is one breathing sun↔cloud glow (no buttons, no reading). **off-glass/embodied INPUT** (the scarcest — only 680/669 recently) · **audio-first OUTPUT** (dodges jury-banned Canvas2D [4×]) · **movement-energy → mode-morph TECH** (a real harmonic event, emphatically NOT pentatonic scale-snap — no note quantization anywhere) · **weather/dynamic VIBE** (dodges banned warm-cozy-kids [4×]). **Ambition 2–3/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** ≥3 subsystems (tilt + motion + mic energy fusion → Web Audio mode-morph → breathing canvas sky) + **#3** named refs (embodied music-cognition / Reggio Emilia "understanding through movement"; Brian Eno generative-ambient weather — both in README); #5 claimed only loosely (the embodied-perception literature is foundational, not <30-day). **Graceful degrade (never silent/dead):** no motion sensor → mic energy alone; no mic → gentle autonomous weather drift; before audio unlock → the glow still animates; **~2.5s idle auto-demo** auto-cycles sun→cloud→sun so a sensorless 06:30 glance shows the sky breathing and morphing on its own. **Ear-safe:** soft attacks/releases, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, master cap ~0.3 (safe near a sleeping sibling). iOS sensor + mic permission requested inside the single Begin gesture; mic is RMS-only, never connected to output, never recorded, **zero network calls** (no API route → no guard needed). Full unmount teardown (rAF, listeners, AudioNodes, AudioContext). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 45s, 493/493 static pages**, `/dream/690-kids-weather-hands 5.15 kB / 111 kB` prerendered static ○). **NOT browser-verified** (no sensors/mic/audio in sandbox — unverified: per-device tilt sensitivity, whether calm↔storm reads as a felt mode-flip on real speakers, iOS permission flow). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire: banked **`691-kids-sky-steps`** ⭐ (on-glass Shepard-tempered circle-of-fifths modulation staircase, WebGL2) + **`692-kids-two-friends`** (two-player interval consonance + voice-leading resolution, three.js) as **IDEAS §456**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/690-kids-weather-hands/README.md`

## (Cycle 455 — **adult** build · DEEP, one AI-image-pipeline concept via 3 approaches)

- **[/dream/689-dream-chapters](/dream/689-dream-chapters)** — Dream Chapters 🌌🎴. `demoable` · Cycle 455. **For**: adult / generative-autonomous (hands-off) / **AI-image pipeline** + three.js depth-field / oracular-Anadol vibe. **What if a long-form generative journey could *remember everything it has dreamed* — minting one AI-generated "chapter card" per movement, so the piece accumulates a navigable 3D gallery of its own past?** The lab's directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-16 #4** ("build an AI-pipeline chain — STILL ZERO in the last 15; Karel explicitly wants AI image generation *inside* an AV piece") and Karel's standing care #4 (journey-engine alternatives). **The piece:** on Begin, a generative engine walks a named journey arc — **Threshold → Drift → Deepening → Aurora → Return** (~45–70s each, each its own modal color/voicing/density/tempo over a drifting **D-Dorian/Aeolian** centre; open fifths → suspended/airy → minor-7th depth → bright maj7-add9 aurora → warm return; NOT pentatonic, NOT a I-IV-V loop) — and at each phase boundary composes an evocative prompt for that mood, POSTs it to a guarded `fal-ai/flux/schnell` route, and floats the returned **chapter-card image** to the front of a **three.js** receding depth-field; every card it has ever dreamed recedes behind, parallaxing, while the camera auto-drifts through the corridor (a gentle drag glances around; touch is never primary). **Long-form memory made visible** — the gallery at minute 5 is visibly fuller than at minute 1; after Return it loops, memory persisting. **generative-autonomous INPUT** · **AI-image OUTPUT** (the scarcest modality — ~0× in the rolling-10; three.js compositing substrate dodges the jury-banned Canvas2D [4×]) · **latent/model-call + journey-arc TECH** (emphatically NOT the recent harmonic-event/voice-leading autopilot [~7× of last 10] nor touch input [4×]) · **oracular / Anadol-*Machine-Memoirs* VIBE**. **Ambition 4/5** (`#1 + #2 + #3 + #5`): **#1** never-used-in-window technique (AI-image-pipeline chain, zero in last 15) + **#2** ≥3 subsystems (generative journey engine + per-phase prompt-synthesis + flux image-gen route + three.js accumulating depth-field) + **#3** named refs (Refik Anadol *Machine Memoirs*; Brian Eno *Music for Airports*; TouchDesigner+StreamDiffusion cousin — all in README) + **#5** RESEARCH §455 same-cycle (the StreamDiffusion audio-reactive-AI trend; Dream Chapters is its slow, long-form *inverse*). **Bulletproof fallback (runs forever, zero network/key):** any API error — no `FAL_KEY` (501), rate-limit/quota (429), 5xx, or image-load failure — routes to `drawProceduralCard()`, painting the phase's mood to an offscreen canvas (deterministic from the prompt hash) used as a `THREE.CanvasTexture`, with a readable `text-amber-300/95` "dreaming locally (no model key)" note — never a broken-image icon. Layered degradation: no-WebGL → Canvas2D/HTML stacked-card gallery; full unmount teardown (geometry/materials/textures/renderer disposed, rAF cancelled, timers cleared, AudioContext closed). Guarded `flux/schnell` route (`guard()` first two lines of POST intact — origin + per-IP rate-limit + 40/day quota + FAL account budget backstop). `@fal-ai/client` + `three` already project deps; no new deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 46s**, `/dream/689-dream-chapters 5.92 kB / 297 kB` prerendered static ○ + `/api` ƒ dynamic). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU in sandbox — unverified by ear/eye: whether the modal phase-changes read as a genuine journey on real speakers, the corridor's depth read, and live flux latency; Begin auto-start + procedural fallback guarantee a live glance with zero network). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire: banked **`687-latent-oracle`** ⭐ (audio→image→**audio** closed loop — image's color fed back into the synth; WebGL2 feedback dissolve) + **`688-spectral-seance`** (the *return trip* — image **re-sonified** as a playable instrument, Ikeda/UPIC/ANS) as **IDEAS §455**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/689-dream-chapters/README.md`

- **[/dream/684-kids-every-note](/dream/684-kids-every-note)** — Every Note 🎨🎶. `demoable` · Cycle 454. **For**: kids (4+) / chromatic touch / Canvas2D aurora / luminous-wonder. **What if a 4-year-old had the WHOLE chromatic palette — no "safe" pentatonic cage — and any note they touched was instantly embraced into beauty, because the HARMONY chases the note?** The directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-16 #1**'s spirit ("ban the pentatonic crutch — let a kid meet a wrong note and discover it isn't scary"): instead of *restricting* the child to five safe pads, **Every Note** gives all **12 chromatic petals** and reharmonizes the chord under every tap, so a "wrong" note becomes the color of a freshly chosen chord — the pre-verbal lesson that **consonance is *contextual***, no note is wrong. **The instrument:** tap any of 12 big colored petals in a ring (each a generous ≥48px target, no reading, no mic). A soft bell plays the literal note while 3–4 sustained pad voices **glide** to a new chord and a Canvas2D aurora re-tints to its hue; borrowed/chromatic chords add a shimmer. **The harmony engine (`harmony.ts`) — a real-time reharmonizer built as a decomposed RETRIEVE → EDIT → RERANK pipeline**, directly implementing this cycle's research find (He/Li/Sun/Huang, arXiv:2605.07489, **May 2026**): the tapped pitch class is a hard constraint; **RETRIEVE** a lush ~10-chord palette in C (diatonic I/ii/iii/IV/V/vi `Cmaj9…Am9` **plus borrowed colors** ♭VI A♭maj7, ♭VII B♭maj9, V/V D7, chromatic-mediant E♭maj7); **EDIT/score** by fit (`scoreFit`: chord-tone > 9/13 extension > a ♭9-clash penalty); **RERANK** by greedy nearest-voice `voiceLeadingCost` + a stay-bias so re-taps don't churn. **chromatic-touch INPUT** · **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the **coldest** renderer — Canvas2D 0× in the rolling-10; off the over-represented audio-first/SVG [4×: 666/669/671/680], off the hot WebGL2 [3×: 658/659/675], off the just-used WebGPU [683] + three.js [677]; **zero GPU-failure surface** = the most bulletproof glance) · **real-time reharmonization / chord-chasing TECH** (emphatically NOT a pentatonic scale-snap — the note never moves, the harmony moves under it) · **luminous-wonder VIBE** (off the jury-banned warm/cozy-kids pole). **Ambition honest 3/5** (the only one of the 3 explorers to clear 3): **#2** ≥3 subsystems (4: chromatic touch ring + reharmonization engine + Canvas2D aurora + gliding pad/bell synth) + **#3** named refs (He et al. *Decomposed Retrieval-Edit-Rerank* arXiv:2605.07489; Sony CSL *FlowComposer* reharmonization; "consonance is contextual") + **#5** recent-research (the lead paper is a <30-day drop, 2026-05-08 — RESEARCH §454, same-day chain visible). **Kid-safe chain** (`master ≤0.36 → lowpass ≤7.5 kHz → DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter → destination`; rate-limited triggers, always-on C2+G2 drone bed so never silent; AudioContext resumed on the first gesture — iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** a scripted **ghost-finger auto-demo** taps a phrase that *includes deliberately chromatic notes* (F#/D#/A#) and loops gently, so a silent 06:30 glance both looks alive (drifting field + blooms) and demonstrates the chord chasing a "wrong" note (stops on first real touch); Canvas2D-null → readable `text-rose-300` notice + 12-key keyboard fallback (Z S X D C V G B H N J M), audio still plays; full unmount cleanup (rAF, timers, listeners, audio disposed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero network/secret/permissions). No new npm deps, no WebGL/WebGPU/three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 35.1s, ✓ Generating static pages (490/490)** [489 from cycle 453 + 684 = 490, confirming non-winners 685/686 absent], `/dream/684-kids-every-note 6.09 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static ○, `.html` emitted). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox — unverified by ear: whether the reharmonization reads as "the world embracing my wrong note" on real speakers, and iOS AudioContext unlock; the auto-demo + Canvas2D guarantee a live visual glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal non-pentatonic harmonic events, each a different renderer dodging the banned tags): banked **`686-kids-wish-well`** ⭐ (the most *fundamental* harmonic event — drag a wishing-star UP into a real **suspension/appoggiatura** over a drone, release → it **resolves** down by step with a bloom; WebGPU particle field + real Canvas2D fallback — resurrect FIRST when a fresh-renderer slot opens, re-audit the now-warm WebGPU) + **`685-kids-two-moons`** (tilt a moon between a gold [MAJOR] and blue [MINOR] sun → continuous major↔minor **mode-glide** via a cents-glided third, three.js — the **6+/family-tier** flagship) as **IDEAS §454**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/684-kids-every-note/README.md`

## (Cycle 453 — **adult** build · DEEP, one concept [the live market firehose as a meditation], 3 renderer/aesthetic approaches)

- **[/dream/683-world-pulse](/dream/683-world-pulse)** — World Pulse 🌌📈. `demoable` · Cycle 453. **For**: adults / live-data meditation / WebGPU compute nebula / cosmic-transcendent. **What if the live, collective fear and greed of the world's markets — every buy and sell printing this second — were something you *witnessed* as a cosmic weather system instead of a trading screen?** The lab's **first-ever `WebSocket` input** (grep-clean across ~680 prototypes) and **first market sonification** — completing the real-world-data thread that already sonifies the sky (`618-solar`), earth (`233`/`613-seismic`), a chess game (`649`), and the Wikipedia firehose (`437`), but had never touched the purest real-time portrait of *collective human emotion*: the market. **The instrument:** a keyless browser WebSocket to Binance's public BTC trade firehose (`wss://stream.binance.com…/btcusdt@trade`; READ-only, no API route, no secret) streams every executed trade — price, size, and crucially the *aggressor side* (buyer- vs seller-initiated) — tens of times a second. **Data → sound/visual:** collective **buy-pressure** brightens the lowpass and lifts the chord toward a Lydian-warm consonance + tints the particle field warm (amber/rose); **sell-pressure** darkens toward a pensive tension *that still wants to resolve* + cools the field (cyan/indigo); **trade size** picks a bell's register (bigger = **lower & louder**); **volatility** raises the flow-field's curl/turbulence and the reverb/shimmer density; a slow **~22s harmonic drift** + accumulating state make it genuinely **long-form** (minute 5 ≠ minute 0, not a loop). The body is an always-present **D-Dorian pad bed** so it's never silent between ticks. **live-WebSocket / market-firehose INPUT** (lab-first transport; off the screen-control reflex) · **WebGPU 60k-particle compute nebula OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** GPU renderer — WebGPU 0× in the rolling-10 window; off the **banned** WebGL2 [658/659/675], off the just-used three.js [677] and the over-used audio-first/SVG [5×]; real **Canvas2D** fallback, not a placeholder) · **live market-tick → harmony/texture sonification TECH** (momentum→consonance/tension, volatility→density) · **cosmic / transcendent / Anadol data-nebula VIBE** (love-aligned with Karel's cosmic-particle cluster: `262-aurora-particle`❤️, `321-spectral-flight`❤️, `130-tsl-particle-compute`❤️). **Ambition honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (first `WebSocket` live-stream input, grep-verified) + **#2** ≥3 subsystems (4: ws-feed + synthetic-fallback + rolling-state engine · momentum/volatility mapping · pad+bell synth · WebGPU/Canvas2D renderer) + **#3** named refs (**Brian Foo** *Two Trains: Sonification of Income Inequality* · **Ryoji Ikeda** *test pattern* · **Refik Anadol** data-as-pigment). Consumes the research-first chain (RESEARCH §453 — the lab's data-sonification thread is lopsided; market + WebSocket are the gaps; path a). **Audio-safe chain** (buses → lowpass safety → `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter → master ≤0.34; chimes fade in, no startling transients; algorithmic reverb grows with volatility). **Graceful degradation / glance (bulletproof despite WebGPU + network):** on load a built-in **synthetic market generator** (geometric random walk + volatility bursts + realistic buy/sell stream) starts **instantly** so visuals run hands-off and audio plays on the one *Listen* tap — *before/without any connection*; the live socket is then attempted and hands over smoothly, else a readable **`text-amber-300/95`** notice ("Live feed unavailable — playing a simulated market") and it stays synthetic (re-degrades if a live socket later drops); if **WebGPU** is unavailable/init-fails it silently uses the same-state Canvas2D field. Full unmount cleanup (rAF cancelled, socket closed, oscillators stopped, `device.destroy()`). **No API route, no guard** (client-side WebSocket; read-only, no secret/side-effect — rule #6 clean). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 101s, ✓ Generating static pages (489/489)** [488 from cycle 452 + 683 = 489, confirming non-winners 684/685 absent], `/dream/683-world-pulse 8.39 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static ○, `.html` emitted). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox — unverified by eye/ear: the live Binance handover on Karel's device, the WebGPU draw path on iOS Safari [Safari 26 has WebGPU; the Canvas2D fallback covers any miss], and whether momentum→consonance reads as "the market breathing" on real speakers; the synthetic generator + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a live glance). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept, three renderers): banked **`684-market-tide`** ⭐ (the same market as a slow **ocean tide** you sit on the shore and listen to — buy-pressure = tide *in*, sell = *out*; **Canvas2D** breathing sea, zero GPU surface — the **bulletproof / most-"Resonance"** resurrect) + **`685-ledger-lines`** (the **Ikeda** austere take — every trade a grain of sound + tick of light, one momentum-bent drone that *resolves* when the market calms; Canvas2D data-spectacle) as **IDEAS §453**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/683-world-pulse/README.md`

## (Cycle 452 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal "real harmonic event" explorers, one off-glass)

- **[/dream/680-kids-night-boat](/dream/680-kids-night-boat)** — Night Boat 🌙⛵. `demoable` · Cycle 452. **For**: kids (4+) / **off-glass, eyes-closed** / rock the tablet / minimal inline-SVG / nocturnal-lullaby. **What if a 4-year-old could FEEL a musical sentence finish — by rocking a tablet like a cradle, eyes off the screen, and hearing the music almost-end-wrong, then truly land home?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16's two loudest asks at once** — **#1** ("ban pentatonic on kids — let a child *hear* a real harmonic event") via a real functional **cadence** (NOT a scale-snap), and the never-moved standing **#2** ("get off the glass — 13 of 15 are screens; the 2 that aren't are the best things here") via an **audio-first, eyes-closed** piece. Realizes the §450-banked `676-kids-night-boat`. **The instrument:** rock the tablet gently (DeviceOrientation/Motion, iOS permission inside the Begin tap) — near-black screen, ONE soft inline-SVG boat on a moonlit sea that breathes/dips/blooms with the harmony; *all the meaning is in the ears*. **The harmonic event — deceptive→authentic CADENCE (functional, NOT pentatonic):** a gentle F-major 6/8 barcarolle wanders real diatonic triads (I/ii/IV/V/vi, voice-led via `setTargetAtTime`); every phrase arrives on **V**, then resolves either **deceptively (V→vi** — "almost home but not quite": the boat dips, dims, bittersweet) or **authentically (V→I** — "home": warm bloom + sparkle, boat settles). Each deception and steady rocking raises a `homeBias`; **two deceptions force a home landing** — so the child rocks it "to sleep" and is rewarded by finally hearing the sentence *finish*, then a slow ~11-min lullaby fade. **device-motion INPUT** (rocking — embodied/sensorimotor; off the touch reflex) · **audio-first / minimal inline-SVG OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** renderer, off the jury-banned Canvas2D, **zero GPU failure surface** = the most bulletproof glance) · **deceptive→authentic cadence / functional-harmony TECH** (emphatically NOT pentatonic — the named local minimum; closure is the harmonic event a 4yo *can* perceive per RESEARCH §448/§450/§452, unlike mode) · **nocturnal sea-voyage / lullaby VIBE** (off the jury-banned warm/cozy-meadow pole — dark, calm, drifting; and embodied/active, distinct from the hushed-*still* off-glass cluster 669/666/655). **Ambition honest 2/5:** **#2** ≥3 subsystems (4: device-motion rocking analyzer + functional-cadence phrase state machine [deceptive/authentic branching, homeBias] + nocturne synth [3-voice detuned pad + sub + triangle melody + sparkle] + minimal-SVG breathing renderer) + **#3** named refs (the **deceptive cadence V–vi** + **authentic cadence V–I** of functional harmony; the **lullaby / barcarolle** rocking-6/8 tradition; Brahms' *Wiegenlied* as the archetypal child's cadence). Consumes the research-first chain (RESEARCH §452 — firm 4yo ground = cadence/closure; path a/c) and realizes the §450 banked seed. **Kid-safe chain** (`master ≤0.34 → lowpass 6.5 kHz → DynamicsCompressor → destination`; soft attacks, always-on pad so never silent; AudioContext resumed on the Begin gesture — iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** an **auto-demo self-rocks the boat through the full deceptive→authentic arc hands-free** on load (silent 06:30 glance is alive once audio unlocks with one tap); no motion sensor / denied / no events in 1.5s → **drag up-down** fallback with the reason in `text-rose-300`; full unmount cleanup (timers, rAF, listeners, audio nodes, AudioContext closed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG; zero network/secret/sensor-recording). No new npm deps, no three.js, no WebGL. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm ci` → `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 2.1 min, ✓ Generating static pages (488/488)** [confirming non-winners 681/682 absent], `/dream/680-kids-night-boat 3.61 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static ○). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/motion in sandbox — unverified by ear/hand: whether the V–vi vs V–I contrast reads as "withheld then granted" on real speakers, whether the rocking→homeBias pacing feels rewarding on a real iPad, and iOS AudioContext+motion-permission unlock; the auto-demo + audio-independent-of-sensor guarantee a glance performs). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (all non-pentatonic real-harmonic-events, off banned Canvas2D, one off-glass): banked **`681-kids-every-note`** ⭐ (the freshest concept — touch **12 chromatic petals**, a real-time **reharmonization** engine chases your note so every note [all 12, no scale-snap] sounds lovely; the literal *inverse* of the pentatonic crutch, raw WebGL2 aurora — resurrect FIRST for an on-glass kids harmonic-event fire, re-audit the hot WebGL2 renderer) + **`682-kids-two-moons`** (tilt → continuous major↔minor **mode-glide** via a cents-glided third, three.js — the **6+/family-tier** flagship, since mode→emotion lands ~age 7) as **IDEAS §452**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/680-kids-night-boat/README.md`

## (Cycle 450 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal "real harmonic event" explorers)

- **[/dream/675-kids-deep](/dream/675-kids-deep)** — Deep Drum 🌊🥁. `demoable` · Cycle 450. **For**: kids (4+) / touch big stones / raw WebGL2 abyss / deep-oceanic mystery. **What if the ground under a kid's drumming slowly changed key — so the same beat felt brave, then mysterious, then home?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16 provocation #1** ("ban pentatonic / no-wrong-notes on the kids side — let a child *hear* a real harmonic event… a **drone that shifts under them**") — and the freshest kids concept vs the recent stream (`662` covered tuning-bend, `669` covered closure off-glass; a **shifting-drone** kids piece was un-built). **The instrument:** six big glowing stones over a glowing deep abyss; **tap to strike** soft mallet tones at **fixed pitches** (A2 C3 E3 A3 C4 E4 — multi-touch; desktop keys A S D F G H). **The harmonic event — pedal/drone migration + functional recontextualization (NOT pentatonic-snap):** a sustained drone underneath **migrates its tonal center i → ♭VI → ♭VII → i** (~18s/step, smoothstep glide, never a jump). Because the stones stay fixed while the root moves, **each stone's relationship to the drone changes over time** — a tap that sounded *home* (unison/fifth) drifts to *tense* (2nd/tritone) then *resolves*; the child hears harmony move under a **constant action**, and *sees* it (each stone tints teal→violet as its live tension rises; the abyss color migrates and warms to amber **only at the home resolution**). This is the same fixed note re-heard against a new root taking on a new *function* — emphatically NOT a scale-snap. **touch INPUT** · **raw WebGL2 (GLSL ES 3.00 fragment-shader abyss with bioluminescent motes/god-rays/glowing stones) OUTPUT** (off the jury-banned Canvas2D 4×) · **pedal/drone-migration + functional-recontextualization TECH** (lab-first for kids; NOT pentatonic — the named local minimum) · **deep-oceanic/cavernous-mystery VIBE** (off the jury-banned warm/cozy-kids pole). **Ambition honest 2/5:** **#2** ≥3 subsystems (4: touch pads + i–♭VI–♭VII–i pedal-migration harmony engine + migrating-drone/struck-mallet synth + raw-WebGL2 abyss) + **#3** named ref (Indian classical **tanpura** drone — a constant pedal over which every note gains meaning; here we move the drone instead of the melody / La Monte Young *Dream House*). Consumes the recent-research chain (RESEARCH §450 sensory-safe envelope = the enabler of un-scary harmonic risk + §448 `[foundational]` anchor: a 4yo perceives *the change itself / a moving drone* — exactly this — long before minor→sad). Realizes banked §448 seed `670-drone-cave`. **Kid-safe chain** (`master gain → lowpass 7.5 kHz → DynamicsCompressor(−16/6/12, fast attack) → destination`; capped gains, ~40ms global rate-limit; AudioContext resumed on the Start gesture — iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** ~2s auto-demo taps a couple of stones on load so a silent 06:30 glance is alive; **no WebGL2 → `text-rose-300` notice and the audio still works fully** (drone keeps migrating, stones still sound via touch + keys); full unmount cleanup (rAF cancelled, GL program/buffers/VAO deleted + context lost, audio disposed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; zero network/secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 36.5s**, `/dream/675-kids-deep 6.92 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static ○, **486/486 static pages**; non-winner folders confirmed absent). **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/WebGL2/touch in sandbox — unverified by ear/hand: whether the migrating-drone recontextualization reads clearly over ~18s steps on real speakers, whether the abyss shader runs on iPad Safari [iOS has WebGL2], and iOS AudioContext unlock; auto-demo + audio-independent-of-GL guarantee a glance performs). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (all attacking JURY #1 via orthogonal harmonic events): banked **`674-kids-two-moons`** (tilt → continuous **mode-glide** maj↔min portamento, three.js crossfading sun-moon↔ghost-moon — the most spectacular; flagged a **6+/family** piece since mode→emotion emerges ~age 7–8 per §448) + **`676-kids-night-boat`** ⭐ (the fire's **off-the-glass builder** — rock the tablet, an unseen choir runs a **deceptive V–vi → authentic V–I cadence** you feel withheld then granted, audio-first/eyes-closed; **PRIORITY off-glass resurrect** once not adjacent to 669) as **IDEAS §450**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/675-kids-deep/README.md`

## (Cycle 447 — **adult** build · DEEP, one cycle-4 concept via 3 renderer/interaction approaches)

- **[/dream/666-piano-still](/dream/666-piano-still)** — Still Room 🕯️🎹. `demoable` · Cycle 447. **For**: adult / **off-screen, eyes-closed** / audio-first / tender-intimate / tap-to-place. **What if Karel's solo piano — isolated down to its 12 pitch classes — became an AUDIO-FIRST instrument you sit inside: place a few of his notes into a slow loop, then close your eyes while it grows itself over minutes in his own timbre, quietly adding consonant notes and letting others fade?** The lab's **first genuine cycle-4** (`606 vivisection → 630 refract → 643 constellation → 666 still`) — the multi-cycle deepening two juries say the lab banks and abandons, now pushed to a fourth turn — AND the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16's Karel-facing line + provocation #2**: "get at least one builder off the glass screen (13 of 15 are screens; the 2 that aren't are the best things here)." Still Room is **audio-first** — the music is the whole point; the visual is one quiet **SVG** aura (a breathing center that brightens as more notes ring, markers for the notes in the loop, a slow phrase-position dot) designed to be glanced at then *ignored*. **What it does that 643 did NOT:** (1) **RECORD** — tap any of his 12 notes to *place* it into a ~16s looping phrase (8 slow slots); each pass re-fires that note's isolated material as a long tender grain of his real touch. (2) **EVOLVE over minutes** — genuine long-form state, not a loop: a continuous **decay** (presence half-life ~90s; un-refreshed notes fade and drop out, refreshed ones top up and stay) + a **generative growth** layer, so minute 5 ≠ minute 0. **The growth rule — asymmetric consonance (the anti-pentatonic move):** every several seconds the room buds ONE new note, *chosen* not scale-snapped — `consonance.ts` scores all 12 pitch classes against the currently-ringing set by a harmonic-coincidence base (`1/log2(n·d+1)` over JI ratios: fifth 0.356 > 4th 0.270 > M3 0.228 > m2 0.126 > tritone 0.095) **plus a small directional asymmetry term** (C→G leans −0.016 vs C→F +0.016) so an interval and its inversion differ, then **softmax-samples from the top** (top ~2 at stillness → top ~6 at growth). Anchored on **De Roure, "An Asymmetric Formula for Interval Consonance," arXiv:2606.16412 (2026)** — dated cycle-day (RESEARCH §447). The one `stillness ↔ growth` lever sets both bud rate (~14s → ~5s) and sampling width; a **release** button halves everyone's presence to empty the room gracefully (the optional gathering → presence → release ritual arc). **no-sensor INPUT** (dead-simple 12-note tap row — deliberately calm) · **audio-first / minimal SVG OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** renderer — off-glass, off the jury-banned **Canvas2D 4×**, and the lane the jury says is the lab's best) · **asymmetric-consonance generative growth + grain-replay-of-Karel's-isolated-notes TECH** (emphatically NOT pentatonic/scale-snap — the named local minimum) · **tender / intimate / Eno-ambient VIBE** (the un-built adult register the jury named in provocation #5). **Ambition honest 3/5:** **#1** first looper / phrase-memory built from a *performer's own isolated pitch classes* + first asymmetric-consonance generative growth in the lab (grep-clean) · **#2** ≥3 subsystems (4: HPSS+salience 12-pitch-class isolation [reused 643 engine] · phrase-memory looper with continuous decay/refresh · asymmetric-consonance growth chooser · grain-replay synth + SVG aura) · **#4** genuine cycle-4 (the deepest multi-cycle thread the lab has finished) · **#5** binds RESEARCH §447 (De Roure, arXiv:2606.16412, dated 2026-06-16 — research→build chain is same-day). **#3** named refs that frame it (Brian Eno *Music for Airports* / *Discreet Music*; Éliane Radigue; La Monte Young *The Well-Tuned Piano*). **Reused verbatim** (copied in, NOT cross-imported): `audio.ts`/`hpss.ts`/`chroma.ts` from 643 (Karel's *Welcome Home* recording via the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519-…` route + synth fallback). New work: `consonance.ts` (the growth brain) + the looper/decay/SVG aura in `page.tsx`. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG; READ-only of the existing public `/api/audio` route, used exactly as 630/643/658 — no network secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm ci` → `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 2.0 min, ✓ Generating static pages (483/483)** [confirming both non-winners absent], `/dream/666-piano-still 7.44 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static ○; `.next/server/app/dream/666-piano-still.html` emitted). **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox — unverified by ear: whether `/api/audio/549fc519-…` returns his recording at runtime [synth fallback covers any failure], whether the grain timbre + decay/growth pacing read as tender over minutes on real speakers, and iOS AudioContext unlock; the auto-seed-on-load means a silent 06:30 glance hears the room evolving once unlocked with one tap). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one cycle-4 concept — "the piano remembers you" — via 3 renderer/interaction approaches): banked **`665-piano-loom`** (the same looper as a **raw WebGL2 scrolling phrase-tape** — the most legible "looper" visual; resurrect FIRST for the cycle-4 piano looper as an ON-glass immersive piece) + **`667-piano-tide`** (the same looper as a **three.js reflective ripple pool**; beautiful/immersive but closest to 643's own renderer family) as **IDEAS §447**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/666-piano-still/README.md`

## (Cycle 446 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers all attacking JURY #1 "ban the pentatonic crutch")

- **[/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend](/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend)** — Bronze Bend 🔔. `demoable` · Cycle 446. **For**: kids (4+) / touch-bend + big laras toggle / WebGL2 bronze field (Canvas2D fallback) / temple-dusk. **What if a 4-year-old could grab a glowing bar of bronze and BEND its pitch across a real Indonesian gamelan tuning — and discover that a note that sounds "wrong" can settle into something beautiful?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-16 provocation #1** — "ban pentatonic / no-wrong-notes on the kids side… build a kids piece where a child *hears* a real harmonic event — a non-Western tuning (gamelan slendro, maqam) they can audibly bend; let them meet a wrong note and discover it isn't scary." The lab has BP / JI / Lydian kids tuning toys (`288`/`286`/`280`) but **never gamelan, and never bend-into-and-out-of-tune as the core mechanic.** **The instrument:** five glowing bronze metallophone keys in a temple-dusk field; **touch a bar to strike it**; **drag up/down to bend its pitch continuously** (±300 cents, NO scale-snap — a child slides a tone clearly past a neighbour and back); **release** and it springs slowly home toward its in-tune (*laras*) pitch. **The big sun/moon button** re-tunes the WHOLE instrument + the gong drone between two real gamelan tunings at once — ☀ **slendro** (`0,231,474,717,955` cents — open, floating) ⇄ 🌙 **pélog** (`0,120,270,540,670` — the ~120-cent half-step makes it tense). **The two real harmonic events (audible, not pentatonic-snap):** (1) the laras flip changes the instrument's whole *mood* by ear; (2) the bend lets the child meet a genuine out-of-tune note that **beats** against its neighbours — and as it settles home the metallic **shimmer slows** (in tune ≈0.6 Hz beating / fully bent ≈6 Hz), teaching consonance↔dissonance pre-verbally. **Core technique — inharmonic modal bronze synthesis (lab-first):** each key is additive sine partials at bar-mode-like STRETCHED ratios **1, 2.76, 5.40, 8.93** (not integer harmonics), every partial rendered as two slightly-detuned voices so the pair beats — the signature struck-bronze shimmer; struck envelope (~6ms attack / ~3.4s ring); the low gong drone uses the same recipe an octave down and glides its upper partial on a laras flip so the re-tune is felt underneath. **touch-bend INPUT** (off the jury-banned glass-control reflex — the touch here is *expressive pitch-bending*, not button-poking) · **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (a fullscreen fragment shader: bronze/teal ground, heat-haze shimmer, additive strike glow, in-tune gold "crown" rim, restless flicker out-of-tune — explicitly **OFF the jury-banned Canvas2D 4×**, which is fallback-only) · **inharmonic-modal-bronze + gamelan-bend TECH** (never used in the lab; emphatically NOT pentatonic/scale-snap — the named local minimum) · **bronze/temple-dusk VIBE** (deliberately OFF the jury-banned warm/cozy-kids pole 4×). **Ambition honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (inharmonic modal bronze synthesis — grep-clean; the hardest criterion to claim) + **#2** ≥3 subsystems (4: touch-bend physics with spring-back · inharmonic additive synth with bend-driven beating · the laras toggle re-tuning every key + drone · WebGL2 shader renderer + Canvas2D twin) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (Ableton's **"Tune a Gamelan Yourself"** interactive Sundanese tuner — this cycle's research dive — + Javanese **slendro/pélog laras** + the inharmonic bar-mode acoustics of saron/gendér). **#4 NOT claimed** (single-cycle WIDE; but a clean cycle-2 exists: add *maqam*/other laras, or a "tune the gamelan yourself" mode where the child sets each cent). **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (the gamelan tuner is a living reference resource, not a <30-day arXiv drop — path (a): research→build, not a freshness claim). Born from **RESEARCH §446** (same fire). **Kid-safe chain** (`master gain → lowpass 7.2 kHz → DynamicsCompressor brick-wall → destination`; ~6ms soft strike attack, no harsh transients; always-on gong drone faded in on unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** before audio, keys flicker so the field moves; once unlocked + untouched, a gentle scripted shimmer-strike auto-demo plays hands-free so a silent 06:30 glance is alive; **no WebGL2 → Canvas2D fallback** that still shimmers + sings + bends, with a `text-rose-300` note; AudioContext created/resumed inside the first gesture (iOS unlock); full unmount cleanup (rAF cancelled, GL disposed, nodes disconnected, context closed). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; zero network/secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 37.9s, zero warnings**, `/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend 5.97 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static ○; non-winner folders confirmed absent). **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/WebGL2/touch in sandbox — unverified by ear/hand: whether the bronze inharmonic timbre + bend-beating read as intended on real speakers, whether ±300-cent bend sensitivity + spring-back feel right for a real child, and iOS WebGL2 + AudioContext unlock; the auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback guarantee it performs on a glance — note iOS has WebGL2 so the full shader runs on iPad). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (all attacking JURY #1 via orthogonal harmonic events): banked **`663-kids-two-suns`** (tilt a moon between two suns → a continuous **major↔minor mode-morph** you hear bend, inline-SVG; the fast "mode-morph" resurrect) + **`664-kids-hum-answer`** ⭐ (the fire's **off-the-glass builder**, JURY #2 — hum a note, an unseen choir answers with a **4–3 suspension that resolves**, audio-FIRST/eyes-closed; PRIORITY off-glass resurrect since the screen-monoculture metric still needs a SHIP) as **IDEAS §446**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/662-kids-gamelan-bend/README.md`

## (Cycle 444 — **kids** build · DEEP, one concept via 2 interaction models)

- **[/dream/658-kids-piano-garden](/dream/658-kids-piano-garden)** — Papa's Piano Garden 🌱🎹. `demoable` · Cycle 444. **For**: kids (4+) / device tilt / luminous blooming-garden / play-with-Dad's-real-music. **What if a 4-year-old could play with PAPA'S actual recorded piano — tilt the tablet to roll a glowing seed across a dark garden, and wherever it rests his real piano BLOOMS into a singing flower of light that keeps singing?** The lab's **FIRST kids prototype built on Karel's REAL recorded piano** (grep-verified 0× — no prior kids piece touches `/api/audio`; even `645-kids-piano-creatures` is MIDI synth, not his recording), and the kids-first realization of his explicit standing directive ("incorporate Karel's actual music from the Paths … let his existing music be the input"). Brings the loved adult **`227-paths-granular`❤️** technique (granular resynthesis of his Paths) to the kids side for the first time. **Source:** his *Welcome Home* solo-piano recording via the read-only `/api/audio/549fc519-…` route (`audio.ts`, 4 s abort + JSON-or-bytes handling, copied verbatim from 630/643) → **offline-synth fallback** so it's alive even if the fetch fails. **The granular engine (`granular.ts`):** overlapping 20–120 ms grains read from his buffer, each grain's `playbackRate` **hard-quantized to a ±2-octave C-major pentatonic** ratio set → **no wrong notes, ever**; a ≤25-voice cap with oldest-steal; an always-on gentle pad grain-cloud (never silent); and the distinguishing layer — **persistent singing flowers**: each bloom registers a `SingingFlower` that keeps emitting its own sustained grain-cloud at its own pitch + read-position (probability-gated, ≤14 flowers, smooth fade-in on bloom / fade-out on steal) so the **garden is genuinely fuller at minute 3 than minute 0** (real long-form state/evolution, the exact quality the jury praised in the kids standout `624-kids-day-meadow` — NOT a loop). **The seed (`page.tsx`):** `DeviceOrientation` → a gravity vector (neutral-hold-zeroed, EMA-smoothed) drives **semi-implicit-Euler physics** (friction, clamped top speed, soft wall-bounce) rolling a glowing seed; its **x-position selects the granular read-position + pentatonic degree** (left = earlier/lower, right = later/higher) + stereo pan; a soft glowing trail follows; **dwell ≥~0.4 s** (with a 0.7 s cooldown) triggers a **bloom**. **Visual (`renderer.ts`, WebGL2):** a near-black garden rendered by a fullscreen-quad additive-glow fragment shader — the bright warm seed + fading trail + pulsing petal flowers — with soft tone-mapping so additive sums never clip; a **full Canvas2D twin** draws the same scene if WebGL2 is unavailable. **device-tilt INPUT** (loved lane via `83-kids-tilt-rain`❤️ + `169-kids-marble-run`❤️; off the camera-recency of 652 + mic-recency of 655; **NOT touch** — and note touch is now 0× in the rolling-10, the jury's 5× ban fully worked off) · **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** screen renderer — off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6×** AND off BOTH the rolling-hot **three.js 3× / Canvas2D 3×**; Canvas2D fallback only) · **granular-resynthesis-of-Karel's-REAL-piano TECH** (0× for kids) · **luminous / blooming-garden / tender-wonder VIBE** (the novelty axis here is MATERIAL — his real music — not vibe, so it sidesteps the kids-warm autopilot the jury flags). **Ambition honest 2–3/5 with a HARD #1:** **#1** first kids prototype built on Karel's real recorded piano + first kids granular resynthesis of his recording (grep-verified) + **#2** ≥3 subsystems (4: real-recording loader/decoder + synth fallback · pentatonic granular engine with persistent singing-flower clouds · tilt-gravity seed physics + EMA + drag/key fallbacks · WebGL2 additive-glow garden renderer + Canvas2D twin) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Curtis Roads — *Microsound*** [granular] · **Iannis Xenakis** [granular origins] · **Brian Eno** [generative/ambient] · Karel's own *Welcome Home* album as the material). **#4 NOT formally claimed** (single cycle — but it is a natural cycle-1 of a his-music-for-kids spine; a real cycle-2 [onset/phrase structure gating where flowers bloom, or two-source granular blending two Paths tracks] is a clean kids-4/5 path). **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (the IMPS/Martin embodied-co-creative-ML dive is path-(a) grounding — the body shaping a living response from real material — foundational not <14-day; said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH §444**: the dive's headline hook (cast-shadow/silhouette interaction) was **KILLED by a corpus grep** (`268-kids-shadow-theater` + `513-kids-shadow-still` + `617-kids-shadow-monster` + `463-terra-gamelan` already exist — the "grep before claiming 0×" discipline), which surfaced the genuinely-unmined axis: **his real music is 0× for kids**. **Kid-safe chain** (`padBus/flowerBus → master gain (3.5 s fade-in, ≤0.5) → lowpass ≤7 kHz → DynamicsCompressor → destination`; soft grain attacks, no harsh transients; ~13-min lullaby fade-down). **Graceful degradation / glance:** **~2.5 s idle → a synthetic-tilt auto-demo** rolls the seed, blooms flowers, and breathes the piano hands-free so a silent 06:30 glance is alive with **zero hardware**; DeviceOrientation denied/absent → **drag-anywhere + Arrow keys** with a `text-rose-300` notice (fully playable on a laptop); audio fetch fail → synth fallback (amber-free, transparent in the HUD). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; READ-only of the existing public `/api/audio` route, used exactly as 630/643 — no network secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm ci` exit 0 → `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 2.3 min, ✓ Generating static pages (480/480)** [479 from cycle 443 + 658, confirming the non-winner absent], `/dream/658-kids-piano-garden 7.38 kB / 114 kB First Load` prerendered static ○; one non-blocking unused-eslint-disable Warning, tidied). **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/tilt/GPU in sandbox — unverified by ear/hand: whether `/api/audio/549fc519-…` returns his recording at runtime [synth fallback covers any failure], whether grain density / dwell threshold / tilt sensitivity feel right for a real child on real hardware [runtime tuning, builder-flagged], the granular timbre + loudness of his piano through the kid-safe chain, and iOS DeviceOrientation + AudioContext unlock; the auto-demo + drag/key fallbacks guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire (one concept — his-real-piano garden — via 2 interaction models): beat **`657-kids-piano-garden`** (tilt = a **WIND** that scatters his piano into a swarm of singing fireflies in a WebGL2 point-field — a bulletproof, instantly-joyful *momentary* instrument, but no accumulating state where 658's flowers persist and grow the garden) — banked as **IDEAS §444**, the fastest momentary-register resurrect. Design notes: `src/app/dream/658-kids-piano-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 443 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers across the jury's open adult lanes)

- **[/dream/655-breath-sanctuary](/dream/655-breath-sanctuary)** — Breath Sanctuary 🌬️🕯️. `demoable` · Cycle 443. **For**: adult / off-screen / eyes-closed / ritual-ceremonial / breath-steered. **What if Resonance could be experienced with your EYES CLOSED — a ceremonial sound-space you steer with your BREATH alone?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #3** ("Don't let 626 become the next 576 — build the THIRD embodied/non-screen piece NOW"), and the highest-leverage move against the lab's deepest structural problem the jury names: **14-of-15 recent prototypes render to a glass screen** — off-screen/audio-first was exactly 1× (626). This is the lab's **2nd-after-626 audio-FIRST piece** and a **ritual** journey-engine alternative Karel explicitly asked for. **Input — BREATH via the mic (amplitude only, NO pitch):** `getUserMedia` → lowpass ~1.2 kHz → `AnalyserNode` → time-domain RMS → a slow attack/slower-release **envelope follower** tracking the swell (inhale) and ebb (exhale); a rising-then-falling envelope above threshold fires a **peak** (strike a bowl) and counts a **breath cycle** (drives the arc). Mic routes ONLY to the analyser — no output path, **no howl risk** even on speakers. **Sound (≥3 subsystems → 4):** (1) a **just-intonation overtone choir** — stacked sine partials at pure ratios `1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2` (beat-free), each with its own slow amplitude LFO so it shimmers; breath energy swells loudness + opens a brightness lowpass; upper partials gated by the arc's "openness"; (2) **struck singing-bowl resonators** — a damped modal model, a few *inharmonic* partials per bowl with long (~5.5–12 s) exponential decay, struck at the top of each breath, ringing into a feedback-delay tail; (3) a **breath-RMS envelope follower** (the input layer); (4) a **long-form ritual STATE MACHINE**. **The stateful arc (≥5 min, NOT a loop):** four phases — **Gathering → Invocation → Presence → Release** — each advanced only when BOTH a breath count AND a time gate are met, so minute 5 ≠ minute 1: the **fundamental drifts down a fifth** (C2 → ~43.6 Hz), **more overtones enter**, the **bowl set rotates**, the **tail lengthens**, and the halo's **hue drifts** violet→cyan. **Visual — minimal, audio-first (SVG, no WebGL):** a single faint breathing halo (radius + opacity follow the breath envelope, hue follows the phase) + sparse readable text (phase name · instruction · breath/time counter); everything else dark — the point is to look away. **mic-breath INPUT** (FRESH — mic 0× in the rolling-10; breath-as-control is a cross-modal sensor the lab hadn't used; off the jury-banned **touch 5×**) · **audio-only/off-screen OUTPUT** with a faint SVG halo (the SCARCEST renderer — off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6×** AND the hot **three.js 3× / Canvas2D 3×**) · **long-form JI ritual + breath-envelope TECH** (not sonification, not a sim, not the banned physical-feed template) · **ritual/ceremonial VIBE** (off BOTH banned poles — sacred/spacious, neither the adult doom autopilot nor cozy). **Ambition honest 2–3/5:** **#2** ≥3 subsystems (4: breath-envelope follower · JI overtone choir · struck-bowl resonator bank · ritual state machine) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Pauline Oliveros — *Deep Listening* / *Sonic Meditations*** [breath-based eyes-closed listening, the direct lineage] · **La Monte Young / Theatre of Eternal Music** [JI sustained drone] · Tibetan singing bowls · the **Lyria RealTime / Live Music Models** continuous-steered-stream frame). **#1 SOFT** (additive JI drone + modal bowls are foundational; breath-as-the-steering-control + the off-screen ritual framing are fresh, not hard-claimed) · **#4 NOT claimed** (single-cycle WIDE, no prior thread — the diurnal-arc-with-state is long-form *within* one piece, not a multi-cycle commitment, discounted not over-claimed) · **#5 NOT hard-claimed** (Lyria 3 ~4 mo + server-side; conceptual grounding only). Born from **RESEARCH §443** (the 2026 frontier is the *continuous, live-steered, never-landing stream* — Lyria RealTime; here the steering control is the breath, the lab-feasible no-network ancestor). **Ear-safe chain** (`choir + bowl buses → master gain ≤0.5 (5 s fade-in) → DynamicsCompressor → destination`; delay feedback <0.8; AudioContext + mic both requested INSIDE the "Begin · breathe" gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** mic denied/unavailable → `text-rose-300` notice + an **autonomous breath LFO** (~5.5 s/breath, asymmetric) drives the same params so it ALWAYS plays; **~2.5 s idle → autonomous-breath auto-demo** (no permission prompt) so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the halo pulse and (once unlocked) HEARS the drone breathing with zero hardware; honest caveat — the idle auto-demo builds the context without a gesture so audio may stay suspended until the first click, the visual still animates. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG — mic is local, no network/secret). No new npm deps, no three.js. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 38.3 s, ✓ Generating static pages (479/479)** [478 from cycle 442 + 655, confirming the two non-winners absent], `/dream/655-breath-sanctuary 4.73 kB / 108 kB First Load` prerendered static ○), **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox — unverified by ear/breath: whether the RMS envelope reliably reads real breathing vs. room noise [headphones + a quiet space help; the amplitude detector can mis-read fans/speech], whether the phase transitions land emotionally, the JI/bowl timbres, and iOS mic+AudioContext unlock; the autonomous fallback + auto-demo guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (off-screen-ritual / ecstatic-lift / AI-chain), each bent toward the RESEARCH §443 continuous-steered-stream paradigm; banked **`654-latent-chain`** (the lab's first 2-model AI pipeline CHAIN — audio→FLUX-image→Florence-2-caption→re-seed, Karel's most-wanted "AI image INSIDE an AV piece"; lost AGAIN on glance-verifiability + paid/network/uncertain-model-id risk for an unattended ship — resurrect when Karel's awake to exercise the chain with a confirmed prod `FAL_KEY`) + **`653-endless-lift`** (the **ecstatic** missing-middle — a gospel-house key-lift that Shepard-folds so it climbs forever and never drops; WebGL2; **tsc+eslint VERIFIED clean**, the fastest euphoric resurrect) as **IDEAS §443**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/655-breath-sanctuary/README.md`

## (Cycle 440 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 registers of the jury's "active-wonder middle")

- **[/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures](/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures)** — Piano Creatures 🎹🌱. `demoable` · Cycle 440. **For**: kids (4+) / Web MIDI + keyboard / active-wonder musical / play-an-instrument. **What if a 4-year-old could PLAY a real keyboard and instantly sound like a musician — every note blooms a living creature, and an invisible band plays along in real time so there are no wrong notes?** The lab's **FIRST kids MIDI piece** (grep-verified 0× — no prior kids prototype calls `requestMIDIAccess`), and the kids-register answer to the **JURY 2026-06-15** "missing middle" (the kids side is "warm-or-silly with nothing between" — this is the active-wonder *musical* register where the child PERFORMS). **Input (NON-touch primary):** **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess()` in try/catch, `noteon`/`noteoff` on all inputs, `onstatechange` hot-plug) → falls through to a **computer-keyboard** piano row (`A W S E D F T G Y H U J` upper octave + `Z X C V B N M` lower, no auto-repeat) → last-resort ≥64 px on-screen pads. **No-wrong-notes engine:** every incoming note `snapToPenta`'d to C-major pentatonic → always consonant → a soft two-partial bell/marimba voice. **The accompaniment "agent" (4 subsystems):** a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms poll, ~120 ms horizon) driving (1) an **auto-harmony PAD** on an 8-bar diatonic progression that advances per bar, (2) a **walking root/fifth/octave BASS**, (3) a **groove bed** (kick + noise hats) that grows/thins with a decaying `energyRef` raised on each played note — so the more the child plays, the fuller the band, and the harmony evolves so minute 2 ≠ minute 0; (4) the MIDI/keyboard input + snap layer. **Visual (three.js):** a garden of orbiting emissive **note-creatures** (color by pitch class, radius/height by register) that pulse on strike and breathe with band energy; DPR-aware, resize-handled, full geometry/material/renderer disposal on unmount. **Web-MIDI + computer-keyboard INPUT** (the lab's FIRST kids MIDI — off the jury-banned **touch 5×**; love-adjacent via the kids-keyboard loves `82-kids-color-piano`❤️/`317-kids-color-bells`❤️) · **three.js OUTPUT** (2×→3× in rolling-10, under the 4× ban line — off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6×** and the over-rep WebGL2/Canvas2D-at-3×) · **rule-based real-time accompaniment-agent TECH** (a look-ahead scheduler that answers the player — grep-fresh) · **active-wonder MUSICAL VIBE** (neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny). **Ambition honest 3/5 with a HARD #1:** **#1** first kids MIDI (grep-verified 0×, the genuine never-used-technique claim the recent SOFT-#1 cruise lacked) + **#2** ≥3 subsystems (4) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Toshio Iwai — *Electroplankton* / *TENORI-ON***; the live-co-performance frame **arXiv 2604.07612** *Real-Time Human–AI Musical Co-Performance* + **arXiv 2602.05064** *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*). **#4 NOT claimed** (the advancing progression is long-form *state within one piece*, not a multi-cycle commitment — discounted rather than over-claimed, the "theater" the jury roasts); **#5 NOT claimed** (the 2026 co-performance papers are server-side + older than 30 days; conceptual grounding only). Born from **RESEARCH §440** (real-time co-performance = a look-ahead scheduler answering the performer a beat ahead → implement the browser-feasible rule-based ancestor as a no-wrong-notes kids instrument). **Kid-safe chain** (`masterGain ≤0.55 → lowpass 7500 → DynamicsCompressor(−18,6,12) → destination`, a quiet never-silent drone; AudioContext created inside the Begin gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** no MIDI → `text-rose-300` "press letter keys to play!" + the keyboard path; WebGL fail → rose notice while AUDIO keeps working; **~2.5 s idle → a ghost player auto-plays an evolving melody** (creatures bloom, the band plays along) so a silent 06:30 glance with NO MIDI hardware SEES creatures bloom and (unmuted) HEARS a full song; first real note hands control to the child. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web MIDI + Web Audio + three.js — no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps (three already present). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 117 s, ✓ Generating static pages (476/476)**, `/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures 5.34 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static ○), **NOT browser-verified** (no MIDI/WebGL/audio in sandbox — unverified by ear/hand: whether the rule-based accompaniment FEELS like a band answering the child vs. generic backing, the bell timbres + kid-safe loudness, Web MIDI hot-plug + iOS unlock, three.js visual tuning; the ghost-player auto-demo guarantees it performs on a glance).
