Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-register fire (PLAY/MOVE/PULSE); banked **`647-kids-clap-parade`** (the **PULSE/danceable** register — mic-RHYTHM/onset [NOT pitch] → an inline-SVG marching parade that BUILDS with the beat; the directest fill of the jury's missing groove-middle + cleanest glance [SVG, zero GPU], the fastest kids-groove resurrect) + **`646-kids-sky-conductor`** (the **MOVE** register — webcam frame-differencing → conduct a Canvas2D constellation orchestra; lowest ambition, camera/conducting trodden via 113/217/617) as **IDEAS §440**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/645-kids-piano-creatures/README.md`

## (Cycle 439 — **adult** build · DEEP, a TRUE cycle-3 of the `606`→`630` piano spine)

- **[/dream/643-piano-constellation](/dream/643-piano-constellation)** — Piano Constellation 🎹✨. `demoable` · Cycle 439. **For**: adult / audio-file (Karel's real piano) / clinical-analytical / make-an-instrument-of-his-own-touch. **What if Karel's solo piano could be taken apart down to its 12 individual notes — each pitch class isolated from the recording — and then PLAYED BACK as an instrument made of his own touch, where tapping a note re-fires that note's isolated material?** The lab's **first cycle-3** — the genuine continuation of the `606-piano-vivisection` → `630-piano-refract` arc, claiming **ambition #4 (multi-cycle commitment) honestly** (the move the jury says is "theater — banked every DEEP cycle, claimed never," the reason the lab has **zero 4/5s in two juries**). 606 split the piano into HARMONIC (strings) vs PERCUSSIVE (hammers) via median-filter HPSS; 630 fanned the harmonic layer by NMF into **4 register bands**; 643 goes **finer than register bands** — it isolates the **12 PITCH CLASSES** (C, C#…B) of his playing **and makes them playable**. **The cycle-3 leap = a NEW interactive layer (REPLAY).** **Isolation method (salience-mask, 4 subsystems):** (1) the proven **HPSS ground** isolates a clean harmonic layer; (2) on the harmonic complex STFT, a **Klapuri salience** function scores each candidate fundamental as the summed harmonic-comb amplitude (Σ over 6 partials, weights decaying 0.78^(h−1)) so a real note lights its whole comb while spurious single bins don't; (3) each candidate's salience is splatted back onto its comb bins and **folded by octave into its pitch class** (Fujishima chroma) → 12 dense per-bin support spectra → **soft masks that form a partition of unity** (`M_c = S_c / Σ_j S_j`; the 12 masks sum to 1 at every bin, scaling re+im together → phase preserved, exact reconstruction), each ISTFT'd → **12 isolated pitch-class buffers + the Hammers buffer**; (4) a **three.js** constellation renderer. **The REPLAY layer (the distinguishing cycle-3 feature):** every isolated buffer also feeds a replay bus — tapping a note-orb or pressing a key (`A W S E D F T G Y H U J` → the 12 chromas, `X` → hammers) plucks a **~0.34 s enveloped grain** from a salient region of that note's own material, with a tiny random playback-rate shimmer so layered taps don't phase-cancel; **multiple taps stack** → you re-perform Karel's recording as chords and rhythms built from his own notes (granular per Roads). The 13 base voices always loop sample-aligned; solo/mute/gain are instant click-free gain ramps. **Visual:** 12+1 **orbiting star-constellations** (three.js) that brighten/expand with each note's live level and **FLARE** when you replay it; soloed pulled forward + glowing, muted dimmed; idle orbit on mount + a 2.5 s-idle auto-demo that cycles the soloed note **and replays it** (showing off the REPLAY layer); full geometry/material/renderer disposal. **audio-file INPUT** (Karel's real recording — only 1× in the rolling-10; his explicit "use his actual music" directive) · **three.js OUTPUT** (under-used, 1× in rolling-10 — off the jury-banned **WebGPU** and off the over-rep **Canvas2D 3×/WebGL2 3×**) · **salience-chroma partition-of-unity isolation + granular-replay TECH** · **clinical/analytical VIBE** (the register the jury PRAISED in 606 — "his own music, clinical not cozy" — neither the banned doom nor the banned warm). **Ambition honest 3/5, reaching for the lab's first 4/5:** **#4** real multi-cycle commitment (an honest cycle-3 of 606→630 — the rare criterion the jury says is claimed *never*) + **#2** ≥3 subsystems (HPSS · salience/chroma isolation · granular replay engine · three.js constellations = 4) + **#3** named refs that DRIVE it (**Fujishima 1999** chroma/pitch-class profiles · **Klapuri 2006** summed-harmonic-amplitude salience · **Fitzgerald 2010** median-filter HPSS · **Roads 2001** *Microsound* granular). **#1 SOFT** (granular exists in the lab via `227-paths-granular`; per-pitch-class partition-of-unity isolation is fresh but not hard-claimed), **#5 NOT claimed** (the backing restoration paper arXiv 2603.16926 is ~3 mo, not <14 days). Born from **RESEARCH §439** (the 2026 source-separation frontier moved from *masking* → *reconstruction*; 630's own README banked exactly this cycle-3, "supervised NMF → true pitch classes, not register bands"). **Graceful degradation / glance:** scene orbits + core breathes immediately on mount so a silent 06:30 glance is already alive; idle auto-demo solos+replays notes with no input; recording fetch fail → synthesized-piano fallback (amber notice); WebGL absent → rose notice + **audio stays fully playable**; AudioContext built inside the "Begin · isolate Karel's 12 notes" gesture (iOS-safe); heavy DSP chunked with `await` yields behind a single progress bar. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + three.js — no network beyond the read-only `/api/audio/<id>` recording fetch, no mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps (three already in package.json). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 88 s, ✓ Generating static pages (475/475)**, `/dream/643-piano-constellation 8.78 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static ○, `.html` emitted), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/WebGL in sandbox — unverified by ear/hand: the actual separation quality of the comb masks on Karel's real recording, the grain envelope feel, three.js visual tuning, and iOS unlock; the auto-demo holds a second internal copy of the replay-grain logic to avoid a hook-dep cycle [intentional duplication, no code-health risk]). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one cycle-3 concept, 3 technical approaches): beat **`642-piano-chroma`** (supervised harmonic-comb NMF → SVG chroma wheel — the most *faithful* but incremental reading: 4→12 voices with no new interaction = a clean 3/5, not the 4/5 reach; self-reported a full build pass, banked as the safe-glance companion) and **`644-piano-respeak`** (masked↔additive-resynth PURITY lever → Canvas2D — the boldest *reconstruction*, but **diversity-blocked**: Canvas2D would hit 4× in the rolling-10); both banked as strong **IDEAS §439** seeds. Design notes: `src/app/dream/643-piano-constellation/README.md`

- **[/dream/640-kids-day-wind](/dream/640-kids-day-wind)** — A Day on the Wind 🌬️. `demoable` · Cycle 438. **For**: kids (4+) / tilt / contemplative-wonder / long-form generative. **What if a 4-year-old TENDS a self-evolving day-meadow by TILTING the iPad — steering a glowing wind that PLANTS where it lingers AND PLAYS the garden like a wind-harp where it sweeps, with no touching at all?** The lab's **first honest cycle-2 on the kids side** — a genuine deepening of the jury-named kids standout `624-kids-day-meadow` ("A Whole Day"), directly answering **JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #1** ("finish a cycle-2 for once") while honoring **provocation #4's touch ban** (input swapped touch→**tilt**, pulled by Karel's loved `83-kids-tilt-rain`❤️). **Engine (reimplemented compactly from 624, NOT imported — 4 subsystems):** (1) a **diurnal phase state machine** — a ~9-min day (`DAY_SECONDS=540`) cross-faded through dawn→morning→midday→dusk→night via soft circular smoothstep weights (scale, root, tempo, brightness, 3-stop sky gradient, sun/moon arc, star opacity all blended); (2) a **motif-memory bank** — every planted thing stores an abstract scale-degree motif that `voiceDegree()` **re-voices into the day's current scale** and `mutatedDegrees()` ages (transpose/ornament/thin) so minute 8 ≠ minute 1; (3) a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms poll, ~120 ms ahead) driving an always-on phase-shifting drone bed + ostinato + every planted voice + the traveling-motif replay; (4) a painterly **Canvas2D** side-on meadow diorama. **The cycle-2 contribution:** `DeviceOrientation` `gamma`/`beta` (neutral-hold-zeroed, clamped, eased) steer a **luminous wind spirit**; **dwell-to-plant** (lingering ~0.75 s over empty ground grows a flower/bird/star — no tap); **sweep-to-play the wind-harp** (passing within ~46 px of a planted thing rings its motif's next note in passing order, rate-limited 120 ms/thing — the child draws glissandi by leaning); and a **traveling-motif memory** — the last ~8 brushes (degree + octave + inter-brush timing) are captured into a rolling buffer the scheduler **replays quietly, re-voiced into the current phase + transposed a step**, so a gesture swept at morning returns transformed at dusk. Everything scale-snapped → no "wrong", no fail, no score, no reading. **tilt INPUT** (off the jury-banned **touch 5×**; arrow-key fallback) · **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6×** and over-rep WebGL2; zero GPU failure surface) · **embodied wind-harp + procedural-MMR TECH** over a generative diurnal arc · **kids contemplative-wonder VIBE** (the active-wonder *middle* the jury says the kids side lacks — neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny). **Ambition honest 3/5** (a reach above the 2/5 kids norm): **#4** genuine multi-cycle commitment (a real cycle-2 of 624, the move two juries say the lab never finishes — claimed honestly) + **#2** ≥3 subsystems (diurnal machine · motif bank · scheduler · wind-harp sweep-play = 4); **#1** SOFT (the tilt-wind-harp "play your own garden" is grep-fresh but the diurnal/motif engine is 624's), **#5** NOT claimed (refs ~4–9 mo old, conceptual grounding only). Named refs that DRIVE it: **MusicWeaver — *Motif Memory Retrieval*** (arXiv **2509.21714**, 2026 — stores realized motifs + retrieves/re-voices with controllable variation, not looping/drifting; the traveling-motif replay is a procedural take) · **Toshio Iwai, *Electroplankton*** (2005) · **Brian Eno, *Bloom***. Born from **RESEARCH §438** (2026 long-form-coherence literature independently converged on exactly 624's remembered-and-re-voiced-motif architecture → deepen by making that memory *playable*). **Kid-safe chain** (`masterGain ≤0.55, 2.5 s fade-in → lowpass ≤7000 Hz → DynamicsCompressor −18/6/12 → destination`; AudioContext created inside the "Begin the day ☀" gesture for iOS unlock). **Graceful degradation / glance:** ~2.5 s idle → the wind drifts a Lissajous path, planting + brushing autonomously at **~13× accelerated day rate** so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the sun travel, sky shift, creatures wake/sleep, and the wind sweep the garden with zero interaction or hardware; on first real tilt/key the rate eases to the full ~9-min day; iOS `requestPermission()` path with retry button; arrow-key fallback. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D — no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 81 s, ✓ Generating static pages (474/474)**, `/dream/640-kids-day-wind 7.89 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static ○), **NOT browser-verified** (no tilt sensor/audio in sandbox — unverified by hand: whether the tilt sensitivity [±30°→full deflection] and 46 px brush radius produce a satisfying easily-triggered sweep vs over-triggering on a real iPad [the two likely tuning knobs, no code-health risk]; the osc timbres by ear; iOS unlock). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire (one cycle-2 concept, 2 interaction models): beat **`641-kids-tilt-meadow`** (tilt-as-gravity-on-the-whole-scene + semi-implicit-Euler **seed physics** rolling into sculpted valleys to sprout) on kids-legibility (640's direct "steer the glowy wind" beats 641's indirect physics where the child can't plant where they intend), cleaner *deepening* of 624's recognizable plant-a-thing interaction, less overlap with the §436-banked `634-kids-tilt-river`, and zero physics-jank surface; banked 641 as a strong **IDEAS §438** seed (resurrect with its own "save a persistent valley" sculpting payoff). Design notes: `src/app/dream/640-kids-day-wind/README.md`

## (Cycle 437 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 registers of the jury's named "missing middle")

- **[/dream/637-slow-burn](/dream/637-slow-burn)** — Slow Burn 🕯️. `demoable` · Cycle 437. **For**: adult / tender-sensual / after-hours / make-the-mechanism-legible. **What if Resonance could make the invisible *pocket* of a groove VISIBLE?** A ~72 BPM after-hours **neo-soul vamp** whose centerpiece is an **SVG grid-vs-actual onset plot**: it draws the 16th-note grid, and for every drum hit a hollow ring at the *grid* time + a connecting line out to where the hit **actually landed** + a glowing velocity-sized dot at the real onset. A single **FEEL / looseness lever** (slider + ←/→ or [/]) scales every voice's microtiming lean — kick dead-on, **snare laid-back (~+32 ms)**, **hats pushed early (~−11 ms)**, bass a touch behind — from `0` (robotic/quantized) through `~1.0` (in the pocket) to `1.8` (too loose); as you raise it you **watch the dots peel off the grid** and hear the beat start to breathe. The directest fill of the jury's (2026-06-15) single most-absent corner — the **tender/sensual** register (the adult side went 5× doom; warmth is all kids-side) — and the same "make an invisible musical mechanism legible" quality the jury praised in its TOP standout `606-piano-vivisection` (the grid-vs-actual plot is to *rhythm* what HPSS is to *timbre*). **Engine (4 subsystems):** (1) a **microtiming look-ahead scheduler** (`setInterval` ~25 ms poll, notes ~120 ms ahead of `audioCtx.currentTime`) applying each voice's per-hit timing deviation × FEEL + a hair of human jitter; (2) **from-scratch multi-voice synth** — sine kick, brushed bandpass-noise snare, lazy filtered-noise hats, gliding sine sub-bass, **FM Rhodes** (sine carrier + 1:1 modulator, decaying tine) over **Fm9 → Bbm9 → Eb13 → Abmaj9**, with vinyl crackle + lowpass haze; (3) a **reharmonization state machine** drifting upper-extension voicings, walking-bass passing tones, and ghost-snare fills over "eras" (laps through the progression) so minute 3 ≠ minute 0 (long-form, not a loop); (4) the **SVG grid-vs-actual renderer**. **keyboard + autonomous INPUT** (off the jury-banned **touch 5×**, off mic/real-data) · **SVG OUTPUT** (the **scarcest** renderer, 0× in the window — off the jury-banned **WebGPU 6×** AND the over-rep WebGL2/Canvas2D) · **per-voice microtiming-deviation engine TECH** (grep-0× in the lab — not sonification, not a sim) · **tender / sensual / after-hours VIBE** (the directest opposite of the jury-banned **5× doom autopilot**; distinct from banned kids-WARM by being lean/grown/dissonant). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems → 4 + #3 named refs that DRIVE it: ***Does it Swing? Microtiming Deviations and Swing Feeling in Jazz*** Sci. Rep. 2019 / arXiv 1904.03442 · **Dan Charnas, *Dilla Time*** 2022 · grounded by **arXiv 2605.10281 *Drum Synthesis from Expressive Drum Grids via Neural Audio Codecs*** May 2026; **#1 SOFT** — the microtiming-deviation engine + grid-vs-actual plot are grep-0× but groove/scheduler infra exists (387/632) so discounted, NOT a faked 4/5; **#5 NOT claimed** — 2605.10281 is server-ML, refs foundational). Born from **RESEARCH §437** (groove humanization = measurable microtiming deviation; the "expressive drum grid" as interface). **Graceful degradation / glance:** **~1.8 s idle auto-demo** self-starts the vamp and sweeps FEEL on a ~14 s breathing cycle, so a silent 06:30 glance with **no audio hardware** still SEES the dots peel off the grid; pure SVG = **zero GPU failure surface** (unlike the recent run of build-verified-not-browser-verified GPU ships). **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + SVG — no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 113 s, ✓ Generating static pages (473/473)**, `/dream/637-slow-burn 5.88 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static ○), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in sandbox — whether the snare-late/hats-early magnitudes *feel* like the pocket, the FM-Rhodes timbre, and iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock are unverified; the SVG plot + auto-demo guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of an adult WIDE 3-register fire; banked **`638-gospel-lift`** (the **ecstatic/euphoric** corner — three.js ascending light column + gospel key-LIFT modulation +1 semitone/16 bars, NO drop, genuinely distinct from `387-drop-engine`) + **`639-afro-pulse`** (the **joyful/danceable** corner — Canvas2D afrobeat/highlife, bell-timeline + interlocking 7-vs-5 melodic ostinati; resurrect with a NON-ring viz, its rings overlap `632-polymeter-loom`) as IDEAS §437. Design notes: `src/app/dream/637-slow-burn/README.md`

## (Cycle 433 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal **off-GPU / scarce-renderer** explorers)

- **[/dream/626-empty-room](/dream/626-empty-room)** — Empty Room 🎧. `demoable` · Cycle 433. **For**: adult / eyes-closed / off-screen / embodied-spatial. **What if Resonance could be experienced with your EYES CLOSED?** An **audio-FIRST, off-screen** piece: put on headphones, stand in an otherwise empty room, and **invisible presences drift around you in real 3D binaural sound**. Each is a soft sustained voice in a dark modal register (close, intimate, slightly haunted — an empty-cathedral feeling, *not* warm/cozy). **Turn to face a presence** (phone compass via `DeviceOrientationEvent`, or drag on desktop) and it brightens, opens, and sings more clearly while the others recede — **active listening is the whole game**. The lab's **FIRST audio-FIRST off-screen piece** — the screen is deliberately near-black, showing only an austere Canvas2D compass/radar as a glance-aid; the experience lives in the headphones. This finally gives the **off-screen / embodied-spatial lane its second real entry** beyond the screen-led `576-presence-room` — the 0× lane the jury has named "every fortnight." **Engine (3 subsystems):** (1) true binaural spatialization — each of 5 presences is a Web Audio `PannerNode` (`panningModel:"HRTF"`, `distanceModel:"inverse"`) in 3D world space; the `AudioListener` forward vector rotates as you turn (modern `forwardX/Z` AudioParams, feature-detected fallback to deprecated `setOrientation`); (2) a generative moving-presence engine — each voice has its own orbit `azimuth(t)`, a radius wobble that brings it close past your head, two detuned oscillators + a breath-tremolo LFO, and slow multi-minute pitch-detune drift so the room is genuinely different at minute 4 than minute 1 (it evolves, it doesn't loop); (3) a facing-reward layer — per-frame `cos(angle)` between heading and each presence (cubic-sharpened) swells gain and opens a brightness lowpass on the faced voice. Dark modal pitch set (G-Phrygian-ish over a drone with b2 + tritone tension); damped feedback-delay "empty-cathedral" tail (no IR file). **device-orientation INPUT** (off the glass; drag fallback) · **audio-only OUTPUT** (Web Audio binaural — the *scarcest* renderer, 0× in the rolling-10; austere Canvas2D compass is a glance-aid only — off the diversity-banned **WebGPU 5× + WebGL2 4×**) · **HRTF moving-source binaural TECH** · **intimate / dark / unsettling VIBE** (edges, not cozy). **Graceful degradation:** no orientation sensor / declined → drag-to-turn (rose notice); no HRTF panner → equal-power `StereoPannerNode` (amber note); **~2.5 s idle → heading auto-rotates** so a silent reviewer still HEARS presences sweep the stereo field and SEES the compass dots orbit, zero interaction. **Ambition honest 2–3/5** (#2 ≥3 distinct subsystems + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Janet Cardiff — *The Forty Part Motet* / *Her Long Black Hair***; **Pauline Oliveros — *Deep Listening***; HRTF background **ImmersiveFlow arXiv 2601.12950** + **ASAudio survey arXiv 2508.10924**]; **#1 SOFT, said plainly** — NOT lab-first binaural [`576-presence-room` did head-tracked binaural], the fresh axes are the **audio-FIRST / eyes-closed off-screen register** + the **facing-reward mechanic**). **Consumes the §429-banked `620-empty-room` seed** (research-grounded, the perennially-0× off-screen lane) — a clean "build a queued research-bound idea" path. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D — no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 37.5s, ✓ Generating static pages (469/469)**, `/dream/626-empty-room 4.06 kB / 107 kB First Load` prerendered static ○), **NOT browser-verified** (no headphones/orientation sensor in sandbox — the HRTF localization + compass-heading reliability + iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock are unverified; the auto-rotate + StereoPanner/drag fallbacks make it real and alive at a glance even on desktop with no sensor). Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`627-latent-piano`** (Karel's piano → AI image → reactive Canvas2D warp — **flagged DUPLICATIVE of `441-latent-listening-room` + `448-piano-phrase-painter`**, resurrect only with a genuinely new twist) + **`628-data-matrix`** (a strobing **inline-SVG** Ikeda/Euclidean-rhythm score — the cleanest *edges* + scarcest-renderer swing, a near-instant resurrect for the next abrasive/clinical fire) as IDEAS §433. Design notes: `src/app/dream/626-empty-room/README.md`

## (Cycle 432 — **kids** build · DEEP, ONE long-form concept × 3 non-GPU renderers)

- **[/dream/624-kids-day-meadow](/dream/624-kids-day-meadow)** — A Whole Day 🌅. `demoable` · Cycle 432. **For**: kids (4+) / long-form generative journey / calm-contemplative. **What if a kids music toy were a whole DAY?** A slow, self-evolving **~9-minute journey** through **dawn → morning → midday → dusk → night → back to dawn** that is genuinely *different at minute 8 than at minute 1* — not a loop, not a one-shot. The piece **plays itself** and the child decorates it: **tap low** → a **flower** (blooms by day, closes & sleeps at night), **tap mid** → a **bird** (glides & sings in the morning, roosts at night), **tap the sky** → a **star** (only twinkles & sings at night). The lab's **FIRST kids long-form generative journey-arc with state & memory** — a kids-register answer to Karel's standing "journey-engine alternatives" priority (a diurnal/cinematic arc, not the psychedelic 6-phase one), and the long-form-generative menu category the jury keeps flagging as thin. **Engine (3 subsystems):** (1) a **diurnal phase state machine** — a continuous `phase∈[0,1)` over `DAY_SECONDS≈540` cross-fades 5 musical regions with soft circular-bump weights (no hard cuts): dawn = major-pentatonic/Lydian shimmer, slow, indigo→rose; morning = bright major, livelier, clear blue; midday = fullest playful major, brightest, sun at arc-top; dusk = warm Mixolydian, amber→violet, slowing; night = low glassy lullaby pentatonic + drone, near-black + stars + moon — phase also drives the sky gradient, the **sun/moon traveling a visible arc**, star opacity, brightness, cloud tint. (2) a **motif-memory bank** (the ambition — the "anchor" idea from **arXiv 2604.05343 Anchored Cyclic Generation**): each planted creature stores an abstract **scale-degree** motif that `voiceDegree` re-projects into whatever scale the day is in *right now*, so everything stays in-key as the harmony moves, and `mutatedDegrees` slowly transposes/ornaments/thins it with age — coheres yet evolves. (3) a **Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms pump, notes ~120 ms ahead) driving an always-on phase-shifting drone bed (never silent) + an evolving ostinato + every planted voice; notes never scheduled from rAF. **touch-to-plant + watch INPUT** (off recent camera 617 / mic 603,609 / real-data 613,618) · **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off the diversity-audit-banned **WebGPU 5× + WebGL2 4×** of the rolling-10 — the lab over-corrected INTO GPU, so Canvas2D at 1× is now the scarce renderer; the jury's 2026-06-14 Canvas2D ban is ~10 cycles stale + the data inverted) · **diurnal generative state-machine + motif-memory re-voicer TECH** (distinct from recent CA/physics/sonification/segmentation) · **calm / awe / journey VIBE** (deliberately OFF the kids **funny** autopilot — 603/609/617 went funny 3× in a row). **Renderer**: a single `<canvas>` 2D painterly **side-on landscape diorama** — full-height day-cycling sky gradient, a sun/moon traveling an arc, drifting tinted clouds, layered parallax hills, twinkling night stars, and **cut-paper creatures with simple friendly faces whose eyes close as they fall asleep**; DPR-aware, resize listener, rAF + scheduler + AudioContext torn down on unmount. Kid-safe master `gain (≤0.55) → lowpass (≤7.5 kHz) → DynamicsCompressor (-18/6/12) → destination`, 2.5 s master fade-in, AudioContext created inside the first gesture (iOS unlock). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first kids long-form generative journey-arc with state/memory [qualified — kids "evolving" toys are short loops/one-shots; this is a stateful multi-minute arc] + #2 ≥3 subsystems + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Brian Eno — *Music for Airports* / *Bloom***; **Gary Hustwit — *ENO* 2024**, the generative film that plays differently every time; **arXiv 2604.05343 Anchored Cyclic Generation** — the motif-anchor]; **#5 NOT hard-claimed** — the 2026 papers are heavy server-side DNNs, the engine implements their browser-feasible Eno-generative ancestor, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH §432** (long-form coherence is the live 2026 cs.SD problem — ACG anchor-features + MusicWeaver plan-then-render). **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved contemplative/persistent kids cluster (`133-kids-ripple-pond`❤️, `166-kids-lantern`❤️, `169-kids-marble-run`❤️, `152-kids-star-paint`❤️; additive — the gates governed). **~2.5 s idle auto-demo**: a ghost hand plants a flower/bird/star and the day runs at an **accelerated ~14× preview** so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the sun travel + sky shift through indigo→blue→amber→near-black + creatures wake/sleep AND HEARS the music evolve; on the first real tap it eases to the full ~9-min day. **No API route, no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D — no network/mic/camera/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 32.8s, ✓ Generating static pages (468/468)**, `/dream/624-kids-day-meadow 6.5 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static ○), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/canvas in sandbox — the region scale-snap smoothness at cross-fade midpoints + the per-voice balance under a dense 24-creature garden are reasoned, gain-crossfaded + capped by the limiter; the auto-demo + Canvas2D guarantee it performs on a glance). Winner of a DEEP 3-renderer fire; banked **`623-kids-day-journey`** (the "massively bigger" **three.js** immersive 3D day-world + Canvas2D fallback — the bolder swing, resurrect when GPU renderers cool) + **`625-kids-day-paper`** (the calmest **inline-SVG** matte cut-paper storybook — resurrect for the explicit bedtime register / to give SVG a fresh entry) as IDEAS §432. Design notes: `src/app/dream/624-kids-day-meadow/README.md`

## (Cycle 429 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal edged / off-Canvas2D-or-off-screen / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/618-solar-organ](/dream/618-solar-organ)** — Solar Organ ☀️🌌. `demoable` · Cycle 429. **For**: adult / real-world-data sonification / cosmic-geomagnetic. **What does the space weather hitting Earth right now sound like? — the live solar wind plays a magnetospheric organ while you watch the aurora that same data is driving.** The lab's **FIRST solar-wind / geomagnetic real-data sonification** — the natural non-duplicative next real-data lane after `613-seismic-choir`'s seismic, and a clean hit on TWO open **JURY 2026-06-14** lanes at once: **#3** "STOP re-shipping the ocean — mine UNMINED real-world data" (the jury literally named *aurora/Kp*; 613 took seismic, 618 takes the named-next — explicitly NOT the twice-occupied ocean) and **#2** "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6×)" (primary renderer is hand-written **WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback). **Data**: three **keyless, CORS-open NOAA SWPC** feeds fetched in parallel client-side (`AbortController` 6 s, header-row skip, NaN guards, resampled to a 240-bin/24h series) — planetary **K-index** (`…/products/noaa-planetary-k-index.json`), interplanetary **magnetic field** (`…/solar-wind/mag-1-day.json`; **`bz_gsm` southward = the substorm trigger**), and **plasma** speed/density (`…/solar-wind/plasma-1-day.json`) — with a built-in **synthetic geomagnetic-storm** fallback (a plausible 24h curve with a substorm spike) so it's fully alive with zero network. The last ~24h replays as an evolving ~75 s sweep, then loops. **Mapping (the magnetospheric organ — deliberately NOT a warm just-intonation drone; it has edges)**: a bank of **inharmonic** partials at non-just ratios `1, 2.04, 3.11, 4.33, 5.78, 7.19, 9.02×`; **wind speed → base pitch** (≈300→800 km/s lifts ≈70→165 Hz — higher, more urgent); **southward Bz → the aurora opens** (a lowpass sweeps open + upper partials fade in = the substorm crescendo; northward Bz = quiet/closed); **Kp → intensity AND dissonance** (high Kp detunes the partials up to ~38 cents + raises offset beating oscillators → a tense slow alarm, not a hymn); **density → granular noise texture**. Master `per-partial gain → bus → lowpass → masterGain → DynamicsCompressor → destination`, `webkitAudioContext` fallback, gesture-unlock, ~2.5 s **autostart**. **Visual**: a fullscreen **WGSL** fragment shader builds vertical auroral curtains warped by a **curl of an fBm potential field** (divergence-free flow — Bridson's curl noise); `south`/`kp`/`speed`/`density` drive turbulence, height, flicker, drift, palette — quiet → faint green `#7CFFB2` low on near-black, storm-south → curtains rise + bleed **violet → crimson** at the crown, Kp adds fast shimmer; `navigator.gpu` feature-detected → a real **Canvas2D** aurora fallback sharing the same four uniforms, `WEBGPU/CANVAS2D` backend badge. Subsystems (≥3 → 4): live 3-feed fetch/parse/resample + synthetic fallback (`space-weather.ts`) · inharmonic sonification engine (`audio.ts`) · WGSL curl-noise aurora renderer (`aurora.ts`) · Canvas2D fallback. **real-world-data (live NOAA solar wind/Kp/Bz) INPUT** (off jury-banned touch 4× / mic; never-sonified feed, explicitly NOT ocean, distinct from 613 seismic) · **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6×) · **geomagnetic-data sonification + inharmonic organ + curl-noise aurora TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) · **cosmic / geomagnetic-storm / ominous-at-peak VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9×). Controls: Start (gesture-unlock), VOL/MUTE, autostart; HUD shows current UTC + live Kp + Bz. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first solar-wind/geomagnetic real-data sonification [grep-verified 0×; 613 seismic ≠ solar wind] + #2 ≥3 subsystems [4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**Andrea Polli — *Sonic Antarctica* / atmospheric data sonification**; **auroral substorm physics — the Dungey cycle / southward-Bz reconnection**; **Robert Bridson — curl noise**]; **#5 NOT claimed** — this cycle's June-2026 spatial-audio finding seeded the banked `620`, not the winner, and the curl-noise/sonification methods are foundational, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH §429** (NOAA SWPC verified keyless + CORS-open via two live `curl`s this cycle). **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved spectral/particle/data adult cluster — esp. `262-aurora-particle`❤️ (which was *synthetic*; 618 is the REAL aurora driver), plus `321-spectral-flight`❤️/`323-latent-condensation`❤️/`130-tsl-particle-compute`❤️ (additive — the gates governed). Full graceful degrade: any feed fails → synthetic storm + a `text-rose-300` "using sample data" notice; no WebGPU → Canvas2D + badge; ~2.5 s idle → autostart so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the aurora curtains move AND HEARS the organ with zero interaction or network. **No API route, no guard** (pure client `fetch` of the public keyless NOAA feeds — GET, no key, no side effects, CORS `*`; no secret). No new npm deps (no CDN, no three.js). **Build-verified** (full `npm run build` with all 3 candidates **exit 0** + all three prerendered static; then winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 113s, ✓ Generating static pages (465/465)**, `/dream/618-solar-organ 7.36 kB / 114 kB First Load` prerendered static ○), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox — the live-wire NOAA parse was unexercised [only the synthetic-storm path ran]; the WGSL aurora + WebGPU→Canvas2D downgrade + the sonification feel are reasoned; the autostart + synthetic + Canvas2D fallbacks mean it performs on a glance with zero hardware). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`619-combustion`** ("Combustion" — keyboard/tilt → a procedural **PTR combustion-engine** instrument [pulse-train fired at `cyl/2×RPM/60` Hz → recursive Karplus-Strong exhaust resonators → redline `tanh` scream + overrun backfire, self-contained Blob-URL **AudioWorklet**] on a **WGSL** tachometer; implements arXiv 2603.09391; LOST: edgiest + cleanest research chain, but its abrasive lane was just visited by `601-feedback-howl` and 618 is alive with real planetary data where the engine needs playing — **the strongest resurrect for the next edges fire, now built twice**) + **`620-empty-room`** ("empty room" — device-orientation/head-turn → **HRTF binaural** "inharmonic presences move around you in the dark, hiding when faced + creeping closer when behind you," audio-FIRST off-screen with an austere near-black Canvas2D radar; refs Cardiff *Forty Part Motet* / Oliveros / Sonic4D arXiv 2506.15759; LOST: the boldest diversity swing at the perennially-0× off-screen lane, but the payoff lives entirely in headphones + eyes-closed head-turning [most unverifiable, weakest at a near-black glance] and overlaps `576-presence-room` — **the ready build-complete resurrect to finally give off-screen its 2nd entry**) as IDEAS §429. Design notes: `src/app/dream/618-solar-organ/README.md`

## (Cycle 428 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-fingertip / off-Canvas2D / funny explorers)

- **[/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster](/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster)** — Shadow Monster Stage 👹🎭. `demoable` · Cycle 428. **For**: kids (4+) / funny / embodied-spatial. **Stand in front of the camera and your whole BODY becomes a giant glowing googly shadow-puppet monster on a lit stage — wave and the air WHOOSHES, jump and it BOINGs, get big (step in / arms wide) and it ROARs.** The directest KIDS-register answer to TWO standing **JURY 2026-06-14** provocations at once: **#2** ("commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js, 6×") — the primary renderer is **hand-written WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback; and **#5** ("embodied-spatial got exactly one entry [576] this window then went cold — don't let it be a singleton") — this is the whole-body, off-the-glass follow-through, in a 4-year-old's register. **INPUT — body SILHOUETTE mask**: the webcam frame → **MediaPipe ImageSegmenter** (selfie/person segmentation, loaded dynamically from the jsDelivr CDN at runtime — **no npm dep**, wrapped in one `try/catch`), the filled body **mask** downsampled into an occupancy grid (deliberately the MASK, *not* pose/skeleton landmarks — grep-distinct from the lab's landmark vision pieces 234/419/568 hands+pose, 258/423/576 face). **Signals from the mask each frame** (`mask.ts`): frame-to-frame change (motion energy) → **WHOOSH** intensity; centroid rising fast (a jump) → **BOING**; mask area growing (steps toward camera / arms up) → a swelling **ROAR**. **CREATURE**: the mask becomes a dark friendly puppet body with a glowing wobbling breathing outline (squash-and-stretch), a soft inner glow that pulses with the roar, whoosh streaks that smear with motion, and two procedural **googly eyes** placed near the top of the mask's bounding box with pupils rolling toward the body's motion. **OUTPUT — WGSL/WebGPU**: the mask uploads as an `r8unorm` texture → a hand-written fragment shader renders the glowing creature field on a spotlit stage; a **full Canvas2D fallback** (`render2d.ts`) draws the same silhouette + glow + googly eyes, auto-selected when `navigator.gpu` is absent or WebGPU init fails (live backend badge). **SOUND** (`audio.ts`): an always-on warm theatre bed (never silent), a continuous airy whoosh, a soft-attacked heavily-low-passed ROAR (a happy dinosaur, never a scary growl), and a comic spring boing — kid-safe master `gain (0.55) → lowpass 7.5 kHz → DynamicsCompressor (-18/6/12) → out`, pre-created voices (<50 ms). Subsystems (≥3 → 4): camera capture + MediaPipe ImageSegmenter mask + WGSL/WebGPU stage renderer (+Canvas2D fallback) + motion-energy-driven foley synth. **camera/body-segmentation INPUT** (whole-body, off jury-banned touch 4× / mic; camera/vision was 0× in the rolling-10) · **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6×) · **silhouette-mask→creature + motion-energy→synth TECH** (grep-distinct from the lab's landmark/pose vision pieces; NOT warm-JI [banned], NOT onset/beat) · **silly-friendly giant-shadow-monster-theater VIBE** (funny/edges — the kid-safe form of "off cozy"; NOT a warm drone). **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [**shadow-puppet / wayang-kulit theatre**; **Daniel Rozin's mechanical mirrors** — a viewer's silhouette materialised as a living reflection; **Tex Avery / Looney Tunes squash-and-stretch**; **MediaPipe ImageSegmenter**]; **soft #1 / #5 NOT hard-claimed** — segmentation-mask-as-creature is grep-distinct but body vision isn't lab-first, and the technique is foundational with no <30-day bind, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH §428**. **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved camera/body/mirror kids cluster (`217-dance-avatar`❤️, `234-kids-hand-creature`❤️, `104-kids-mirror-draw`❤️, `101-camera-song`❤️; additive — the gates governed). Full graceful degrade: the whole camera+MediaPipe init is in **one `try/catch`** — any failure (denied / blocked / CDN-WASM-model load error / unsupported) → friendly `text-rose-300` notice + three ≥88px **ROAR / WHOOSH / BOING** buttons + keys **A/S/D**; no WebGPU → Canvas2D; ~2.5s idle → a **ghost-silhouette auto-demo** drifts/waves/jumps/grows on a loop so a silent 06:30 glance SEES the monster move AND HEARS it with zero interaction. **No API route, no guard** (pure client camera + Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D — camera frames analysed in-browser only, never recorded or sent; no network/secret). No new npm deps (MediaPipe via CDN; three.js avoided). **Build-verified** (full `npm run build` with all 3 candidates exit 0; then winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, ✓ Compiled successfully in 93s, ✓ Generating static pages (464/464)**, `/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster 9.36 kB / 116 kB First Load` prerendered static ○), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/GPU/audio in sandbox — the segmentation-mask legibility + the whoosh/boing/roar mapping feel are reasoned; the idle ghost-silhouette demo + no-camera buttons mean it performs on a glance with zero hardware). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`615-kids-face-monster`** ("Silly Face Monster" — camera/**FaceLandmarker blendshapes** → WebGL2 SDF rubber-monster mirror: jaw→roar, brows→boing, smile→giggle, pucker→toot; refs Tex Avery / Toca Boca / Blendshapes GHUM arXiv 2309.05782; LOST: charming + the most legible cause→effect, but renders WebGL2 not the demanded WebGPU, and face-puppet overlaps the lab's existing face cluster 258/423/576) + **`616-kids-tilt-zoo`** ("Tilt Zoo" — **device-tilt → WGSL/WebGPU** instanced googly creatures rolling/bonking + cartoon foley, **camera-FREE**; refs Carl Stalling/Raymond Scott, Treg Brown, one-man-band; LOST: the most reliable at-a-glance + a full WebGPU spectacle, but a physics tray is a smaller concept than becoming a giant monster — **banked precisely as the camera-free WebGPU safety net if 617's camera path proves flaky on review**) as IDEAS §428. Design notes: `src/app/dream/617-kids-shadow-monster/README.md`

## (Cycle 427 — **adult** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal edged / off-Canvas2D / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/613-seismic-choir](/dream/613-seismic-choir)** — Seismic Choir 🌍🌋. `demoable` · Cycle 427. **For**: adult / real-world-data sonification / ominous-geological. **What does the planet sound like right now? — the live global earthquake feed of the last 24 hours, turned into an ominous trembling sonification: every real quake on Earth becomes a deep resonant groan over a slowly rotating WGSL/WebGPU globe of tectonic light.** The lab's **FIRST seismic / this-class real-data piece** — and the only build this fortnight to hit **THREE JURY 2026-06-14 provocations at once**: **#1** build with EDGES, off cozy (deep inharmonic rock-rumbles + a tritone tectonic drone — the opposite of the banned warm chord); **#2** "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6×)" (primary renderer is hand-written **WGSL on WebGPU**, Canvas2D only as fallback); **#3** "STOP re-shipping the ocean — mine UNMINED real-world data" (live **seismic**, explicitly not the now-twice-occupied ocean). **Data**: USGS `summary/all_day.geojson` (every quake on Earth past 24h; no key, CORS, fetched client-side), with a bundled ~46-quake **synthetic fallback** across real fault zones (Honshu/Cascadia/Chile/Sumatra/Tonga/Nepal/Italy + a deep-Benioff subset + a late-day aftershock swarm) so it's fully alive with zero network — a `DATA: LIVE/SAMPLE` badge says which. **Mapping**: magnitude → loudness + rumble duration + lower fundamental + sub-bass swell (≥4.2); depth_km → brightness (shallow = bright crack, deep = dull groan); longitude → stereo pan; latitude → resonance tilt. The 24h window replays in ~60s on a loop (speed-adjustable) so you hear the **day's seismic rhythm** — clusters, swarms, the silence between. **Synthesis**: each quake = a filtered-noise impact excitation through a bank of **low, slightly-inharmonic bandpass resonators** (ratios 1/1.94/2.41/3.77 over 32–120 Hz — inharmonic so it reads as *rock*, not a synth pitch), mag-scaled decay, sub-bass sine swell on the big ones; under it a continuous dark **tectonic drone** built on tension intervals (minor-2nd beat, tritone-ish, inharmonic) — explicitly NOT a warm JI chord. Ear-safe master `gain → lowpass ~7k → DynamicsCompressor (brick-wall limiter) → Analyser → out`, capped gains, soft sub attacks. **Visual**: a WGSL fragment shader raymarches a dark rotating globe of tectonic light; each quake blooms at its true (lon,lat) and ripples outward as an expanding geodesic ring, the whole field trembling in sympathy with the audio (uniforms driven by the `AnalyserNode`) — big quakes flare + shake the screen, shallow = magma-orange, deep = oxblood-red, over ash-grey ridges on black; `navigator.gpu` feature-detected → a real **Canvas2D** globe fallback (same map/pulses/graticule), `RENDER: WebGPU/Canvas2D` badge. Subsystems (≥3 → 3 independent): live USGS fetch/parse (`quakes.ts`) + physical-modeling sonification engine (`audio.ts`) + WGSL WebGPU renderer (`gpu.ts`) + Canvas2D fallback (`render2d.ts`). **real-world-data (live seismic) INPUT** (off jury-banned touch 4× / mic; explicitly NOT ocean) · **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6×) · **data-sonification + inharmonic physical-model resonant-body rumble TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) · **ominous/geological/tectonic VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9×). Controls: **Start** (audio gesture-unlock + `webkitAudioContext`), `Space` play/pause, `M` mute, `[`/`]` slow/speed the timeline; on-screen buttons mirror all (≥44px); ~2.5s idle auto-start so a muted 06:30 glance already shows the globe pulsing. **Ambition honest 2–3/5** (#1 first seismic/this-class data in the lab [grep-verified; ocean ≠ seismic] + #2 ≥3 distinct subsystems + #3 named ref [**Florian Dombois — *Earthquake Sounds* / auditory seismology**]; **#5 NOT hard-claimed** — this cycle's bound research finding [arXiv 2603.09391 engine-synthesis] seeded the banked `614`, not the winner, said plainly). Honest weak spots (per builder): the WGSL globe is procedural (graticule, not real coastlines) and the per-quake resonator bank is a stylized physical model, not a literal seismogram convolution — so it's *Dombois-adjacent*, not a 1:1 seismogram-to-audio transform. **Love-aligned** to Karel's loved spectral/particle/data adult cluster (`323-latent-condensation`❤️/`321-spectral-flight`❤️/`262-aurora-particle`❤️; additive — the gates governed the pick). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`612-piano-larynx`** (LPC cross-synthesis "talking piano" on Karel's material — WebGL2 "spectral throat", refs Lansky *Six Fantasies* / Dodge *Speech Songs*; LOST: strong but `606` just mined the his-material vein, and its "his material" is diluted by a synthesized default modulator [file-drop is the real-piano path]) + **`614-combustion`** (procedural combustion-engine instrument — pulse-train fired at RPM → recursive Karplus-Strong exhaust resonators, AudioWorklet, off-glass keyboard+tilt, WebGPU; implements this cycle's research dive arXiv 2603.09391; LOST: edgiest + cleanest research chain, but its abrasive lane was just visited by `601-feedback-howl` two adult cycles ago) as IDEAS §427. **No API route, no guard** (client-side `fetch` of the public USGS feed — GET, no key, no side effects; no secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0 after a `.next`-corruption clean [3 concurrent builder builds raced the shared `.next` → ENOENT pages-manifest → `rm -rf .next` rebuilt clean], `✓ Compiled successfully in 38.6s`, `✓ Generating static pages (464/464)`, `/dream/613-seismic-choir 8.9 kB / 115 kB First Load` prerendered static ○), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio/network in sandbox) — the auto-start + sample dataset + Canvas2D fallback mean the globe pulses + groans on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel sees the real planet's last 24h at his desk. Design notes: `src/app/dream/613-seismic-choir/README.md`

## (Cycle 426 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal funny / off-Canvas2D / non-fingertip explorers)

- **[/dream/609-kids-blow-parade](/dream/609-kids-blow-parade)** — Blow Parade 🎈💨. `demoable` · Cycle 426. **For**: kids (4+) / funny / loud. **BLOW into the mic and a parade of googly balloon-creatures puffs up bigger and bigger — then rips a whoopee-cushion RASPBERRY and zooms off when you stop.** A full hand-written **WGSL/WebGPU** spectacle (Canvas2D fallback) driven by **breath** — the directest KIDS-side hit on **JURY 2026-06-14 provocation #2**: "commit to a full WebGPU spectacle or get off the screen; Canvas2D is the new three.js (6×)." Now that **Safari 26 (Sept 2025) put WebGPU on iPad/iOS** (RESEARCH §426), a WGSL kids spectacle is an iPad-native path, not a desktop flex. Technique: a **breath-energy blow detector** (`detect.ts`: spectral **flatness** + **peakiness** + energy gate over ~120 Hz–6 kHz, fast-attack/slow-release smoothing) fires only on loud-AND-noise-like-AND-non-tonal breath, so a yell or sung note is **rejected** — only true breath inflates; the active balloon's radius grows with sustained blow (rising stretched-neck squeak), and on release it enters a fly/tumble/deflate/recycle phase while a **whoopee raspberry** (detuned saw+square through a flutter-square-LFO'd moving lowpass + escaping-air noise, falling pitch) rips. **WGSL renderer**: one instanced quad per balloon, per-instance data (center/radius/hue/squash/spin/eye-look/blink/mouth) → storage buffer each frame, the fragment shader draws the whole googly creature procedurally; a **Canvas2D fallback** draws the identical parade (auto-selected on no `navigator.gpu`, live backend badge). Subsystems (≥3 → 5): blow detector + inflation physics + raspberry synth + WGSL renderer + Canvas2D fallback. **mic-BLOW/breath INPUT** (non-fingertip — off jury-banned touch 4×; grep-distinct from yell/voice) · **WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** (off jury-banned Canvas2D 6×; the spectacle lane the jury keeps begging to revive) · **breath-energy + balloon-physics + raspberry-synth TECH** (NOT a warm-JI bed [banned], NOT onset/beat) · **giggly-raspberry FUNNY VIBE** (off jury-banned cozy ~9×; extends the lone 603 funny register so it isn't a singleton). Kid-safe: `masterGain (≤0.55) → lowpass 7.5 kHz → DynamicsCompressor (-18/6:1/12) → out`, soft attacks, capped gains, pre-built nodes (<50 ms first blow), never-silent playful bed (NOT a warm drone), no fail states, ≥64px targets. Full graceful degrade: no mic → big **💨 hold-to-blow** button + **Space**; no WebGPU → Canvas2D; ~2.5s idle → a **ghost-blow auto-demo** inflates + pops on a loop so the silent 06:30 glance still sees + hears it. **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [5] + #3 named refs that drive it [party-blower/whoopee-cushion foley; balloon inflate→release physics; Toca Boca]; **#1 NOT claimed** — `95-kids-breath-bubbles` already did blow-via-loudness, so this is a *refinement* [flatness/peakiness blow-vs-voice gate], not a first-breath-input, said plainly; **#5 soft** — WebGPU-on-iPad is the enabling shift but ~9 mo old). Born from RESEARCH §426; resurrects the §424-banked seed `605` (research-grounded, cycle-424 soft-body-WebGPU dive). Love-aligned to Karel's playful kids cluster (`98-kids-drum-circle`❤️/`169-kids-marble-run`❤️; additive). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banked **`610-kids-stomp-band`** (device-motion shake/stomp → three.js cartoon junk-pile foley; LOST: rides the relocated three.js monoculture + close to 566) + **`611-kids-face-monster`** (camera/MediaPipe face → WebGL2 silly-monster mirror; the most novel — first comedic face-puppet — but the MediaPipe-CDN load is the riskiest 06:30 surface + camera was 3×) as IDEAS §426. **No API route, no guard** (pure client mic + Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D — no network/secret). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/609-kids-blow-parade` in `app-path-routes-manifest.json` + prerendered static `.html` 22.5 kB), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU/mic in sandbox — blow-vs-voice thresholds + the raspberry timbre are reasoned/heuristic; the idle auto-demo + hold-to-blow fallback mean it puffs + pops on a glance with zero hardware). Design notes: `src/app/dream/609-kids-blow-parade/README.md`

## (Cycle 425 — **adult** build · DEEP, ONE concept on 3 decomposition techniques)

- **[/dream/606-piano-vivisection](/dream/606-piano-vivisection)** — Piano Vivisection 🎹🔬. `demoable` · Cycle 425. **For**: adult / his real music / clinical-dissective. **Take Karel's OWN recorded piano APART into the singing strings (harmonic) vs. the hammer/key noise (percussive) — and remix the two layers live.** The lab's **FIRST audio source-separation instrument** (grep-verified: NMF/HPSS/SMS/source-separation/stem-split all **0×** across 600+ prototypes) — and the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-14 provocation #4**: "mine the vein that produced both 4/5s [557 splat, 583 musaicing] — a fresh analysis/resynthesis technique on *his own* material; do it again — neural source separation, NMF, DDSP." The jury named **583 as the gem to EXTEND** → AGENT.md maps that to **DEEP**. Technique: **median-filter HPSS** (Fitzgerald, DAFx 2010) — his real solo piano is fetched, sliced (~9s mono @22kHz), STFT'd (Hann 1024/hop 256, complex bins kept), then a **time-median** filter (~17 frames/bin) isolates the sustained horizontal harmonic trails (strings) while a **freq-median** filter (~17 bins/frame) isolates the vertical transient strikes (hammers); soft power-2 Wiener masks → phase-preserving ISTFT overlap-add → two independently-mixable layers. Subsystems (≥3 → 5): STFT analysis + median-filter HPSS solver + phase-preserving mask resynthesis/ISTFT + WebGL2 vivisection render (harmonic = cyan/steel horizontal streaks, percussive = magenta/white vertical strikes, balance-weighted, sweeping playhead, R32F texture w/ 8-bit fallback) + off-glass keyboard/tilt control. **audio-file (his piano) + keyboard/tilt off-glass INPUT** (NOT a fingertip [jury-banned touch], NOT mic, NOT camera) · **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D [jury-banned 6×]) · **median-filter HPSS source-separation TECH** (NOT warm-JI bed [jury-banned], NOT onset/beat, NOT concatenative) · **clinical/dissective "vivisection" VIBE** (REVEALS the machine inside his warm piano — the opposite of the cozy register the jury banned ~9×). Controls: keyboard `1`/`2` solo/mute strings/hammers, `←/→` morph balance, `↑/↓` gain, `space` play/pause; iOS-gated device-tilt morphs balance on mobile; secondary on-screen faders. ~2.5s idle auto-demo sweeps the balance so a silent 06:30 glance shows the field separating + (un-muted) hears the layers. Synthesized solo-piano fallback if the `/api/audio` fetch fails (emerald "Karel's piano" vs amber "fallback" badge) so it ALWAYS decomposes. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no CDN, no three.js** (pure client fetch of the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` + Web Audio + raw WebGL2). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 first source separation in the lab [grep-verified 0×] + #2 ≥3 subsystems [5] + #3 named refs [Fitzgerald DAFx 2010; the CataRT/musaicing lineage 583 extends]; **#5 NOT claimed** — the 2026 DNN source-separation papers [arXiv 2603.04032] are ~3 mo and the classical median-filter method is foundational, said plainly). Born from **RESEARCH §425**. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one "take his piano apart" concept on 3 techniques); banked **`607-piano-prism`** (NMF: factor his piano into 6 learned spectral components to solo/mute/re-mix — the most technically ambitious, the strongest cycle-2 deepening) + **`608-piano-sieve`** (SMS: sift tonal partials vs the stochastic residual, with freeze + stretch) as IDEAS §425. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `✓ Compiled successfully in 101s`, `✓ Generating static pages (461/461)`, `/dream/606-piano-vivisection 8.35 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static ○), **NOT browser-verified** (no real audio/GPU in sandbox) — the auto-demo + keyboard fallback mean the field separates on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can morph his own piano apart at his desk. Design notes: `src/app/dream/606-piano-vivisection/README.md`

## (Cycle 420 — **kids** build · WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers off grep-verified *un-simulated physical instruments* in the 588-deep lab. Ships **`593-kids-sun-shadows`**: *a 4-year-old drags a glowing sun across the sky and the shadows it casts SING — a sundial turned into a sequencer.* A few objects (tree/rock/crystal) throw long cast shadows that sweep the ground as you move the light (gnomon geometry `L = H/tan(altitude)`, swinging away from the sun); scattered glowing **chime stones** ring a warm note when a shadow's tip crosses them — so the music **emerges from where the shadows fall**, not from tapping a note. A slow sun-drag pulls every shadow across the ground in turn, ringing the spatially-ordered stones as a gentle assembling **arpeggio**; tap empty ground to plant another object = another moving playhead. The **lab's first shadow-as-playhead** (cast-shadow geometry as a musical sequencer — grep-verified 0× across 588 prototypes; sundial/gnomon/shadow-sequencer all NONE). Chime stones tuned to a **just-intonation** golden-hour set (`1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 11/8 Lydian #4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2/1, 9/4`) over a low warm root — spatially ordered so you hear intervallic motion (a chord assembling), deliberately **NOT** the jury-banned C-major-pentatonic "nothing-is-ever-wrong" wash. The sky runs a **dawn rose/amber → pale noon gold → dusk violet** journey as the sun rises/sets, the ambient pad deepening at dusk; kids-safe master (`gain → lowpass ≤7k → DynamicsCompressor → out`), capped object count, soft attacks. The warmest + most surprising of the three explorers and the directest **kids-side** hit on **JURY 2026-06-13**'s twin asks: **#4 chase WARMTH, tension you FEEL not solve** (you drag light, nothing to decode) and the *spirit* of **#1 off the glass / spatial** (light is a movable spatial agent, not a finger-on-a-dot). **touch-drag-the-sun INPUT** (+ optional feature-detected DeviceOrientation tilt, pointer-drag guaranteed) · **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [jury 6×], NOT SVG [jury 5×], NOT the mic [jury 5×] — every ban dodged) · **shadow-geometry-as-spatial-sequencer TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) · **kids golden-hour contemplative-warm VIBE** (NOT a creature [jury froze the 549/569 spine], NOT the pentatonic-tap wash). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 shadow-as-playhead [grep-verified 0×] + #2 ≥3 subsystems [sun/gnomon model + per-object shadow-cast geometry + shadow↔stone strike sequencer + JI chime synth + sky-color/time-of-day pad journey = 5] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [the **sundial / gnomon** — a shadow as the measure of the sun's motion, here playing time instead of measuring it; **Olafur Eliasson *The Weather Project*** (Tate Modern Turbine Hall, 2003) — the single room-filling artificial sun + golden-hour palette]; **#5 NOT claimed** — foundational physical phenomenon newly simulated, no <14-day bind, soft RESEARCH §420). Born from RESEARCH §420 (in a 588-deep lab, grep for a real-world acoustic/physical phenomenon nobody has modeled yet → three 0× gaps: Galton board, jal-tarang/glass-armonica friction resonator, sundial shadow-sequencer). **Resonates with Karel's loved contemplative-sky/water cluster** (`152-kids-star-paint`❤️, `133-kids-ripple-pond`❤️, `107-ocean-presence`❤️; additive). Degrades fully: no tilt → drag only; no audio until the Tap-to-begin gate; idle ~2.5s → the sun auto-drifts so the silent 06:30 glance sweeps shadows + sings. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D — no mic/camera/network/secret). No new npm deps. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; siblings **`592-kids-water-bowls`** ("Singing Water" — **jal-tarang + glass-armonica**: tap to ring, **RUB to make it SING** via a friction-excited resonator [high-Q bandpass noise + shimmer partials, drive = drag speed]; the deepest fresh *audio primitive*; LOST: most technically novel but 593 is warmer at a glance — **strongest unshipped kids seed, ship next kids cycle**) + **`591-kids-plinko-bells`** ("Bell Drop" — a sonified **Galton/quincunx board (1894)**: balls cascade through pegs into 9 JI bins, the histogram blooms *as a warm major chord* "richest in the middle"; emergent/autonomous, love-aligned to 236/130/262; LOST: richest concept but cooler/STEM-first) banked IDEAS §420. Build-verified (`npm run build` OK, `/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows` prerendered static `.html`), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio/pointer in sandbox — the shadow↔stone feel, JI tuning by ear, and iOS audio-unlock follow proven patterns but are unexercised here). · *(Cycle 419 shipped `588-tidal-organ`, adult WIDE — not separately re-blocked here; doc drift. Cycle 417 below.)*

- **[/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows](/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows)** — Move the Sun ☀️🎶. `demoable` · Cycle 420. **For**: kids (4+). Drag a glowing sun across the sky and the shadows it casts sing: each object throws a long cast shadow that sweeps the ground, and when a shadow's tip crosses a glowing chime stone it rings a warm note — a sundial turned into a sequencer. The lab's first shadow-as-playhead (grep-verified 0×). Touch-drag input (NOT the mic), Canvas2D (NOT three.js/SVG), just-intonation golden-hour chimes over a dawn→noon→dusk sky journey (NOT the pentatonic wash), no creature (the jury froze that spine). The warmest + most surprising of a WIDE 3-explorer kids fire. Refs: the sundial/gnomon; Olafur Eliasson *The Weather Project* (2003). No API route / no guard (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D). Design notes: `src/app/dream/593-kids-sun-shadows/README.md`

## (Cycle 417 — **adult** build · DEEP, 3 technical approaches on one concept. Ships **`583-piano-mosaic-field`**: *reach INTO Karel's recorded piano and re-voice it — drag a luminous probe through a 2-D timbre field and the instrument answers with his own closest-matching grains, painting with his timbre in real time.* The lab's **first concatenative-musaicing / corpus-based resynthesis** — Karel's real Welcome-Home solo piano is decoded client-side and shattered into a corpus of ~120 ms Hann grains, each precomputed (per-grain FFT) with a **spectral centroid** (brightness → field X), **RMS loudness**, and a **crude dominant pitch** (FFT peak + parabolic refine → register, field Y). On a steady ~18 grains/sec tick a **CataRT-style matcher** scores the whole corpus by weighted distance to the cursor target in (brightness, pitch) space — plus a small loudness preference, a short repeat penalty (never machine-guns one grain), and a touch of jitter — launches the best grain, and overlaps ~4–8 through Hann envelopes so the stream glides and never clicks (warmth lowpass + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter). **This is target-driven grain SELECTION, not blind random granular scatter** — the cursor's position MEANS a timbre and his corpus answers with its nearest sound (the genuine distinction from loved `227-paths-granular`❤️'s blind scatter). Visual = one additive point per grain laid out in the timbre field, dim violet at rest → blooming **warm ember** when voiced, a soft luminous probe + haze following the cursor; the field breathes while idle and a slow **Lissajous auto-demo** drives the cursor after 2.5 s idle so the silent 06:30 glance still sings. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-13**'s twin asks for the adult side: **extend the 4/5 `557-piano-splat-galaxy` model** ("a *fresh technique* in service of his own music") and **#4 chase WARMTH, not a puzzle** — you don't decode anything, you smear your hand through his own sound. **audio-file (Karel's piano) + pointer/touch-drag INPUT** (NOT camera [3× in the last 10: 568/576/582], NOT the mic [jury-banned 5×]) · **WebGL2 additive particle-field OUTPUT** (WebGPU-detected, Canvas2D fallback — NOT three.js [jury 6×], NOT SVG [jury 5×]) · **concatenative-musaicing / corpus grain-matching TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo extraction) · **adult warm tactile-immersive VIBE** (NOT a cerebral tuning/time puzzle — the jury's named adult disease). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [piano fetch/decode + per-grain spectral-feature corpus build + CataRT matching/concatenation engine + WebGL2 particle render = 4] + #3 named refs that DRIVE it [Diemo Schwarz — CataRT real-time corpus-based concatenative synthesis (2006); Tralie & Berger — *The Concatenator* (arXiv:2411.04366, 2024) / MACataRT (arXiv:2502.00023, Feb 2026); Curtis Roads *Microsound*]; **soft #1** [first target-MATCHED concatenative resynthesis in the lab — distinct from blind granular scatter at 227; said honestly]; **#5 soft/NOT clean-claimed** — RESEARCH §417 dive into the concatenative-musaicing wave, but the technique is foundational (Schwarz 2006), so a soft bind not a <14-day result). Born from RESEARCH §417 (concatenative musaicing → reach into his recording and re-voice it). **Pulled by Karel's loves**: the spectral/granular-piano cluster (`227-paths-granular`❤️, `243-spectral-cloud`❤️, `267-spectral-drift`❤️, `321-spectral-flight`❤️, `323-latent-condensation`❤️) + his "use my real Paths music" directive. Degrades fully: no WebGPU → WebGL2 → Canvas2D; failed fetch → a synthesized warm solo-piano fallback so it ALWAYS sounds and ALWAYS has a corpus (emerald **"Karel's piano"** vs amber **"synthesized fallback"** chip). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client fetch of the existing public `/api/audio/[id]` + Web Audio — no secret). No new npm deps. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`584-piano-spectral-tide`** (a **phase-vocoder spectral FREEZE** of his piano — grab any moment and stretch it into an infinite warm harmonic tide you scrub through, additive top-48-bin resynthesis with a crisp↔veil depth axis, WebGL2 oceanic strata; Flanagan&Golden/Dolson + Radigue/Basinski; LOST: beautiful but overlaps his loved spectral cluster [243/267/321] — resurrect once that cluster is out of the 10-window) + **`585-piano-grain-orrery`** (his grains become **gravity-bound orbiting bodies** you stir with your hand, each voicing as it swings past the core/cursor/sounding-ring — n-body physics→granular retrigger, WebGL2 feedback-trail orrery; Roads/Xenakis + Ventrella *Particle Life*; LOST: gorgeous but particle/n-body systems are heavy in the lab [`130`❤️/`236`❤️/`262`❤️] — resurrect for a physics-forward fire) banked IDEAS §417. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field` prerendered static `.html`), not browser-verified (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox — the real-audio fetch + GPU render paths follow the proven `557` patterns but are unexercised here). · *(Cycle 416 shipped `582-kids-dance-sky`; below.)*

- **[/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field](/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field)** — Piano Mosaic Field 🎹✨. `demoable` · Cycle 417. **For**: adult / his real music / warm-tactile. Reach into Karel's recorded piano and re-voice it: his solo piano is shattered into a corpus of tiny grains laid out by timbre, and dragging a warm probe makes the instrument answer with his own closest-matching sound — concatenative musaicing in real time. Target-driven grain SELECTION (CataRT-style), not blind scatter — the distinction from loved `227-paths-granular`. Audio-file + touch-drag input (NOT camera, NOT the mic), WebGL2 additive particle field (NOT three.js/SVG), Canvas2D + synth-piano fallbacks. The 557 model (a fresh technique in service of his own music) + the jury's "chase warmth not a puzzle." Refs: Diemo Schwarz CataRT; Tralie & Berger *The Concatenator*; Curtis Roads *Microsound*. No API route / no guard (public `/api/audio/[id]` fetch + Web Audio). Design notes: `src/app/dream/583-piano-mosaic-field/README.md`

## (Cycle 416 — **kids** build · DEEP, 3 approaches on one concept. Ships **`582-kids-dance-sky`**: *a 4-year-old's whole body becomes a warm sky-choir — they stand in front of the iPad and DANCE; raise your arms and the sky brightens, spread wide and the chord opens.* The lab's **first whole-body pose-skeleton instrument** (568 was hands only, 576 head only) and the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-13**'s standing **#1** — "get off the glass; the lab still has zero embodied-spatial prototypes after 570 builds, and the mic is over-used 5×." The front camera tracks **33 body landmarks** (MediaPipe **PoseLandmarker**, loaded **at runtime from a CDN** via `import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ …)` — byte-identical to the already-shipping `576-presence-room`, never added to `package.json`; the lighter `pose_landmarker_lite` model for fast load). Pose drives a warm choir + a **Canvas2D glowing skeleton with a blooming aura** (NOT three.js, NOT SVG, NOT WebGL2): each **hand's height** → a distinct warm voice (higher = brighter, left low / right bright); **body spread** (wrist distance) → **chord openness** (narrow = close root+fifth; arms wide = an open shimmering add-6/9 voicing); **how high the arms are raised** → master brightness (lowpass opens to 7.5 kHz) + aura glow; **feet / hip motion** → a soft low bass swell. Harmony = a warm **just-intonation Lydian cluster** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 45/32, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2 over a low A) atop a **constant root+fifth drone** — "no wrong notes" for kids but the expression lives in the *body pose*, **felt not solved**, explicitly **NOT** the jury-banned C-major-pentatonic kids wash. Kids-safe master (`gain → lowpass ≤7600 → compressor −10/20/6 → out`); AudioContext born in the Start tap; all changes `setTargetAtTime`; a Chris-Wilson 25 ms look-ahead pump steadies the ramps; always-on soft drone so it is never silent. **whole-body camera/pose INPUT · Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT three.js [jury 6×], NOT SVG [jury 5×], NOT WebGL2 [4× in the last 10], NOT the mic [jury 5×] — every ban dodged) · **pose-keypoint → harmony/brightness TECH** (NOT onset/beat/tempo) · **kids embodied-dance warm-modal VIBE** (NOT a creature, NOT a pentatonic-tap toy). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [pose tracking + spread→JI-chord-openness + arms-raised→brightness + feet→bass + Canvas2D aura render = 5] + #3 named ref that DRIVES it [Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974) — the original full-body responsive environment where your silhouette *is* the instrument; Daniel Rozin body-as-pixels lineage]; **soft #1** [first whole-figure motion instrument in the lab — hands/head don't count]; **#5 NOT claimed** — PoseLandmarker is foundational/months-old, no <14-day bind, said plainly). Born from RESEARCH §416 (whole-body video-keypoints → real-time music + Krueger responsive-environment). **4-tier graceful degradation** keeps it alive on any device: pose works → full skeleton; pose model fails → Canvas2D frame-difference motion blob drives a simplified mapping; no camera → finger-drag; no input ~3 s → a synthetic dancing-skeleton **auto-demo** so the silent 06:30 glance still sings (cancels on real input, resumes after idle). Privacy: frames analysed in-browser only, never recorded or sent. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client camera + Web Audio — no network to our backend, no secret). No new npm deps (MediaPipe is a runtime CDN load). Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; siblings **`581-kids-shadow-band`** (the same concept in **pure Canvas2D frame-differencing** — zero deps, no model download, bulletproof on any iPad; 6 zoned warm voices painted as glowing light-trails, the Krueger/Rozin "body as light"; LOST: a hair closer to the spatial-grid reflex than 582's semantic body mapping — resurrect as the no-download fallback if pose proves flaky on Karel's iPad) + **`583-kids-light-ribbons`** (**Canvas2D optical-flow** → a *continuous* body-bowed warm choir, speed+upward motion gliding the voices via portamento, flowing light-ribbons advected along the flow; Ondes Martenot/Theremin lineage; the freshest *musical* idea of the three but conceptually adjacent to last week's `579-silk-choir` [another continuous-bent warm choir] — LOST on diversity THIS cycle only; resurrect once 579 is out of the 10-window) banked IDEAS §416. Build-verified (`npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/582-kids-dance-sky` 5.84 kB / 112 kB prerendered static), not browser-verified (no camera/pose/audio in sandbox — the one real risk is whether MediaPipe pose loads on Karel's actual iPad at 06:30). · *(Cycle 415 shipped `580-tide-breath`; below.)*

- **[/dream/582-kids-dance-sky](/dream/582-kids-dance-sky)** — Sky Choir 🕺🎶. `demoable` · Cycle 416. **For**: kids (4+). A 4-year-old's whole body becomes a warm sky-choir — stand in front of the iPad and DANCE: raise your arms and the sky brightens, spread wide and the chord opens. The lab's first whole-body pose-skeleton instrument: MediaPipe PoseLandmarker (33 landmarks, runtime CDN load, no package.json change) → a Canvas2D glowing skeleton + blooming aura; hand height → warm voices, body spread → chord openness, arms raised → brightness, feet → bass swell. Whole-body camera/pose input (NOT the mic), Canvas2D output (NOT three.js/SVG/WebGL2), warm just-intonation Lydian over a root+fifth drone (NOT the pentatonic wash). The directest answer to the jury's #1 "get off the glass / zero embodied-spatial." 4-tier fallback (pose → frame-diff blob → drag → auto-demo). Refs: Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (1974); Daniel Rozin.
