[/dream/924-kids-sing-a-sprout](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/924-kids-sing-a-sprout) — **"Sing a Sprout": a 4-year-old HUMS or sings, and a glowing garden grows from their voice over minutes — every note plants a sprout on a sunflower-spiral, and the garden softly sings their earlier song back.** `demoable` · Cycle 544 (kids, WIDE fire — winner of 3 orthogonal explorers). **For**: kids (4+) / **mic-voice** input (synthetic humming-child fallback) / **three.js** GPU phyllotaxis garden / calm luminous bedtime. **The lab's FIRST long-form, STATEFUL kids piece** — the thin jury-valued depth lane (888's register) in the kids register, and the standing **resurrect-first ⭐** banked from §542. The compositional logic is **the child's own voice accumulating into a remembered garden, NOT pitch theory** — each sung note snaps to a 3-octave C-pentatonic ladder (no "wrong" notes), plants a glowing sprout at the next **Vogel phyllotaxis** position (golden angle 137.5°, so the garden fills outward like a sunflower head), and chimes immediately (cause-effect for the kid). **The long-form / memory engine (genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1):** a rolling **memory bank** of the child's sung notes is a *stigmergic trace* — it (a) **biases** where later sprouts land in pitch (new notes pull 30% toward the garden's accumulated average "scent") and (b) every ~14s the garden **re-sings a 4-note earlier phrase back** as soft bells AND plants memory-echo sprouts, so the garden grows from its own memory; sprouts bloom cool→warm over ~3 min and the camera slowly drifts outward as the garden fills, so a glance at minute 5 reads materially different (sprout count, spiral extent, warmth, distance). **Input:** `getUserMedia` → `AnalyserNode` RMS-gated **autocorrelation** pitch detector (clamped 120–900 Hz), loudness→sprout size/brightness. **Mic-routing safety:** mic → AnalyserNode ONLY, never to `destination` (no feedback). **Output:** **three.js** instanced glowing discs + bright cores (additive blend, HSL cool-violet→warm-amber by note + age), soft ground glow, fog, breathing. NOT Canvas2D/SVG. **Always-alive:** no mic / denied → a synthetic **"humming child"** sings a slow rising-falling pentatonic melody that plants its first sprout at **~0.35s** and keeps growing the garden on its own; `text-rose-300` notice on mic failure. VIBE: calm luminous night garden, bedtime. **Named refs:** **H. Vogel's phyllotaxis model (1979, golden angle 137.5°)** · **Brian Eno** generative / long-form ambient · the **children's-movement sonification** work (Frontiers, **PMC5104747**). **Ambition honest 4/5** (#2 ≥4 subsystems [mic pitch detection + long-form stateful garden/memory engine + memory-echo bell synth w/ dumb drone + three.js instanced render] · #3 three named refs · #4 multi-cycle commitment [cycle-1 ships the growth+memory spine; cycle-2 longer-arc macro-form / seasons; cycle-3 polish] · #5 in-README dated RESEARCH §544 citation — **10 straight cycles** 535–544). #1 NOT claimed (mic-pitch + phyllotaxis + granular both have lab priors; the fresh axis is *the long-form stigmergic-memory garden*, not over-claimed as a clean #1). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH §544 (MusicSwarm 2026 — long-form coherence from a *stigmergic* swarm where agents leave traces in a shared field; plant-growth sonification) → the child's voice IS the stigmergic trace → this kids **WIDE** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-data→structure-w/-consonant-crutch (JURY 2026-06-24)]` · `picked=[mic-voice INPUT (non-touch, 2 priors/10 — under cap), three.js GPU OUTPUT (the scarce GPU surface the jury wants), long-form stateful phyllotaxis-growth + stigmergic-memory TECHNIQUE (melody sung back, NOT a pitch/interval engine), calm-garden/bedtime VIBE]` — clears every ban. **Kids-safe chain:** every voice → `master gain 0.26 → lowpass 6kHz → DynamicsCompressor(-18/12:1) → destination`; soft ≥20ms bell attacks, always-on C2+G2+C3 breathing drone (never silent); ≥64px primary tap target; no reading required; no "wrong" notes. **Degrades first-class:** no Web Audio → never throws; no mic → synthetic humming child keeps it sounding+growing; full teardown (rAF cancel; stop mic tracks; stop pad/lfo oscillators; dispose all three.js geo/mat; `audioCtx.close()`; remove resize listener). **No API route → no `guard`** (all client-side, zero AI, zero cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (three.js + Web Audio only). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 112s`** → lint/type passed → grep-confirmed zero "924"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear/mic-verified** (no audio/WebGL/mic in container — unverified: whether the autocorrelation reads a small child's wavery voice cleanly [octave errors possible], the multi-minute arc by wall-clock [reasoned-through, not observed], whether the bloom reads as "my song became a garden"; the synthetic humming-child fallback guarantees a sounding/blooming glance within ~0.35s regardless). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`925-kids-tilt-tide`** ⭐ **RESURRECT-FIRST** (device-tilt · three.js 40×40 height-field sea of light that tips & pools → warm pentatonic bells in the rhythm of tilting; standing-wave shimmer; pointer-drag + idle auto-demo fallback) + **`926-kids-firefly-meadow`** (front-camera frame-difference **optical-flow** motion energy on a 64×48 sensor grid · three.js firefly swarm gathers where you wave & chimes; synthetic "evening breeze" fallback — Krueger *Videoplace* lineage) as IDEAS §544. Design notes: `src/app/dream/924-kids-sing-a-sprout/README.md`

[/dream/927-depth-room](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/927-depth-room) — **"Depth Room": your webcam becomes a depth camera, and distance is the instrument — a browser ML model reads how far every pixel is, so leaning in blooms a close granular foreground and pulling back thins to a low drone; music lives in proximity, space, and motion, never in pitch.** `demoable` · Cycle 545 (adult, WIDE fire — winner of 3 orthogonal explorers). **For**: adult / immersive contemplative / **camera (webcam)** input / **WebGL2 fragment-shader** output / a softly-lit room. **The lab's FIRST depth-camera piece** — the single concept JURY has named in *every* verdict ("depth-camera STILL 0×"), always deferred for "needs a Kinect/RealSense." This dissolves that excuse: **real-time monocular depth estimation in the browser** turns an ordinary laptop cam into a per-pixel distance field with no special hardware. The compositional logic is **distance/space, NOT pitch theory** (JURY 2026-06-24 #3). **Input/technique:** `getUserMedia` → frames drawn to a 256×192 offscreen canvas → **Depth Anything V2** (`onnx-community/depth-anything-v2-small`) run on **WebGPU via Transformers.js**, loaded **at runtime from a jsDelivr CDN** (`@huggingface/transformers@3.0.0`) so **zero npm deps are added**; inference throttled to ~6fps, wrapped in try/catch. The depth map is averaged to a **16×12 grid** → features: **near-zone energy** (how much of you is CLOSE), **histogram spread**, **centroid x/y** of the nearest region, **motion-in-depth** (frame-to-frame change). **Output (audio):** a bank of **HRTF-`PannerNode`-spatialized** granular/additive voices — NEAR energy blooms bright foreground pentatonic-shimmer + opens lowpass; FAR thins to a low **drone bed** (root A1 + fifth E2); centroid-x pans L↔R; spread opens the shimmer stack; motion adds grain density + tremolo. **Pitch is held deliberately dumb** — one fixed A-minor-pentatonic + drone, nothing can clash. Master gain ≤0.3 → lowpass → compressor. **Output (visual):** a fullscreen **WebGL2 fragment shader** (`scene.ts`) samples the depth grid as an `R32F` texture — near pixels glow warm amber/rose and bloom around your nearest region, far recede to cool indigo; quiet iso-depth contour bands + drifting volumetric haze react to near-zone energy; image mirrored so it reads like a room you stand in. NOT three.js/Canvas2D/SVG. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 NEVER-used technique [monocular depth estimation — grep-confirmed lab-first; depth-camera 0× every jury] · #2 ≥4 subsystems [camera capture + browser ML depth model + WebGL2 depth-shader + HRTF spatial granular synth] · #3 named ref [**Depth Anything V2**, Yang et al., **NeurIPS 2024**; Transformers.js-WebGPU `webgpu-realtime-depth-estimation` demo] · #5 in-README dated RESEARCH §545 citation — **11 straight cycles** 535–545). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH §545 (a webcam is now a depth camera — monocular depth runs in-browser on WebGPU *now*) → JURY's standing #2 (depth-camera 0×) + #3 (music from space not pitch) → this adult **WIDE** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[mic INPUT (5×/10), three.js OUTPUT (5×/10), Canvas2D, SVG (JURY 2026-06-24)]` · `picked=[camera INPUT (1 prior/10 — under cap), WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT (the scarce GPU surface, not three.js), monocular-depth→spatial-granular TECHNIQUE (space, not pitch theory), immersive contemplative adult VIBE]` — clears every ban. **Degrades first-class (always sounds + shows):** no camera/denied → animated **synthetic procedural depth field** (slow breathing radial blob) drives the same audio+shader; no WebGPU / model-load fail → same synthetic field; no WebGL2 → minimal Canvas2D depth-grid view; a hands-off auto-start kicks a silent synthetic visual within **~0.45s**; audio only after the **"Enter the room"** tap (gesture-gated AudioContext). **Privacy:** camera processed entirely on-device, **live — never recorded or uploaded** (stated in UI in emerald). Full teardown (camera tracks stopped; AudioContext faded+closed; rAF cancel; GL program/shaders/texture/buffer/VAO disposed). **No API route → no `guard`** (all client-side, zero server, zero cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Transformers.js is a runtime CDN import, not a package dep). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 81s`** → lint/type passed; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/camera/GPU-verified** (no camera/WebGPU/audio in container — unverified: whether Transformers.js's `depth` output shape matches across versions [wrapped in try/catch → synthetic fallback on any mismatch], real-GPU inference framerate, whether "lean in = bloom" reads as embodied; the synthetic-depth fallback guarantees a sounding, depth-shaded glance regardless). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`928-tilt-orrery`** ⭐ **RESURRECT-FIRST** (device-tilt · a real **WebGPU compute** WGSL N-body sim of ~1,400 orbiting bodies → perihelion/collision-triggered granular percussion, timbre from radius/speed, pan from angular position, pitch a fixed drone; CPU N-body fallback → Canvas2D; pointer/slider + auto-tilt demo — the orrery / GPU-N-body lineage) + **`929-cathedral-rhythm`** (MIDI/keyboard/pads · a Bjorklund **Euclidean-rhythm + Reich-phasing** lookahead sequencer, several lanes of one fixed pitch through a procedural ~4.2s convolution-reverb cathedral, rendered as a **WebGL2 raymarched SDF nave** lit only by per-lane onset-flashes — *Piano Phase* 1967 / Toussaint 2005) as IDEAS §545. Design notes: `src/app/dream/927-depth-room/README.md`

[/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy) — **"Maqam Calligraphy": a living Arabic _taqsim_ improvises itself in EXACT microtonal cents and writes itself as a luminous ink-and-gold calligraphic line — so you can SEE the quarter-tones sit between the piano's 12-TET cracks.** `demoable` · Cycle 555 (adult, DEEP fire — winner of 2 Canvas2D approaches). **For**: adult / contemplative / **autonomous + light touch-steer** input / **Canvas2D** output / warm ink-and-gold illuminated-manuscript ritual. **The lab's FIRST non-Western melodic-modal lane** — Arabic **maqam**, distinct from the lab's prior microtonal work (538/414/404 are JI/Bohlen-Pierce _tuning-lattices_; this is the maqam _modal/ornament/improvisation_ tradition). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #2** (make music from real PITCH/melody again) from a non-vertical direction: a single ornamented MELODIC line, no chords, no voice-leading engine. **Engine (`maqam.ts` + `sayr.ts` + `audio.ts`):** every pitch is an exact cents offset from a D tonic (`freq = 293.66*2^(cents/1200)`), quarter-tones (~150c, ~350c) **first-class, never snapped to 12-TET**. Eight **ajnas** (Rast `0/200/350/500`, Bayati `0/150/300/500`, Hijaz `0/100/400/500`, Nahawand `0/200/300/500`, Kurd `0/100/300/500`, Saba `0/150/300/400`, Ajam `0/200/400/500`, Sikah trichord `0/150/350`) compose five **maqamat** (lower jins on the tonic + upper jins on the **ghammaz** pivot). A **sayr state machine** drives a ~5.5-min **long-form, stateful** journey (qarar-low -> ascent -> ghammaz -> modulation/peak -> descent -> qarar-home), modulating to a related maqam via an adjacency map at the peak — genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1. A **free-meter** phrase generator (no fixed bar) targets characteristic/rest tones with stepwise approach, breaths between phrases, and ornaments: **portamento** slides through the microtonal space (`setTargetAtTime`), grace notes, trills, and "leaning" on the neutral half-flats. **Synth (NO granular — jury-banned):** a plucked **oud/qanun**-like voice (triangle+saw -> fast-decay lowpass pluck + sympathetic partial) over a sustained **tanbura** drone (tonic + fifth, slow beating); master `gain <=0.26 -> lowpass -> DynamicsCompressor -> destination`. **Visual (Canvas2D — the only non-banned renderer this window):** an illuminated-manuscript field where the melody draws an **ink-and-gold brushstroke** (y = exact cents, stroke weight = emphasis, portamento = curved sweeps, grace/trill = flourishes) against a dim dashed **12-TET ghost grid** + gold **active-jins guide-lines** labeled `qarar`/`ghammaz`/`<n>c` — the literal "quarter-tones between the cracks"; modulation washes a new tint, the tanbura glows at the tonic/fifth baselines. **UX:** pick a starting maqam -> "Begin taqsim" (gesture-gates AudioContext); plays hands-free; light steering nudges the next modulation or heads home; ~0.9s auto-demo runs a silent visual if no Begin; `text-rose-300` audio-fail notice; full teardown. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [first maqam / exact-cents non-Western modal + first sayr-driven long-form self-modulating taqsim; grep-0x] - #2 >=4 subsystems [ajnas-cents engine + sayr modulation FSM + free-meter ornament generator + oud/tanbura microtonal synth + Canvas2D calligraphic render] - #3 named refs [Arab maqam tradition; the **sayr** concept; **AMICOR 2026** (_Language Resources and Evaluation_); **1932 Cairo Congress of Arab Music**] - #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH §555** — 20 straight cycles 535–555). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship; multi-cycle deepening seeded). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH §555 (AMICOR 2026 names the gap — no maqam-native microtone synthesis, practice drifts to Western 12-TET) -> this adult **DEEP** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js (JURY 7x), mic-as-primary (JURY 4x), granular (JURY 4x), "pitch-held-dumb" stance (JURY ~10x), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit 5x/10), raw-WebGL2-OUTPUT (audit 5x/10), voice-leading/chordal-harmony-engine (lab-hardening 550/551/941/942/947)]` - `picked=[autonomous+touch-steer INPUT (non-mic), Canvas2D OUTPUT (only non-banned renderer, 0x/10), exact-cents maqam-sayr modulation TECH (melodic/modal — NOT voice-leading), warm ink-and-gold non-Western ritual VIBE]` — clears every ban. **No API route -> no `guard`** (all client-side, zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D only). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`Compiled successfully in 44s`** -> lint/type passed -> grep-confirmed zero "952"/"maqam"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in container). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`951-maqam-road`** (RESURRECT-FIRST: same engine, the sayr-as-a-road-through-a-dusk-landscape lens, Canvas2D, IDEAS §555). Design notes: `src/app/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy/README.md`

[/dream/960-cristal-friction](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/960-cristal-friction) — **"Cristal Friction": bow a row of glowing glass/metal rods with your cursor — the singing comes from a REAL elasto-plastic stick-slip friction physical model (Helmholtz motion), not a sampled or additive emulation.** `demoable` (build-checked + Node-DSP-tested; not GPU/ear-verified) · Cycle 559 (adult, WIDE fire — winner of 3 orthogonal NON-harmony explorers). **For**: adult / **pointer-rub** input (cursor velocity = bow speed, vertical press = bow force) / raw-**WebGL2** glowing-rods shader (Canvas2D fallback) / warm-glass candle-lit ritual. **The lab's first friction EXCITER model** — prior "bowed/glass" pieces (355-kids-glass-armonica, 202-membrane-drum, 468-kids-bottle-flute) emulated the *resonator* with additive/FM; here a per-sample **elasto-plastic / LuGre bristle friction law** (stiction near zero relative velocity → Stribeck drop into slip) runs in an **AudioWorkletProcessor**, feeding friction force back into a **Chamberlin modal resonator bank**'s contact velocity to *self-sustain* the bowed oscillation. Silent at rest; locks to the rod pitch under a steady bow; breaks into whistling **wolf-tones** when bowed fast/light (a feature). Six rods just-tuned to a pentatonic+octave drone on ~D3 so any combination is consonant — the **friction TIMBRE and the embodied bowing gesture are the idea, not a harmony engine** (deliberately breaking the 7-of-10 harmony monoculture the JURY 2026-06-25 monoculture-warning pointed at). Worklet loaded as a Blob URL (no public/ file); oscillator fallback if AudioWorklet absent. **Named refs:** McIntyre, Schumacher & Woodhouse, *On the oscillations of musical instruments* (1983); the elasto-plastic bowed-string friction model (2025–26 physical-modeling revival, Frontiers in Signal Processing 2025); the **Cristal Baschet** + Franklin's **glass armonica** (1761). **RESEARCH §559** chain (today's friction-synthesis dive → today's build). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 first friction stick-slip exciter · #2 ≥3 subsystems · #3 named refs · #5 §559). Honest note: the model self-oscillates to a roughly constant limit-cycle amplitude (as a real Helmholtz-regime string does), so the loudness/brightness *envelope* is a deliberate gestural shaping layer on top of the physics; build-checked + the worklet was Node-tested for stability/self-oscillation/boundedness, but the WebGL2 shader and final sound were not rendered/heard in-container.

[/dream/997-resonant-halls](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/997-resonant-halls) — **"Resonant Halls": walk in FIRST PERSON through a cathedral of five harmonic rooms — each room a key on the circle of fifths with its OWN acoustics — and stepping through a doorway is a key modulation you hear in the reverb itself.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean; not GPU/ear-verified) · Cycle 577 (adult, **DEEP** fire — winner of 2 approaches: this first-person 3D vs. `996-dream-rooms` the WebGPU-compute floor-plan twin). **For**: adult / immersive contemplative / **pointer-look + WASD walk** input (co-equal; pointer-drag looks, keys walk; plus a hands-free "Take the tour" auto-walk) / hand-rolled **raymarched WebGL2 3D** output / luminous cathedral with volumetric doorway light. **The DEEP extension of the lab's spatial thread** — 977-echo-room-gpu (the only 5/5; walk among HRTF recordings of past selves) → 992-dream-house (cycle 575; La Monte Young drone field, position blooms partials but acoustics fixed) → **this**: now the room itself encodes a *key* and **the acoustics themselves are a navigable field** — the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-27 #2** ("extend 977 into a multi-cycle spatial instrument — make it a *room*: multiple harmonic zones you physically walk between") and **#3** ("force a real GPU-compute OR 3D path" — taken via the **3D path**, first-person raymarching, not a flat 2D plot). **Engine.** Five rooms keyed **C → G → D → A → E**, each a just perfect fifth (×3/2) above the last, octave-folded into the warm felt-in-the-body low band (~65–110 Hz; master lowpass 6 kHz, never shrill). Each room sustains a continuous **just-intoned chord** (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 2/1, 3/1) — a drone instrument, never triggered notes, no wrong notes. **Per-room acoustics (the headline):** each room owns a **procedurally-synthesized impulse response** → its own `ConvolverNode` — a dense exponential-decay noise tail (1.1 s bright chapel → 4.6 s dark apse), a sparse size-scaled early-reflection stamp panned across the field, and a one-pole darkening pass, all from a deterministic per-room LCG (stable, hand-verifiable). So a small chapel rings short/present, a tall nave rings long/distant. **Proximity → mix:** `computeRoomWeights(cameraZ)` = normalized Gaussian wells per room centre, ramping each room's wet/dry sends with `setTargetAtTime` (no clicks); overlapping wells cross-fade doorways. **Doorway = pivot-chord modulation (the audible reward):** each key's **3/2 fifth equals the next key's 1/1 root**, so during a crossing both rooms sound and that shared partial is a **held common tone** (classic pivot) while the departing key's other tones fade and the arriving key's bloom — the change lands continuous, not a jump-cut, and you hear it dissolve from one room's reverb into the next; `computeCrossing(cameraZ)` drives the "→ modulating C → G" HUD. **Render:** hand-rolled 3D, **NO three.js** — a single full-screen fragment shader **raymarches an SDF corridor of box-rooms** (positive-inside SDF boxes unioned with overlapping z half-extents so shared walls open into doorways; interior sphere-tracing finds walls; clerestory light + volumetric doorway glow + cathedral ribs + colored distance haze in each room's accent), with a **hand-built first-person camera** (the lookAt approach from 995-kids-moon-trampoline: position + yaw/pitch → forward → `right = normalize(cross(fwd,up))`, `up = cross(right,fwd)` → ray origin/dir uniforms). Accent **hue = fifthsIndex/12** so kindred keys are kindred colors — luminous cathedral, deliberately **NOT** the engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment vibe the jury banned. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [JI drone synth + per-room procedural convolution acoustics + raymarched SDF 3D render + hand-rolled first-person camera nav = 4] · #3 named refs [La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela *Dream House* (MELA); architectural-acoustics auralization / convolution-reverb-from-IR; the circle of fifths as literal floor-plan] · #4 multi-cycle commitment [extends the 977→992 spatial thread; cycle-1 ships the walkable-rooms + per-room-acoustics spine; deepen next: doorways that interact, an operator/Tauri view, more rooms] · #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH §577** citation). **#1 NOT claimed** — both raymarching (176/206-sdf-cave, 909, 915) and `ConvolverNode` (many priors) exist in the lab; the fresh axis is *per-room acoustics that change as you walk between keyed rooms*, not over-claimed as a clean novel technique. **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH §577 (the 2026 frontier of *precomputed/reciprocal sound-propagation fields* — acoustics-as-a-navigable-field; arXiv:2602.06937 Reciprocal Latent Fields, 2510.20602 Resounding Acoustic Fields) → JURY 2026-06-27 #2/#3 → this adult **DEEP** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[computer-keyboard/MIDI-as-primary-adult-input, Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-ONLY (force GPU-compute or 3D), the "explainable-inverse-of-an-opaque-neural-frontier" conceptual move, engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment adult vibe (JURY 2026-06-27)]` · `picked=[pointer-look+WASD-walk INPUT (pointer co-equal, not keyboard-only), raymarched 3D WebGL2 OUTPUT (the sanctioned 3D escape, not a flat 2D plot), per-room-convolution-acoustics + pivot-chord-spatial-modulation TECHNIQUE (pure spatial presence, NOT a music-theory explainer), luminous-cathedral VIBE]` — clears every ban. **No API route → no `guard`** (all client-side, zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2 only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`✓ Compiled successfully in 45s`** → lint/type passed → no "997"/"resonant-halls" warning, no "Failed to compile"/"Type error"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other dream pages); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container — unverified: whether the SDF raymarch reads as a convincing navigable cathedral, the real-GPU framerate, and the *perceptual* strength of the held-pivot-tone-vs-retune balance across a doorway; reasoned-and-typed, worth a live click-through). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`996-dream-rooms`** ⭐ **RESURRECT-FIRST** (the WebGPU-**compute** twin — same walk-the-harmonic-chambers concept as a top-down floor-plan, but the resonating body is a real 12k-particle compute shader [WebGPU-compute → WebGL2-instanced → Canvas2D fallback]; the directest answer to JURY #3's GPU-compute scarcity; builder returned lint 0/0 + tsc clean, IDEAS §577). Design notes: `src/app/dream/997-resonant-halls/README.md`

### [1020-kids-breath-flute](/dream/1020-kids-breath-flute) · kids (4+) / mic-breath / warm-aurora · cycle 586 · WIDE-winner (2026-06-28) · demoable
Blow or hum into the tablet and a glowing air-column *sings* a real flute, synthesized from physics — a genuine **jet-drive digital-waveguide** (Cook/Smith STK Flute), breath-RMS as bore pressure, tap big glowing holes (G-Mixolydian) to pick pitch. First wind/physical-modeling instrument in the lab; ships with a passing tuning selfTest (7/7 notes within ±60¢ at 44.1/48k). AudioWorklet + ScriptProcessor fallback; WebGL2 air-column + Canvas2D fallback; tap-puff + 2s-idle auto-demo.

### [1029-echo-halls-sphere](/dream/1029-echo-halls-sphere) · adult / pointer-look + gyro + WASD / WebGPU-compute + WebGL2 first-person · cycle 589 · DEEP-winner (2026-06-28) · demoable
Walk through a **sphere** of six HRTF harmonic rooms — some above you, some below, some behind — and **find a chord by ear**: you are the Web Audio `AudioListener`, your orientation rewrites the binaural pan every frame, so closing your eyes and turning toward a chord works. **Cycle 2 of the Echo Halls thread** (extends the lab's only-5/5 `1019-echo-halls-tonnetz` — JURY 2026-06-28 #2). The C-major neighbourhood (I·vi·IV·ii·V·iii) drones octave-folded into a warm low band; the faced room blooms via a softmax `facingWeights` cross-fade. **The resonating body is a real WebGPU compute particle field** (WGSL curl-noise advection + `atomic<u32>` kinetic-energy reduction + non-blocking `mapAsync` readback) whose measured energy drives the active room's shimmer gain — *in every tier* (WebGPU-compute → CPU-sim-in-WebGL2 → Canvas2D), so the sim genuinely sings rather than decorates. Keeps WebGPU compute alive (#3) while making spatial *orientation* the primary mechanic — varying the human↔sound relationship away from the flagged "the sim IS the body" groove (#1). Hand-rolled first-person WebGL2 (no three.js, zero new deps); pointer-look + WASD + DeviceOrientation; 2s-idle auto-tour sweeps between a low (ii) and a high (IV) room so a hands-free reviewer hears the elevation. **Verified:** `geometry.test.ts` **89 assertions pass** (6 distinct chords; all room dirs unit vectors; full-sphere spread — ≥1 above y>0.4, ≥1 below y<-0.4, ≥1 behind z>0.3, none closer than 0.35 rad; facingWeights sum→1 & peak at faced room; all chords diatonic to C-major; freqs in 60–240 Hz). Named refs: Janet Cardiff *The Forty Part Motet*; "Spatial Orchestra" (arXiv:2510.23848); full-sphere localization (arXiv:2606.24367, 2026); Sonic4D viewpoint-adaptive binaural (arXiv:2506.15759, 2026); WebGPU baseline 2026. **Ambition 4/5** (#2 ≥4 subsystems [per-room HRTF + WebGPU-compute body + facing-weight harmony state + first-person render] · #3 named refs · #4 multi-cycle [cycle 2 of the Echo Halls thread] · #5 RESEARCH §589). #1 not over-claimed (HRTF + raymarch-adjacent render have priors; the fresh axis is *full-sphere find-by-ear with a compute body*). **No API route → no guard** (all client-side, zero AI/network); **zero new npm deps**. Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` → compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; 1029 folder grep-clean); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio device in container — unverified: whether above-vs-below localizes by ear [HRTF-dependent], real-GPU framerate, the perceptual find-by-ear premise; the 89-assertion geometry test + cross-tier audio coupling cover the math). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire; banked **`echo-halls-flock`** ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (100k WGSL compute swarm whose density/energy readback honestly drives the audio; 8156-assertion test) + **`echo-halls-gyro`** (gyro-as-listener, dwell-lock-to-play-a-progression, eyes-closed; 50-assertion test) as IDEAS §589. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1029-echo-halls-sphere/README.md`

### [1033-kids-hum-blossom](/dream/1033-kids-hum-blossom) · kids / **mic voice-PITCH** (autocorrelation/YIN-lite) / Canvas2D organic bloom · cycle 590 · WIDE-winner (2026-06-28) · demoable
**Hum a note and a flower blooms *in tune with you*.** A 4-year-old hums into the mic; we detect the sung **pitch** in real time and a glowing flower grows from a bud — petals sprout by golden-angle phyllotaxis while a tone is sustained, petal/glow color tracks pitch (warm red/orange low → violet/white high) — and a soft **3-voice "ah" choir answers**, snapping the child's hum to the nearest tone of a slowly-cycling **I–vi–IV–V** in C major (real functional harmony, *not* a pentatonic "no-wrong-notes" snap). **The lab's first voice-*pitch* input** — every prior mic piece used voice as *energy* (RMS/onset/breath: 1020, 922, FFT bands); this tracks the actual fundamental and folds it into harmony, directly answering JURY 2026-06-28 #3 ("break the pointer reflex — deepen a lonely fresh input"). Pitch math lives in a **pure, framework-free `pitch.ts`** (`detectPitchHz`: RMS silence gate → normalized autocorrelation over ~70–1200 Hz → first-strong-peak-after-dip to kill octave errors → clarity gate → parabolic sub-Hz interpolation), **verified by `pitch.test.ts`** (pure TS + `console.assert`, no framework import, no top-level auto-run): detects 196/220/440/880 Hz within ~3% and returns -1 on silence — **ran live this cycle: ALL PASSED**. **MIC SAFETY:** source → `AnalyserNode` only, never to `destination` (no feedback howl); nothing recorded/sent. Always-on soft ambient pad + master limiter + click-free portamento = safe kids sound; graceful no-mic auto-demo (slow synthetic hum still blooms + sings, `text-rose-300` notice). **Implements this cycle's research dive** (RESEARCH §590: 2026 commodity-ization of fully-client-side browser pitch detection for kids/education) — the dive→build chain is visible. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used-here technique [real-time voice-pitch→harmony, grep-0× on kids lane] · #2 ≥3 subsystems [mic + autocorrelation pitch detection + functional-harmony choir engine + organic render] · #5 RESEARCH §590). Love-bias: pulled by Karel's love of `158-kids-hum-paint` (hum-based kids). **No API route → no guard** (all client-side, zero network/AI); zero new npm deps. Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` → compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (winner folder grep-clean: 0 tsc errors, 0 eslint errors/warnings; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code — identical every cycle; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT audio/mic-verified on a real device** (no mic in container — unverified: real-voice detection robustness on a child's timbre, latency feel; the passing `pitch.test.ts` covers the detector math on synthetic sines). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1034-kids-rain-chimes`** ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (tilt → WebGPU-compute droplet rain whose band-crossing readback rings a real I–vi–IV–V; committed `sim.test.ts`) + **`1032-kids-shadow-choir`** (camera luminance-silhouette → centroid-Y picks chord, coverage stacks choir voices) as IDEAS S590. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1033-kids-hum-blossom/README.md`

> **Doc-drift note (cycle 596):** prototypes `1035`, `1038`, `1041`, `1042`, `1043` shipped (cycles 591–595, psychedelic lane) but their INDEX entries were never written by the racing fires — they exist on disk + in STATE/MORNING. Backlog to backfill; the live `/dream` index reflects them.

### [1047-tracer-drift](/dream/1047-tracer-drift) · adult / psychedelic · **mic-breath energy** (analysis-only, non-pointer) / WebGL2 **ping-pong feedback buffer** · cycle 596 · WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) · demoable · `state: LSD · pole: cosmic-ambient (drifting)`
**The long weightless plateau of an acid drift — surfaces breathing, motion smearing into lagging color trails — drug-free.** The lab's **FIRST ping-pong feedback-trail accumulator** (grep-0×; the named-but-unbuilt `feedbackBuffer.ts` shared infra). Two RGBA16F FBOs (8-bit fallback) ping-pong each frame: the previous frame is re-sampled with a slight zoom + rotation + fBm warp, multiplied by a gentle decay (0.80–0.978 — never a hard buffer-flash), nudged in hue (chromatic lag so trails drift in color as they fade), then fresh content composites over it — a slow breathing fBm surface, two slightly-detuned dot lattices (moiré), and faint animated visual-snow grain. A present pass tone-maps gently (luminous, lifted-black dusk, not a void). **No raymarching, no reaction-diffusion** (both lane-banned this cycle). Input is **mic breath-energy, analysis-only** (`AnalyserNode`, never to `destination` — no howl): low-band energy → trail length (decay/zoom) + warp; loudness → saturation. Graceful no-mic fallback (self-driven LFO swell + `text-rose-300` notice) so it drifts + sounds on a 06:30 phone glance with zero permissions. Audio bed: detuned sine/triangle drone with per-voice slow detune LFOs + a shared ~67 s pitch-bend portamento ("melt") + a slowly-swept filtered-noise wash — weightless, nothing rhythmic. ~4-min looping arc with a deliberately **wide plateau** (0.40–0.78) — the *temporal* shape (drift, not peak) the peak-centric psych lane (1038/1041/1042/1043) lacked. **Pastel-drift palette** (lilac/peach/mint/rose/cyan) — not neon, not dark-void. **Named refs:** Memo Akten (feedback/optical-flow); LSD tracer/positive-afterimage/visual-snow phenomenology; Carhart-Harris entropic-brain / REBUS. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [ping-pong feedback buffer, grep-0×] · #2 ≥3 subsystems [feedback accumulator + drone+noise audio + moiré/snow layers + arc] · #3 named reference; + RESEARCH §596). Full GL teardown (textures/FBOs/programs/VAO/VBO + lose-context) + click-free audio fade + RAF cancel. **No API route → no guard**; zero new npm deps. **Safety:** not a flicker piece — slow luminance drift only, feedback decay gentle, no 3–30 Hz full-screen flashing. Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` → compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (zero issues from the 1047 folder; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container — unverified: real trail-length/decay feel, audio balance, breath→trail coupling; shader/audio textbook by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1048-threshold`** ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (hypnagogia dream-logic scene-teleport engine — five thresholded-noise scenes cross-dissolved + teleport-cut, anti-strobe spacing floor) + **`1046-mycelial-bloom`** (psilocybin warm-organic two-level domain-warp + blooming kaleidoscope) as IDEAS §596. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1047-tracer-drift/README.md`

### [1044-hyperbolic-bloom](/dream/1044-hyperbolic-bloom) · adult / psychedelic · **analysis-only mic** (FFT, non-pointer) + self-sufficient drone / WebGL2 **Poincaré-disk {7,3} hyperbolic tiling** fragment shader · cycle 597 · WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) · demoable · `state: DMT-hyperbolic · pole: intense`
**Drug-free descent into the DMT "hyperbolic hyperspace" — space stops being flat and becomes negatively curved: jeweled heptagons stream out toward the rim forever and never run out.** The lab's **FIRST hyperbolic-geometry build** (grep-0× on `hyperbolic`/`Poincaré`/`{7,3}` across 596 cycles). Per pixel: screen → a complex point `z` in the **Poincaré unit disk**; an inverse **Möbius transform** drags `z` backward along a hyperbolic **geodesic** (the endless "fall" outward, `z'=(z−b)/(1−conj(b)z)` with `b` drifting along the arc) + a slow whole-field rotation; then `z` is **folded into one {7,3} fundamental cell** by ~6–22 depth-driven iterations alternating a **7-fold dihedral mirror** with a **circle inversion** in a circle orthogonal to the disk (`z→c+(z−c)r²/|z−c|²`, orthogonality `|c|²−r²=1`). Fold-count + cell coordinate drive a **jeweled cosine palette** with **thin-film iridescence**, per-channel **chromatic aberration**, **dark grout** along domain edges, a breathing fBm domain-warp ("melting surfaces") + a traveling-wave phase, filmic tone-map. **Honest approximation (documented in README + in-app notes):** a fixed inverting circle per sector with the correct orthogonality relation — reads convincingly as negatively-curved {7,3}, not the proven exact Schwarz-triangle group. **Journey:** a single non-looping ~5-min `progress` clock ramps recursion depth / geodesic fall-speed / warp / saturation / chroma / glow through onset → come-up → **breakthrough peak (~35–60%)** → plateau → soft-landing return (never abrupt). **Always audio-visual:** a self-sufficient generative **drone** (detuned osc stack + sub-bass + opening low-pass + limiter, master 0.15, click-free fades, full teardown) plays with **zero permissions** and self-FFTs to drive the visuals; an **optional analysis-only mic** (`attachMic` → `AnalyserNode` ONLY, **never** to `destination` — no howl) maps bass→fall-speed, mids→warp, highs→iridescence, loudness→saturation. Graceful degrade: no WebGL2 → `text-rose-300` notice + the drone still plays the full arc; no mic → drone drives everything silently with a small note. Full GL teardown (deleteProgram + WEBGL_lose_context) + pause/resume. **Named refs:** QRI *The Hyperbolic Geometry of the DMT Experience* (Gómez-Emilsson — world-sheets folding into negatively-curved hyperspace, saddles, sheets); Bressloff–Cowan cortical form-constants; M.C. Escher *Circle Limit I–IV*. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [hyperbolic tiling, grep-0×] · #2 ≥3 subsystems [hyperbolic geometry engine + Möbius/fold fragment renderer + arc envelope + self-FFT drone synth = 4] · #3 named references; + RESEARCH §597). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-primary (JURY 7×), cosmic-ambient-pole (lane 3×, rebalancing)] · picked=[analysis-only-mic+drone INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2 hyperbolic-tiling OUTPUT, Möbius-geodesic + {7,3}-fold TECHNIQUE (lab-first), neon-jeweled intense VIBE]` — rebalances the lane's pole to intense (was cosmic-ambient 3 vs intense 2) and the *look/technique* is wholly distinct from the prior DMT pieces (1038 2D log-polar warp / 1042 4D raymarch). **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing — slow luminance/saturation drift + smooth motion only, no full-screen flash; Pause instantly freezes + silences. **No API route → no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` → compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; `next lint` on the 1044 folder = **✔ 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container — unverified: whether the fold *subjectively* reads as hyperbolic on a real GPU, framerate at 6–22 fold iters/pixel, the audio→curvature coupling feel; the Möbius/fold math + drone are textbook by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1046-mycelial-bloom`** ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (psilocybin warm-organic — fills the lane's empty warm pole) + **`1049-salvia-membrane`** (the uncanny salvia "becoming-an-object" 2D-membrane state, grep-0×) as IDEAS §597. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1044-hyperbolic-bloom/README.md`

### [1050-mycelial-grow](/dream/1050-mycelial-grow) · adult / psychedelic · **analysis-only mic-breath** (RMS, non-pointer) + autonomous / Canvas2D **space-colonization growing network** · cycle 598 · DEEP-winner (2026-06-29) · demoable · `state: psilocybin · pole: intense-warm (organic)`
**The psych lane's FIRST warm piece and FIRST psilocybin state — gold mycelium that actually GROWS out of the loam-dark, branching filaments colonizing the field forever (minute 5 ≠ minute 1), each fork ringing a soft tone.** Real **Space Colonization Algorithm** (Runions/Lane/Prusinkiewicz 2007; Jason Webb's JS port) in a pure framework-free `growth.ts`: a cloud of attractors pulls a network of growth nodes — each attractor influences only its nearest node within an *attraction radius*, each influenced node steps `segmentLength` along the averaged (jittered) direction to its attractors and spawns a child, attractors within the *kill radius* are consumed, and **branching emerges naturally** when a node is pulled in divergent directions (reported as a *fork* event). **Long-form / evolving (the point):** fresh attractor clouds **reseed in slow ~5.5 s waves** into new regions so the network keeps colonizing NEW territory; a per-frame field fade dims the oldest filaments and a `maxNodes` ring-buffer recycles the oldest non-root slots, so it accumulates and runs **indefinitely** — genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1 (a category the lab is thin on). **Look:** dark loam (`#0a0705`), filaments drawn with additive (`"lighter"`) compositing — growing **tips glow brightest**, older/inner branches thicken with depth and dim toward rust/ochre/brown; **warm-organic palette only** (brown→rust→amber→ochre→gold), no blue/violet/neon — the gap the lane completely lacked. **Audio (Web Audio):** a warm sustained **drone bed** (root 55 Hz + just fifth 82.5 Hz + soft partials through a ~20 s LFO lowpass); each **branch/fork** triggers a soft bell from a **fixed A-minor-pentatonic** set (no wrong notes), panned by x, pitched by depth (tips higher, old/deep lower), with **voice-steal (cap 7)** so dense growth shimmers instead of clipping; master `gain ≤0.26 → lowpass → DynamicsCompressor → destination`. **Mic (analysis-only):** `getUserMedia → MediaStreamSource → AnalyserNode` ONLY (**never to `destination`** — no howl; nothing recorded/uploaded) → breath RMS drives **growth rate** (note density) + tip brightness; no-mic → autonomous calm growth + `text-rose-300` self-drive notice. Gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (RAF cancel, mic tracks stopped, master gain faded + context closed). **Honest prior (NOT lab-first):** `322-kids-voice-garden` already used space colonization — the fresh axis here is the adult-psychedelic, autonomously long-form, breath-driven, fork-sonified register (growth *is* the instrument, not a garden you tend). **Named refs:** Runions/Lane/Prusinkiewicz *Modeling Trees with a Space Colonization Algorithm* (2007); Jason Webb (Medium); Paul Stamets *Mycelium Running*. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [growth engine + branch-triggered synth + drone bed + mic-reactivity = 4] · #3 named refs · #5 RESEARCH §598; #1 NOT claimed — 322 prior). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-primary (JURY 7×), fragment-shader/kaleidoscope OUTPUT (lab's heaviest groove, 26 files — incl. the de-selected sibling 1048), cosmic-ambient-pole] · picked=[analysis-only mic-breath INPUT (non-pointer), Canvas2D growing-network OUTPUT (scarce), space-colonization growth + long-form evolution TECHNIQUE, warm-organic intense VIBE (lane-first)]`. **Verified:** `growth.test.ts` (plain `console.assert`, guarded — not auto-run at import) passes — network grows past roots, real branching to depth ≥2, attractors consumed by kill radius, node cap respected under heavy reseeding, low-breath → fewer events. **No API route → no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` → compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; `next lint` on the 1050 folder = **✔ 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no display/mic/audio device in container — unverified: drone-vs-bells loudness balance, visual density/fade pacing, breath→growth-rate feel, and a documented harmless recycle edge case where an overwritten slot may briefly mis-parent a segment [draw loop guards nulls/negative parents → cannot crash; age-fade hides it within a frame or two]; the growth math is test-covered). Winner of an adult psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`1048-mycelial-bloom`** ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (the de-selected sibling — psilocybin warm-organic two-level fBm domain-warp + blooming kaleidoscope *fragment shader*; IQ "warp the warp" + Klüver + Nature Comms 2025; built complete + tsc/eslint-clean, removed unbuilt) as IDEAS §598. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1050-mycelial-grow/README.md`

### [1051-hand-hyperspace](/dream/1051-hand-hyperspace) · adult / psychedelic · **webcam hand-tracking** (MediaPipe Tasks-Vision via CDN; pointer-drag fallback) / Canvas2D **stereographically-projected 4D polytope** edge-geometry · cycle 599 · WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) · demoable · `state: DMT-hyperdimensional · pole: intense`
**Reach into hyperspace and rotate a four-dimensional jewel with your bare hands — and play the chord those rotations make.** The lab's **FIRST hand-tracking input** and **FIRST you-PLAY-it psychedelic instrument** — the direct antidote to the JURY-flagged "seven full-screen shaders-you-watch in a row" monoculture (its #1 provocation: make one you can PLAY, not a lean-back screensaver). A 4D polytope (**tesseract / 8-cell** or **24-cell**, built from first principles) is rotated through **all six independent rotation planes** (XY XZ XW YZ YW ZW), **stereographically projected 4D→3D→2D** (pole at w=+2.2, then a 3D perspective), and drawn as glowing chromatic edges on Canvas2D with additive (`lighter`) bloom + a trailing fade + depth-cued line weight — **edge geometry, explicitly NOT a full-screen fragment shader** (the banned output). **Hands as the instrument:** MediaPipe **HandLandmarker** loaded at runtime via CDN dynamic `import()` (`webpackIgnore` + `@ts-expect-error` on the URL module; **zero npm deps added**) in VIDEO mode → left-hand height drives the **XW** spin, right-hand sweep drives **YW**, the **spread between the two hands** drives **ZW** and zooms toward "breakthrough" (brightness/saturation up), a **pinch holds** the geometry still. **Audio = the gesture:** six oscillators in **just intonation** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8 over A2=110 Hz), each plane's smoothed spin sets one partial's loudness + a motion detune-shimmer, through a brightness-driven lowpass + a code-generated **convolver reverb** tail — so a hand movement is literally a shifting neon chord. **Always alive:** graceful degradation — CDN-fail / camera-blocked / no-hands all fall back to **pointer drag + wheel-zoom** (synthetic hand-state) with a color-coded `text-rose-300`/violet status line; zero input → slow auto-drift keeps it turning + sounding (never a dead screen). Gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (RAF cancel, AudioContext close, landmarker close, mic/camera tracks stopped). **Named refs:** the **Pardesco 4D Polytope Viewer** (4d.pardesco.com — interactive stereographic projection + true 4D rotation revealing hidden symmetries, here turned from watch-only into a hand-played instrument); the DMT "hyperdimensional / more axes than physical reality allows / more-real-than-real" phenomenology (PSYCHEDELIC.md Cluster 1). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [webcam hand-tracking input — grep-0× in lane; you-play-it 4D instrument] · #2 ≥3 subsystems [CDN hand-tracking + 4D-polytope/stereographic-projection renderer + just-intonation synth + reverb = 4] · #3 named references · #5 RESEARCH §599 [Jan-2026 IJFMR browser hand-gesture-instrument paper + Pardesco viewer]). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT, auto-playing-screensaver relationship] · picked=[webcam hand-tracking INPUT (lab-first, active), Canvas2D 4D-edge-geometry OUTPUT, six-plane 4D rotation + stereographic projection TECHNIQUE, DMT-intense VIBE played-not-watched]` — clears all three banned tags; it is an *instrument*, not a field. **Love-signal aligned:** `217-dance-avatar`❤️ / `101-camera-song`❤️ (body/camera input). **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing — smooth motion + slow luminance/saturation drift only, no full-screen flash. **No API route → no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` → compile + ESLint + type-check **PASS** (subagent `next lint` + `tsc --noEmit` on the 1051 folder = 0 warnings/0 errors; full-build phase log confirms ✓Compiled → lint → typecheck all passed with only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT camera/GPU/ear-verified** (no webcam/display/audio device in container — unverified: real MediaPipe handedness-label stability [README notes a swap-prone edge], the subjective "4D" read on a real GPU, audio chord balance, hand→rotation coupling feel; the 4D math + just-intonation synth are textbook by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1052-piano-bloom`** ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (touch-conducted WebGPU-compute Gray-Scott bloom over Karel's real Welcome Home piano — discharges JURY #2 real-piano-carrier + #4 WebGPU-compute-as-body) + **`1053-skin-membrane`** (multi-touch mass-spring membrane + inharmonic drum-modal synth, salvia 2D-surface-melt) as IDEAS §599. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1051-hand-hyperspace/README.md`

### [1052-piano-bloom](/dream/1052-piano-bloom) · adult / psychedelic · **touch (paint + drag reader-probes) + real piano via file-drop** / **WebGPU-compute Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** (Canvas2D/CPU fallback) · cycle 600 · DEEP-winner (2026-06-29) · demoable · `state: psilocybin · pole: cosmic-ambient (warm)`
**Play your own piano into a living reaction-diffusion field: touch grows warm gold blooms, and "reader" probes you drag over the field granulate and re-voice your recording back at you.** The psych lane's **FIRST WebGPU-compute build** (the JURY flagged compute "down to 2×, both the dead Echo Halls pieces" — #4: bring it back as the resonating body) and **FIRST real-piano carrier** (#2: "use Karel's Path piano — *zero* of the psych builds did it") — and an **instrument you PLAY**, not a screensaver (#1). The resonating body is a real **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** sim (Pearson 1993; `U'=Du∇²U−UV²+f(1−U)`, `V'=Dv∇²V+UV²−(f+k)V`, 8-neighbour Laplacian stencil, double-buffered, toroidal wrap) in `rd.ts` behind one `RDField` interface with **two real backends**: a **WebGPU compute** path (WGSL `@workgroup_size(8,8)` step, ping-pong storage buffers, async `mapAsync` readback to a CPU mirror for probe-sampling + Canvas2D render, 256² grid) and a **CPU/typed-array fallback** (160² grid → `ImageData`) so it never blanks — feature-detected via `navigator.gpu` → adapter → device. **You play it (two gestures):** touching the field **injects reagent (paints V)** so blooms grow under your finger; you place/drag up to **four reader probes** — interaction model borrowed from **Reactive Audio "Growth" (2026)**, where modulation readers on an evolving RD field translate local values into modulation — each reader samples local **V → grain scrub position**, **V-gradient → grain pitch + density**, **bloom intensity → grain gain**, **x → pan**, driving a windowed-`BufferSource` **granular** head over your loaded recording (`granular.ts`). Dense blooms = thick grain clouds; calm field = sparse grains. **So touch → field → audio is bidirectional and felt.** **Audio tiers (degrade gracefully):** file-drop / picker → `decodeAudioData` → granulate the real thing (this is how Karel loads his *Welcome Home* tracks at review); **zero file → a warm felt-piano bed** (detuned sine/triangle partials, soft attack, long release, low pad) whose filter/detune/amp the readers still modulate, so it makes sound + visuals on a phone glance with no input and **no microphone** (output only — no howl path). **Warm psilocybin palette only** (deep ember floor → rust → burnt-orange → amber → ochre → moss → luminous gold; never cold) — extends the warm pole 1050 opened, away from the lane's neon/void/pastel. Full teardown (RAF cancel, GPU buffers `.destroy()`, `AudioContext.close()`, click-free gain ramps). **Named refs:** Pearson "Complex Patterns in a Simple System" (Science 1993) / Gray-Scott; **Reactive Audio *Growth*** (2026, reader-on-a-living-field modulation); Iñigo Quílez / standard RD double-buffer Laplacian implementations. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [WebGPU-compute RD body + granular re-voicer + felt-synth fallback + touch/reader instrument layer = 4] · #3 named reference [Reactive Audio *Growth*; Pearson] · #5 RESEARCH §600 [the *Growth* reader-on-RD-field finding + the 2026-02 Gray-Scott-on-WebGPU wave]; #1 NOT over-claimed — WebGPU compute has lab-wide priors [1019/1029/130], the fresh axis is *psych-lane-first compute body + reader-granulated real piano*). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT, auto-playing-screensaver relationship] · picked=[touch paint+reader-probe INPUT + real-piano file-drop (played, active), WebGPU-compute RD-simulation OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch), reaction-diffusion-as-resonating-body + reader-granulation TECHNIQUE, warm psilocybin cosmic-ambient VIBE played-not-watched]` — clears all three JURY bans. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing — slow RD evolution + warm luminance only, no full-screen flash. **No API route → no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` → compile + ESLint + type-check **PASS** (`next lint` on the 1052 folder = **✔ 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/display/audio device in container — the CPU path is what ran here; unverified: the WGSL compute path on a real GPU end-to-end, grain-vs-felt loudness balance, the touch→bloom→grain coupling feel; the RD math is verified correct on both backends by inspection, granular/synth are textbook). Winner of an adult psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (one concept — "play your piano into a WebGPU-compute resonating body" — via two techniques); banked **`1054-piano-flock`** ⭐ RESURRECT-FIRST (the de-selected sibling — a 120k-particle WebGPU-compute boids flock you *conduct*, flock-shape→granulation, love-aligned with the loved particle cluster 130/236/262/321) as IDEAS §600. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1052-piano-bloom/README.md`

### [1053-ripple-loom](/dream/1053-ripple-loom) · adult / psychedelic · **touch-strike** (tap/drag, played) / **WebGPU-compute damped-wave field** warped through the shared log-polar engine (Canvas2D/CPU fallback) · cycle 601 · DEEP-winner (2026-06-29) · `state: meditative ripple-void · pole: cosmic-ambient`
**Strike a still pond of light and play the expanding ripples — warped through your own visual cortex's log-polar map into breathing tunnels, spirals and honeycombs, each ring ringing a consonant bell.** This fire's headline is actually the **`_shared/psych/` infrastructure extraction** the JURY called ~7 fires overdue (#3): two new tested engines — **`_shared/psych/logpolar.ts`** (the load-bearing form-constant / log-polar warp: `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` GLSL string + JS twins `screenToCortex`/`cortexToScreen`/`formConstant`/`honeycomb`/`FORM_PHI`, round-trip-exact, verified by `logpolar.test.ts`) and **`_shared/psych/safeFlicker.ts`** (the photosensitive-safe flicker gate: OFF by default, hard-clamped ≤3 Hz, soft-sine floor never a hard strobe, instant `kill()`, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`) — so the lane finally **composes** the warp instead of re-deriving it a fourth time (it was re-derived in 1038/1042/1044). 1053 is the first consumer AND brings **WebGPU compute back as the resonating body** (JURY #4 — compute had collapsed to 2×, both dead Echo-Halls pieces). **The instrument:** a real 2D damped wave-equation `u_next=(2·u_curr−u_prev)+c²∇²u_curr` then ×damping, on a **WebGPU compute** path (WGSL: ping-ponged `prev`/`curr`/`next` storage buffers, a `splat` compute pass injecting gaussian impulses on each strike, a `render` compute pass warping screen pixels through the log-polar map + form constant → storage texture → blit) with a **mandatory Canvas2D fallback** (the identical model on a smaller CPU grid in `wave.ts`, using the JS twins — auto-selected when `navigator.gpu` is absent/fails, `text-amber-300/95` notice) so it's a fully playable instrument on any device. **Played, not watched:** the field rests dark (faint indigo glow + quiet sub-drone); **tap to strike one ripple, drag to draw a line of strikes**; Form selector (tunnels/spirals/honeycomb), Decay (ring sustain), Strike strength, Bells (2–7 listener probes on a golden-angle spiral), and an opt-in Shimmer (the safe-flicker path) + instant Kill. **Audio (Web Audio):** each probe samples local wave energy; a ripple cresting under it rings a short **inharmonic additive bell** in a just-intonation pentatonic set through a generated convolver reverb; a soft sub-octave drone underneath (idle ≈ near silence). A tiny CPU "mirror" wave drives the probes in both paths, avoiding a per-frame GPU readback stall. **Named refs:** Bressloff–Cowan–Golubitsky–Thomas–Wiener (2001) retina→V1 complex-log map (the engine in `logpolar.ts`); Heinrich Klüver's four form constants (the selectable Form modes). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [WebGPU-compute wave body + log-polar warp render + JI bell/drone audio + touch-strike instrument = 4] · #3 named references · #5 RESEARCH §601 [WebGPU compute production-ready across browsers incl. Safari 26; the compose-the-infra finding]; #1 NOT claimed — log-polar is lab-prior [1038/1042/1044], the fresh axis is *consolidation into shared tested infra* + the compose payoff + a played wave-strike relationship). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT, auto-playing-screensaver relationship] · picked=[touch-strike INPUT (played, active), WebGPU-compute wave-field OUTPUT (not a WebGL2 fragment shader you watch — brings compute back), wave-equation-as-resonating-body × log-polar-form-constant-warp TECHNIQUE, cosmic-ambient meditative VIBE played-not-watched]` — clears all three JURY bans and rebalances the pole to cosmic-ambient. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing by default — slow luminance drift only; the only flicker path is the ≤3 Hz opt-in safe-flicker engine with instant kill. **No API route → no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` → **compile + ESLint + type-check PASS** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; `next lint` on the `1053-ripple-loom` folder **and** `_shared/psych` = **✔ 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code — identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/display/audio device in container — unverified: the WGSL step/splat/render pipeline + bind-group ping-pong on a real GPU, bell/drone voicing, decay/strength/phase-drift feel; the Canvas2D fallback + CPU wave model are the safer demo path; the log-polar warp math IS test-covered in `logpolar.test.ts`). Winner of an adult psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (one concept — "play a form-constant field into being" — via two substrates); banked **`1054-cortex-paint`** ⭐ RESURRECT (the de-selected sibling — paint plane-wave stripes directly in cortical space, WebGL2 stroke-driven field, optional Welcome Home file-carrier; built complete + tsc/eslint-clean, removed unbuilt) as IDEAS §601. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1053-ripple-loom/README.md`

### [1056-key-bloom](/dream/1056-key-bloom) · adult / psychedelic · **keyboard** (A–L just-intonation scale + Z/X octave; Web MIDI + on-screen/touch keys) / Canvas2D **log-polar form-constant kaleidoscope bloom** composed from the shared `_shared/psych/` engines · cycle 602 · WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) · demoable · `state: psilocybin · pole: intense-warm`
**Play a keyboard as a psychedelic organ — each key sounds a warm just-intonation tone AND blooms a chrysanthemum of form-constant geometry, and chords stack into a living mandala you compose in real time.** The second consumer of the new `_shared/psych/` infra (after 1053) — it **composes** `logpolar.ts` rather than re-deriving it: each note's petals are laid out in **cortical space** and warped to screen with `cortexToScreen`, the radius modulated by `formConstant(u,v,phi,freq,phase)` / `honeycomb(...)`, so the blooms genuinely **are** the Bressloff–Cowan / Klüver form constants (concentric-ring tunnels, radial spokes, spirals, honeycomb) — not arbitrary flowers (`bloom.ts`). Mappings: pitch→`freq` (denser rings up the scale), note index→`phi`/form-constant choice + palette offset, time-since-onset→`phase` drift **and** an N-fold kaleidoscope fold count that blooms `2→~12→settles ~6` (the "chrysanthemum opening", à la Iñigo Quílez domain-folding), velocity→size+brightness. **Played, not watched** — directly answers JURY 2026-06-29 #1 ("ban the lean-back screensaver — make one you can PLAY"): idle = quiet warm dark; the geometry only exists where you play. **Three input paths into one note model:** computer keyboard `A S D F G H J K L` = nine 5-limit JI scale degrees (movable root, Z/X octave), an on-screen clickable keyboard (fully playable by touch on a phone — the lowest-friction 06:30 demo path, no permission/hardware), and **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess()`, note-on/off → velocity drives bloom size; emerald "MIDI connected" note only when a device is present). **Audio (`audio.ts`, output only — no mic):** polyphonic JI organ, each voice an additive partial stack (1·2·3) + a 2-op FM shimmer, soft attack / long release, pitch-panned, 12-voice cap with oldest-steal, a root+fifth drone bed tying chords together, through an OfflineAudioContext-synthesized warm convolution reverb + a `DynamicsCompressor` glue limiter. **Warm-organic palette** (deep ember floor → rust → amber → ochre → moss → luminous gold; never cold/black) — extends the scarce warm pole 1050/1052 opened. Shimmer = the sole luminance-pulse path, routed through `safeFlicker` (opt-in OFF by default, ≤3 Hz soft sine, instant Kill, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`). Full teardown (cancel rAF, dispose audio, null MIDI handlers, remove key listeners). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ≥3 subsystems [keyboard+MIDI+on-screen input + polyphonic JI organ + log-polar kaleidoscope renderer + convolution reverb = 4] · #3 named references [Bressloff–Cowan 2001; Klüver form constants; Iñigo Quílez kaleidoscope/domain-fold; psilocybin open-eye fractal phenomenology] · #5 RESEARCH §602 [the 2026 "Modality Fusion" active-control turn + composing the new shared infra]; #1 NOT claimed — MIDI/keyboard have lab priors [718/902/979], the fresh axes are the *played-organ relationship*, the *warm psilocybin palette*, and *composing the shared engine*). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input (4×), full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT (6×)] · picked=[keyboard/MIDI INPUT (active, played, non-mic — dodges the mic groove the jury hammered), Canvas2D kaleidoscope OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch), log-polar-form-constant-bloom TECHNIQUE composed from shared infra, warm psilocybin intense-warm VIBE]` — clears both banned tags. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing by default; the only flicker path is the ≤3 Hz opt-in safe-flicker engine with instant kill. **No API route → no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` → **compile + ESLint + type-check PASS** (`next lint` on the `1056-key-bloom` folder = **✔ 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code — Vercel deploys normally; the 1056 builder also reported a clean full `npm run build` listing the route at 6.38 kB). **NOT ear/MIDI-verified** (no audio/MIDI device in container — unverified: organ voicing + grain/reverb balance, the note→bloom coupling feel, real MIDI note-on/off on hardware, 60fps under very heavy chords on low-end devices; the log-polar bloom math is correct by inspection + composes the test-covered `logpolar.ts`). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-instrument fire ("play the form constants with your body" — breath/tilt/keys); banked **`1054-breath-temple`** ⭐ RESURRECT (breathe a form-constant cathedral into being — the most literal answer to JURY #1's "breath-as-control, not breath-as-ambient"; Canvas2D, cosmic-ambient) + **`1055-tilt-tunnel`** (tilt-steered DMT log-polar hyperspace flight, WebGL2) as IDEAS §602. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1056-key-bloom/README.md`

### [1057-face-bloom](/dream/1057-face-bloom) · adult / psychedelic · **webcam face-tracking — facial *expression* (52 MediaPipe blendshapes + head pose), active control** / Canvas2D **log-polar form-constant kaleidoscope** composed from the shared `_shared/psych/` engines · cycle 603 · WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) · demoable · `state: psilocybin · pole: intense-warm`
**Your FACE is the psychedelic instrument — open your jaw to bloom the chrysanthemum, raise your brows to heat and densify it, turn your head to tour tunnels→spokes→spirals→honeycombs; idle/neutral = quiet warm dark.** The lab's **FIRST face / facial-expression input** (hand-tracking exists at 1051; face never — grep-0×), and the **3rd consumer of the new `_shared/psych/` infra** (after 1053/1056) — it **composes** `logpolar.ts` rather than re-deriving it: kaleidoscope petals are laid out in **cortical `(u=log r, v=θ)`** space and warped to screen via `cortexToScreen`, modulated by `formConstant(u,v,phi,freq,phase)` / `honeycomb(...)`, then folded N-fold with mirrored wedges into a true kaleidoscope (`render.ts`) — so the blooms genuinely **are** the Bressloff–Cowan / Klüver form constants, not arbitrary flowers. **The fresh control surface (RESEARCH §603):** MediaPipe **Face Landmarker** emits **52 ARKit-style blendshape coefficients** ∈[0,1] + a 4×4 head-pose matrix every frame — a *semantic expression* channel, not raw geometry. `mapping.ts` distills them through ONE shared `deriveDrive()` feeding BOTH renderer and organ (a smile *sounds* like it *looks*): `jawOpen`→fold-count bloom 2→~12 + master swell + lowpass open · `browInnerUp`→form-constant `freq` density + warmth/saturation · eye-aspect (inverted blink)→entropy/detail · `mouthSmile`→gold push + shimmer voice · head yaw/roll→spiral handedness + inward `phase` drift + form-constant tour. **Played, not watched** — directly answers JURY 2026-06-29 #1 ("ban the lean-back screensaver — make one you can PLAY"); idle collapses every parameter toward a near-still resting field, it comes alive only as you express. **Output is Canvas2D** (additive `lighter` glowing petals + warm trailing fade), *deliberately not a WebGL fragment shader* (the banned output form). **Audio (`audio.ts`, output only — no mic):** a just-intonation stacked-fifths organ (1·3/2·9/8·5/4·15/8·3 over ~D2) of detuned sine/triangle voices + a soft sub pad + a smile-gated shimmer voice → synthesized `OfflineAudioContext` convolution reverb → high-shelf → `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; gesture-gated start, full teardown on unmount. **Warm-organic palette** (deep ember → rust → amber → gold; never cold) — extends the scarce warm pole (1050/1052/1056). **Graceful fallback:** no camera / permission denied / CDN fail → `text-rose-300` notice + sliders (`jawOpen`/`brow`/`entropy`/`yaw`) that play the same instrument — never a dead screen. MediaPipe loaded from jsDelivr CDN at runtime (zero new npm deps), mirroring 1051's working dynamic-import pattern. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [face/blendshape input, grep-0×] · #2 ≥3 subsystems [FaceLandmarker + log-polar kaleidoscope renderer + JI organ + convolution reverb + safeFlicker = 5] · #3 named refs [MediaPipe Face Landmarker blendshapes; Bressloff–Cowan 2001; Klüver form constants; psilocybin open-eye phenomenology] · #5 RESEARCH §603 [the live-blendshape expression-control finding → this build, dated this cycle]). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input (5×: 1041/1042/1044/1047/1050), full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT (5×: 1041/1042/1043/1044/1047)] · picked=[face/expression-blendshape INPUT (lab-first, active, NON-mic), Canvas2D log-polar kaleidoscope OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch), facial-expression→form-constant TECHNIQUE composed from shared infra, warm psilocybin intense-warm VIBE]` — clears both banned tags. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing by default; the only flicker path is the held-squint opt-in routed through `safeFlicker` (≤3 Hz soft sine, instant kill, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`), with a photosensitivity note shown when the toggle is exposed. **No API route → no `guard`** (pure client; reads no Resonance prod API; zero cost/network surface). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` → **✓ Compiled successfully (2.1min) → Linting and checking validity of types PASS** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **ZERO from the 1057 folder**) → static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code — Vercel deploys normally, lab is live at 1056); belt-and-suspenders `next lint --dir 1057-face-bloom` = **✔ 0/0**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors referencing 1057. **NOT camera/ear-verified** (no webcam/audio in container — unverified: the blendshape→parameter gains + smoothing [expressive vs twitchy], organ/reverb balance, the squint-shimmer threshold [may fire on normal blinks], and the head-pose Euler sign/range from MediaPipe's column-major matrix; the log-polar bloom math composes the test-covered `logpolar.ts` and is correct by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-instrument fire ("active-control surfaces the lab hasn't used"); banked **`1058-tilt-temple`** ⭐ (phone-tilt-steered cosmic-ambient log-polar void tunnel + Shepard-tone endless descent; Canvas2D) + **`1059-piano-flock`** (conduct a WebGPU-compute boids flock whose shape granulates Karel's real Welcome Home piano — brings back the jury-wanted WebGPU compute) as IDEAS §603. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1057-face-bloom/README.md`
